Motivation: 研究强制披露制度（如萨班斯-奥克斯利法案改革）如何影响市场流动性，特别关注做市商竞争程度在其中的调节作用。

Method: 构建多期Kyle类型模型，纳入知情交易强制披露和做市商不完全竞争；理论证明线性均衡存在唯一性；利用2002年萨班斯-奥克斯利法案改革作为自然实验，对美国股票进行双重差分实证分析。

Result: 披露通过降低价格冲击来减少交易成本；披露的边际效益在做市商竞争较弱时显著更大；实证验证显示，增强披露后，做市商较少的股票价差减少幅度显著更大。

Conclusion: 披露制度对流动性的提升效果与市场结构密切相关，监管政策应考虑市场微观结构特征，特别是在做市商竞争不足的市场中，强制披露能带来更大的流动性改善。

Abstract: We develop a multi-period Kyle-type model that incorporates both mandatory disclosure of informed trades and imperfect competition among market makers. We prove the existence and uniqueness of a linear equilibrium and show that the liquidity-enhancing effect of disclosure is fundamentally linked to the degree of market-making competition. Disclosure lowers trading costs by reducing price impact, and its marginal benefit is strictly larger when competition is weak. We empirically validate this prediction using the 2002 Sarbanes-Oxley Act disclosure reform as a natural experiment. A difference-in-differences analysis of U.S. equities confirms that the spread reduction following enhanced disclosure is significantly larger for stocks with fewer active market makers.

</details>


<div id='stat.ML'></div>

# stat.ML [[Back]](#toc)

### [157] [Discrete Flow Maps](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09784)
*Peter Potaptchik,Jason Yim,Adhi Saravanan,Peter Holderrieth,Eric Vanden-Eijnden,Michael S. Albergo*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出Discrete Flow Maps框架，通过将离散概率单纯形的几何特性融入流映射训练，解决传统连续流模型在离散数据上的几何不匹配问题，实现单步并行文本生成。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自回归模型的顺序生成存在速度限制，连续流模型虽然提供并行生成路径但需要昂贵的迭代积分。流映射通过压缩生成轨迹为单步映射理论上可实现单步生成，但传统欧几里得回归损失在离散数据上几何不匹配。

Method: 提出Discrete Flow Maps框架，重新构建离散域的标准流映射训练，将训练动态与离散语言特性对齐，严格遵循概率单纯形的几何结构。

Result: 严格的几何对齐使该方法在离散流建模中超越了先前的最先进结果。

Conclusion: 通过将离散几何融入流映射训练，成功解决了连续流模型在离散语言数据上的不匹配问题，实现了更高效的并行文本生成。

Abstract: The sequential nature of autoregressive next-token prediction imposes a fundamental speed limit on large language models. While continuous flow models offer a path to parallel generation, they traditionally demand expensive iterative integration. Flow Maps bypass this bottleneck by compressing generative trajectories into single-step mappings, theoretically enabling the generation of full text sequences from noise in a single forward pass. However, standard formulations rely on Euclidean regression losses that are geometrically ill-suited for discrete data. In this work, we resolve this conflict with Discrete Flow Maps, a framework that reconciles trajectory compression with the geometry of the probability simplex. We recast standard flow map training for the discrete domain, aligning the training dynamics with the discrete nature of language. Empirically, this strict geometric alignment allows our method to surpass previous state-of-the-art results in discrete flow modeling.

</details>


### [158] [Orthogonal machine learning for conditional odds and risk ratios](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10412)
*Jiacheng Ge,Iván Díaz*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文提出针对条件比值比(OR)和风险比(RR)的新型非参数估计器，扩展了DR-learner和R-learner方法，通过正交风险函数和伪结果技术改进治疗效果异质性估计。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有条件治疗效果估计方法主要关注条件平均处理效应(ATE)，而针对比值比(OR)和风险比(RR)的现代估计器发展滞后，特别是基于双重稳健变换或正交风险函数的前沿方法尚未推广到这些参数。

Method: 推导OR和RR的正交风险函数，证明相关伪结果具有类似ATE情况的二阶条件均值余项性质，扩展DR-learner和R-learner方法，并进行全面的非参数蒙特卡洛模拟研究。

Result: 模拟研究表明，在复杂真实世界场景中，提出的非参数估计器相比传统参数模型显著减少偏差和均方误差，能揭示传统回归方法掩盖的治疗效果异质性。

Conclusion: 数据自适应方法对推进精准健康研究至关重要，提出的OR和RR估计器能改进治疗决策规则，在NHANES数据分析中展示了实际应用价值。

Abstract: Conditional effects are commonly used measures for understanding how treatment effects vary across different groups, and are often used to target treatments/interventions to groups who benefit most. In this work we review existing methods and propose novel ones, focusing on the odds ratio (OR) and the risk ratio (RR). While estimation of the conditional average treatment effect (ATE) has been widely studied, estimators for the OR and RR lag behind, and cutting edge estimators such as those based on doubly robust transformations or orthogonal risk functions have not been generalized to these parameters. We propose such a generalization here, focusing on the DR-learner and the R-learner. We derive orthogonal risk functions for the OR and RR and show that the associated pseudo-outcomes satisfy second-order conditional-mean remainder properties analogous to the ATE case. We also evaluate estimators for the conditional ATE, OR, and RR in a comprehensive nonparametric Monte Carlo simulation study to compare them with common alternatives under hundreds of different data-generating distributions. Our numerical studies provide empirical guidance for choosing an estimator. For instance, they show that while parametric models are useful in very simple settings, the proposed nonparametric estimators significantly reduce bias and mean squared error in the more complex settings expected in the real world. We illustrate the methods in the analysis of physical activity and sleep trouble in U.S. adults using data from the National Health and Nutrition Examination Survey (NHANES). The results demonstrate that our estimators uncover substantial treatment effect heterogeneity that is obscured by traditional regression approaches and lead to improved treatment decision rules, highlighting the importance of data-adaptive methods for advancing precision health research.

</details>


### [159] [A Deep Generative Approach to Stratified Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10650)
*Randy Martinez,Rong Tang,Lizhen Lin*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出两种基于深度生成模型的层次空间学习方法：基于变分自编码器的筛极大似然方法和基于扩散的分数场方法，用于学习层次空间上的分布。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 复杂数据通常更适合建模为层次空间（不同维度流形的并集），但层次学习面临维度变化、交集奇点和缺乏高效分布学习模型的挑战。

Method: 1. 筛极大似然方法：通过维度感知的变分自编码器混合实现；2. 扩散方法：探索混合分布的分数场结构。两种方法都能学习层次空间的分布。

Result: 建立了学习环境分布和内在分布的收敛率，证明了分数场几何可用于一致估计每个层次的内在维度和层次数量。模拟和分子动力学等实际数据应用验证了方法的有效性。

Conclusion: 提出的两种深度生成框架为层次空间学习提供了有效方法，理论结果为底层几何、环境噪声水平和深度生成模型之间的相互作用提供了基本见解。

Abstract: While the manifold hypothesis is widely adopted in modern machine learning, complex data is often better modeled as stratified spaces -- unions of manifolds (strata) of varying dimensions. Stratified learning is challenging due to varying dimensionality, intersection singularities, and lack of efficient models in learning the underlying distributions. We provide a deep generative approach to stratified learning by developing two generative frameworks for learning distributions on stratified spaces. The first is a sieve maximum likelihood approach realized via a dimension-aware mixture of variational autoencoders. The second is a diffusion-based framework that explores the score field structure of a mixture. We establish the convergence rates for learning both the ambient and intrinsic distributions, which are shown to be dependent on the intrinsic dimensions and smoothness of the underlying strata. Utilizing the geometry of the score field, we also establish consistency for estimating the intrinsic dimension of each stratum and propose an algorithm that consistently estimates both the number of strata and their dimensions. Theoretical results for both frameworks provide fundamental insights into the interplay of the underlying geometry, the ambient noise level, and deep generative models. Extensive simulations and real dataset applications, such as molecular dynamics, demonstrate the effectiveness of our methods.

</details>


### [160] [One-Step Score-Based Density Ratio Estimation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10672)
*Wei Chen,Qibin Zhao,John Paisley,Junmei Yang,Delu Zeng*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: OS-DRE是一种结合直接密度比估计和基于分数的方法优势的新框架，通过解析的径向基函数框架将时间积分转化为闭式加权和，实现单次函数评估的密度比估计。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有密度比估计方法存在权衡：直接方法计算高效但在大分布差异时性能下降；基于分数的方法更准确但需要大量重复函数评估和数值积分。需要结合两者优势的方法。

Method: 将时间分数分解为空间和时间分量，用解析的径向基函数框架表示时间分量，将原本难以处理的时域积分转化为闭式加权和，无需数值求解器，只需一次函数评估。

Result: 在密度估计、持续KL散度和互信息估计、近分布外检测等任务中，OS-DRE在估计质量和推理效率之间取得了良好平衡。

Conclusion: OS-DRE框架成功结合了直接方法和基于分数的方法的优势，通过解析表示时间分量实现了高效准确的密度比估计，为实际应用提供了实用解决方案。

Abstract: Density ratio estimation (DRE) is a useful tool for quantifying discrepancies between probability distributions, but existing approaches often involve a trade-off between estimation quality and computational efficiency. Classical direct DRE methods are usually efficient at inference time, yet their performance can seriously deteriorate when the discrepancy between distributions is large. In contrast, score-based DRE methods often yield more accurate estimates in such settings, but they typically require considerable repeated function evaluations and numerical integration. We propose One-step Score-based Density Ratio Estimation (OS-DRE), a partly analytic and solver-free framework designed to combine these complementary advantages. OS-DRE decomposes the time score into spatial and temporal components, representing the latter with an analytic radial basis function (RBF) frame. This formulation converts the otherwise intractable temporal integral into a closed-form weighted sum, thereby removing the need for numerical solvers and enabling DRE with only one function evaluation. We further analyze approximation conditions for the analytic frame, and establish approximation error bounds for both finitely and infinitely smooth temporal kernels, grounding the framework in existing approximation theory. Experiments across density estimation, continual Kullback-Leibler and mutual information estimation, and near out-of-distribution detection demonstrate that OS-DRE offers a favorable balance between estimation quality and inference efficiency.

</details>


### [161] [Tail-Aware Information-Theoretic Generalization for RLHF and SGLD](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10727)
*Huiming Zhang,Binghan Li,Wan Tian,Qiang Sun*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出针对重尾数据的尾部依赖信息理论框架，基于sub-Weibull分布，开发了无需矩生成函数的新泛化界工具，应用于鲁棒学习、RLHF和随机优化等场景。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统信息理论泛化界依赖KL散度和矩生成函数，要求数据有界或次高斯尾部。但在鲁棒学习、RLHF、随机优化等现代场景中，损失和奖励常呈重尾分布，矩生成函数可能不存在，使传统工具失效。

Method: 1. 建立sub-Weibull数据的尾部依赖信息理论框架，尾部参数θ控制尾部厚度；2. 提出去相关引理，使用移位对数fθ散度约束测度变化期望；3. 建立sub-Weibull过程的尖锐极大不等式和Dudley型链式界；4. 推导期望和高概率PAC-Bayes泛化界；5. 提出基于多尺度Rényi互信息的信息理论链式不等式。

Result: 1. 开发了无需矩生成函数的新泛化界工具；2. 复杂度按log^{1/θ}和熵^{1/θ}缩放；3. 应用于重尾奖励的Rényi正则化RLHF；4. 应用于重尾梯度噪声的随机梯度Langevin动力学。

Conclusion: 提出了处理重尾数据的统一信息理论框架，克服了传统方法对矩生成函数的依赖，为鲁棒学习、RLHF和随机优化等现代机器学习任务提供了有效的理论工具。

Abstract: Classical information-theoretic generalization bounds typically control the generalization gap through KL-based mutual information and therefore rely on boundedness or sub-Gaussian tails via the moment generating function (MGF). In many modern pipelines, such as robust learning, RLHF, and stochastic optimization, losses and rewards can be heavy-tailed, and MGFs may not exist, rendering KL-based tools ineffective. We develop a tail-dependent information-theoretic framework for sub-Weibull data, where the tail parameter $θ$ controls the tail heaviness: $θ=2$ corresponds to sub-Gaussian, $θ=1$ to sub-exponential, and $0<θ<1$ to genuinely heavy tails. Our key technical ingredient is a decorrelation lemma that bounds change-of-measure expectations using a shifted-log $f_θ$-divergence, which admits explicit comparisons to Rényi divergence without MGF arguments. On the empirical-process side, we establish sharp maximal inequalities and a Dudley-type chaining bound for sub-Weibull processes with tail index $θ$, with complexity scaling as $\log^{1/θ}$ and entropy$^{1/θ}$. These tools yield expected and high-probability PAC-Bayes generalization bounds, as well as an information-theoretic chaining inequality based on multiscale Rényi mutual information. We illustrate the consequences in Rényi-regularized RLHF under heavy-tailed rewards and in stochastic gradient Langevin dynamics with heavy-tailed gradient noise.

</details>


### [162] [Neural Generalized Mixed-Effects Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10976)
*Yuli Slavutsky,Sebastian Salazar,David M. Blei*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出神经广义混合效应模型（NGMM），用神经网络替代GLMM中的线性函数，以捕捉协变量与响应间的复杂非线性关系，并开发了高效的优化算法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统广义线性混合效应模型（GLMM）假设协变量与响应间为线性关系，无法捕捉复杂非线性模式。现有方法在近似边际似然时存在局限性，需要更灵活且可扩展的模型。

Method: 用神经网络替代GLMM中的线性函数，构建神经广义混合效应模型（NGMM）。开发了高效的优化算法，最大化近似边际似然，该算法对网络参数可微，并证明了近似误差以高斯尾速率衰减。

Result: 在合成数据上，当协变量-响应关系非线性时，NGMM优于GLMM；在真实数据集上，NGMM超越了现有方法。通过学生能力数据集展示了NGMM可扩展到更复杂的潜变量模型。

Conclusion: NGMM为分组和层次数据提供了更灵活的建模框架，能有效捕捉非线性关系，具有良好的理论保证和实际性能，并可扩展到更复杂的潜变量结构。

Abstract: Generalized linear mixed-effects models (GLMMs) are widely used to analyze grouped and hierarchical data. In a GLMM, each response is assumed to follow an exponential-family distribution where the natural parameter is given by a linear function of observed covariates and a latent group-specific random effect. Since exact marginalization over the random effects is typically intractable, model parameters are estimated by maximizing an approximate marginal likelihood. In this paper, we replace the linear function with neural networks. The result is a more flexible model, the neural generalized mixed-effects model (NGMM), which captures complex relationships between covariates and responses. To fit NGMM to data, we introduce an efficient optimization procedure that maximizes the approximate marginal likelihood and is differentiable with respect to network parameters. We show that the approximation error of our objective decays at a Gaussian-tail rate in a user-chosen parameter. On synthetic data, NGMM improves over GLMMs when covariate-response relationships are nonlinear, and on real-world datasets it outperforms prior methods. Finally, we analyze a large dataset of student proficiency to demonstrate how NGMM can be extended to more complex latent-variable models.

</details>


### [163] [DDO-RM for LLM Preference Optimization: A Minimal Held-Out Benchmark against DPO](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11119)
*Tiantian Zhang,Jierui Zuo,Wenping Wang*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文比较了DPO与DDO-RM两种偏好优化方法，在有限设置下DDO-RM在配对准确率、AUC和平均边际方面均优于DPO，但结果仍属初步。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究动机是探索在最小化成对选择场景中，基于奖励模型的决策分布更新方法（DDO-RM）是否能比直接成对目标优化（DPO）表现更好。

Method: 使用EleutherAI/pythia-410m模型和HuggingFaceH4/ultrafeedback_binarized数据集，在test_prefs分割上进行评估，比较DPO与DDO-RM方法。DDO-RM将每个提示视为候选回复的有限决策问题，通过形成策略分布、中心化奖励模型分数并蒸馏回策略来实现优化。

Result: DDO-RM相比DPO：平均配对准确率从0.5238提升至0.5602，AUC从0.5315提升至0.5382，平均边际从0.1377提升至0.5353。结果基于三个随机种子（42, 13, 3407）。

Conclusion: DDO-RM在初步基准测试中显示出优于DPO的潜力，但研究范围有限（单一模型家族、单一数据集、单一评估分割、三个种子），需要更广泛的验证。

Abstract: This paper reorganizes the current manuscript around the DPO versus DDO-RM preference-optimization project and focuses on two parts: the algorithmic view and the preliminary held-out benchmark. The benchmark asks a narrow question: even in a minimal pairwise chosen-versus-rejected setting, can a reward-guided decision-distribution update outperform a direct pairwise objective? We compare Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) against DDO-RM on EleutherAI/pythia-410m using HuggingFaceH4/ultrafeedback\_binarized, evaluate on the held-out test\_prefs split, and report results for seeds 42, 13, and 3407.
  Algorithmically, DDO-RM treats each prompt as a finite decision problem over candidate responses. Instead of optimizing only a binary chosen-rejected relation, it forms a policy distribution over candidates, centers reward-model scores under that distribution, and distills a reward-guided target distribution back into the policy. In the current public benchmark, DDO-RM improves mean pair accuracy from 0.5238 to 0.5602, AUC from 0.5315 to 0.5382, and mean margin from 0.1377 to 0.5353 relative to DPO. These are encouraging but still preliminary results: the study covers one model family, one dataset, one held-out evaluation split, and three seeds.

</details>


### [164] [Cost-optimal Sequential Testing via Doubly Robust Q-learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11165)
*Doudou Zhou,Yiran Zhang,Dian Jin,Yingye Zheng,Lu Tian,Tianxi Cai*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出一种双稳健Q学习框架，用于从回顾性数据中学习成本最优的序贯决策策略，通过路径特定逆概率权重处理测试可用性导致的缺失数据问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 临床决策中测试通常成本高、有侵入性或耗时，需要个性化的序贯策略来决定测量什么以及何时停止。回顾性数据中测试可用性依赖于先前结果，导致信息性缺失，需要专门的方法来学习最优策略。

Method: 开发双稳健Q学习框架，引入路径特定逆概率权重处理异质性测试轨迹，结合辅助对比模型构建正交伪结局，在采集模型或对比模型之一正确设定时实现无偏策略学习。

Result: 建立了阶段对比估计器的oracle不等式、收敛率、遗憾界和误分类率，模拟显示相比加权和完整案例基线方法有改进的成本调整性能，前列腺癌队列研究应用表明在不损害预测准确性的情况下降低测试成本。

Conclusion: 该方法能有效从回顾性数据中学习成本最优的序贯决策策略，处理测试可用性导致的缺失数据问题，在临床决策支持中具有实用价值。

Abstract: Clinical decision-making often involves selecting tests that are costly, invasive, or time-consuming, motivating individualized, sequential strategies for what to measure and when to stop ascertaining. We study the problem of learning cost-optimal sequential decision policies from retrospective data, where test availability depends on prior results, inducing informative missingness. Under a sequential missing-at-random mechanism, we develop a doubly robust Q-learning framework for estimating optimal policies. The method introduces path-specific inverse probability weights that account for heterogeneous test trajectories and satisfy a normalization property conditional on the observed history. By combining these weights with auxiliary contrast models, we construct orthogonal pseudo-outcomes that enable unbiased policy learning when either the acquisition model or the contrast model is correctly specified. We establish oracle inequalities for the stage-wise contrast estimators, along with convergence rates, regret bounds, and misclassification rates for the learned policy. Simulations demonstrate improved cost-adjusted performance over weighted and complete-case baselines, and an application to a prostate cancer cohort study illustrates how the method reduces testing cost without compromising predictive accuracy.

</details>


### [165] [Regional Explanations: Bridging Local and Global Variable Importance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11223)
*Salim I. Amoukou,Nicolas J-B. Brunel*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文分析了局部Shapley值和LIME两种广泛使用的局部归因方法，发现它们即使在理想条件下也无法可靠检测局部重要特征，并提出R-LOCO方法来解决这些问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管局部Shapley值和LIME被广泛使用，但作者发现这些方法存在根本性限制，无法可靠地检测局部重要特征，即使是在精确计算和特征独立的理想条件下。一个合理的局部归因方法不应将重要性分配给那些既不直接影响模型输出（如线性模型中系数为零的特征），也不与功能相关特征存在统计依赖的特征。

Method: 提出了R-LOCO（Regional Leave Out COvariates）方法，该方法将输入空间分割为具有相似特征重要性特征的区域，然后在每个区域内应用全局归因方法，根据实例的区域成员资格推导其特征贡献。

Result: 研究表明局部Shapley值和LIME都违反了局部归因的基本原则，而R-LOCO方法能够提供更准确的归因，避免了局部解释的不稳定性，同时保留了全局方法通常会丢失的实例特定细节。

Conclusion: R-LOCO方法弥合了局部和全局解释之间的差距，提供了更忠实的局部归因，解决了现有局部归因方法的基本缺陷。

Abstract: We analyze two widely used local attribution methods, Local Shapley Values and LIME, which aim to quantify the contribution of a feature value $x_i$ to a specific prediction $f(x_1, \dots, x_p)$. Despite their widespread use, we identify fundamental limitations in their ability to reliably detect locally important features, even under ideal conditions with exact computations and independent features. We argue that a sound local attribution method should not assign importance to features that neither influence the model output (e.g., features with zero coefficients in a linear model) nor exhibit statistical dependence with functionality-relevant features. We demonstrate that both Local SV and LIME violate this fundamental principle. To address this, we propose R-LOCO (Regional Leave Out COvariates), which bridges the gap between local and global explanations and provides more accurate attributions. R-LOCO segments the input space into regions with similar feature importance characteristics. It then applies global attribution methods within these regions, deriving an instance's feature contributions from its regional membership. This approach delivers more faithful local attributions while avoiding local explanation instability and preserving instance-specific detail often lost in global methods.

</details>


### [166] [Trustworthy Feature Importance Avoids Unrestricted Permutations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11253)
*Emanuele Borgonovo,Francesco Cappelli,Xuefei Lu,Elmar Plischke,Cynthia Rudin*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出三种新方法解决特征重要性评估中的外推错误问题：条件模型依赖、高斯变换的Knockoffs和受限ALE图设计


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于无限制排列的特征重要性方法存在外推错误问题，这种错误在所有非平凡变量重要性方法中都会出现

Method: 提出三种新方法：1) 条件模型依赖；2) 高斯变换的Knockoffs；3) 受限ALE图设计

Result: 理论和数值结果表明这些策略能够减少或消除外推错误

Conclusion: 通过提出的三种新方法，可以有效解决特征重要性评估中的外推错误问题

Abstract: Feature importance methods using unrestricted permutations are flawed due to extrapolation errors; such errors appear in all non-trivial variable importance approaches. We propose three new approaches: conditional model reliance and Knockoffs with Gaussian transformation, and restricted ALE plot designs. Theoretical and numerical results show our strategies reduce/eliminate extrapolation.

</details>


### [167] [ADD for Multi-Bit Image Watermarking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11491)
*An Luo,Jie Ding*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: ADD是一种两阶段多比特图像水印方法，通过线性组合学习水印并添加到图像中，然后通过内积解码，在48位水印任务中实现100%解码准确率，对图像失真具有强鲁棒性，且计算效率显著提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着生成模型能快速创建高保真图像，社会对虚假信息和真实性的担忧加剧。现有多比特图像水印方法在容量、对常见图像失真的鲁棒性和理论依据方面存在不足。

Method: 提出ADD（Add, Dot, Decode）两阶段方法：1) 学习水印与多比特消息线性组合后添加到图像中；2) 通过水印图像与学习水印的内积进行解码。

Result: 在MS-COCO基准测试中，48位水印任务实现100%解码准确率，在多种图像失真下性能最多下降2%（远低于SOTA方法的14%平均下降），嵌入速度快2倍，解码速度快7.4倍。

Conclusion: ADD在多比特图像水印方面表现出色，具有高容量、强鲁棒性、高计算效率，并提供理论分析解释其有效性，为解决生成图像的真实性问题提供了有前景的方案。

Abstract: As generative models enable rapid creation of high-fidelity images, societal concerns about misinformation and authenticity have intensified. A promising remedy is multi-bit image watermarking, which embeds a multi-bit message into an image so that a verifier can later detect whether the image is generated by someone and further identify the source by decoding the embedded message. Existing approaches often fall short in capacity, resilience to common image distortions, and theoretical justification. To address these limitations, we propose ADD (Add, Dot, Decode), a multi-bit image watermarking method with two stages: learning a watermark to be linearly combined with the multi-bit message and added to the image, and decoding through inner products between the watermarked image and the learned watermark. On the standard MS-COCO benchmark, we demonstrate that for the challenging task of 48-bit watermarking, ADD achieves 100\% decoding accuracy, with performance dropping by at most 2\% under a wide range of image distortions, substantially smaller than the 14\% average drop of state-of-the-art methods. In addition, ADD achieves substantial computational gains, with 2-fold faster embedding and 7.4-fold faster decoding than the fastest existing method. We further provide a theoretical analysis explaining why the learned watermark and the corresponding decoding rule are effective.

</details>


<div id='q-fin.PM'></div>

# q-fin.PM [[Back]](#toc)

### [168] [Temperature Anomalies and Climate Physical Risk in Portfolio Construction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11143)
*Michele Azzone,Carlo Bechi,Gabriele Sbaiz*

Main category: q-fin.PM

TL;DR: 该研究探讨了物理气候风险对全球股票投资组合的影响，提出了两种新的气候风险度量指标，并将其整合到多目标投资组合优化框架中，以构建对气候冲击具有韧性的投资组合。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自然灾害和气候威胁的频率和强度不断增加，需要研究物理气候风险对全球股票投资组合的影响，帮助投资者构建更具气候韧性的投资策略。

Method: 1. 使用面板回归分析行业回报与极端温度事件的关系；2. 提出两种新的气候风险度量指标：气候风险暴露和气候暴露波动率；3. 将这些指标整合到多目标投资组合优化框架中，扩展传统的均值-方差范式；4. 进行回测分析评估气候感知策略的表现。

Result: 统计证据表明极端温度事件对大多数行业产生负面影响。新提出的气候风险度量指标能够更好地衡量投资组合的环境脆弱性，因为它们考虑了极端事件的时间变化概率和公司特定资产强度。回测分析显示了将气候风险指标纳入投资过程的实际益处。

Conclusion: 投资者可以在不牺牲多样性的情况下构建对物理气候冲击具有韧性的投资组合。新的气候风险度量指标和优化框架为气候感知投资提供了实用工具，有助于在气候变化背景下做出更明智的投资决策。

Abstract: Driven by the increasing frequency and intensity of natural disasters and chronic climate threats, we investigate the impact of physical climate risk on global equity portfolios. By employing a panel regression analysis on sectoral returns, we provide statistical evidence that extreme temperature events exert a negative effect on most sectors. We introduce two novel metrics based on these temperature anomalies, Climate Risk Exposure and Climate Exposure Volatility, in order to measure the environmental vulnerability of a portfolio. Unlike available static country-level indices, these metrics incorporate the time varying probability of extreme events and their relations with firm-specific asset intensity. We integrate these measures into a multi-objective portfolio optimization framework. This approach extends the traditional Mean-Variance paradigm, allowing investors to construct portfolios that are resilient to physical climate shocks without sacrificing diversification. Finally, we conduct a backtesting analysis to show the practical benefits of incorporating these climate risk metrics into the investment process, evaluating how climate-aware strategies perform relative to traditional benchmarks.

</details>


<div id='econ.EM'></div>

# econ.EM [[Back]](#toc)

### [169] [JFR-rg: A New Macroeconomic Framework for High-Debt, Low-Growth Economies under Financial Repression](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09663)
*Hirofumi Wakimoto*

Main category: econ.EM

TL;DR: 日本政府债务虽高但已稳定，论文提出日本金融抑制r-g模型，通过债务可持续走廊、标准化棘轮效应和俘获金融系统参数等理论扩展，解释日本债务稳定的机制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统宏观框架认为日本政府债务（超过GDP 240%）存在重大财政风险，但2013-2026年的实时数据显示债务比率已稳定，名义GDP超过670万亿日元，失业率保持在2.6-2.7%左右，需要新的理论框架来解释这一现象。

Method: 建立日本金融抑制r-g模型，扩展Blanchard（2019）框架，纳入金融抑制偏差（ε_t = π_t - r^n_t）和非线性汇率渠道。提出三个理论贡献：债务可持续走廊、标准化棘轮效应和俘获金融系统参数。使用VAR、ARDL、局部投影等实证方法验证框架。

Result: 模型显示日本债务稳定源于金融抑制机制，通过债务可持续走廊几何表征稳定性，标准化棘轮效应表明临时政策错误会导致债务路径持续上升，俘获金融系统参数内生化制度前提。反事实模拟显示激进加息可能产生适得其反的债务动态。

Conclusion: 对于具有日本制度特征的高债务、低增长经济体，战略性地利用由此产生的抑制红利进行生产率提升投资，可能代表一种制度依赖的均衡可能性，前提是维持俘获系统阈值。

Abstract: Standard macroeconomic frameworks have correctly identified Japan's government debt - now exceeding 240% of GDP - as carrying substantial fiscal risk. Yet real-time FRED data from 2013 to 2026 present an empirical record inviting a complementary perspective: debt ratios have stabilized, nominal GDP has exceeded 670 trillion yen (SAAR), and unemployment has remained approximately 2.6-2.7%. This paper formalizes these channels through the Japanese Financial Repression r-g (JFR-rg) model. Building on Blanchard (2019), the framework incorporates a financial repression bias (epsilon_t = pi_t - r^n_t, directly observable from FRED) and a non-linear exchange-rate channel. Three theoretical contributions extend the existing literature: (i) the Debt Sustainability Corridor, a geometric characterization of stability in (epsilon_t, g^n*_t) space; (ii) the Normalization Ratchet, a path-dependence theorem showing that temporary policy errors generate persistently higher debt trajectories; and (iii) the Captive Financial System Parameter (phi_t), which endogenizes the institutional precondition for JFR-rg stability. Appendices H-L provide supporting empirical evidence (VAR, ARDL, Local Projections) demonstrating the framework's claims are empirically disciplined and falsifiable. Core propositions derive from the consolidated government budget identity (Layer L1) requiring no causal identification; identification concerns apply only to the empirical Layer L2. Counterfactual simulations illustrate a Normalization Trap: aggressive rate hikes can produce counterproductive debt dynamics. For high-debt, low-growth economies sharing Japan's institutional characteristics, strategically deploying the resulting Repression Dividend into productivity-enhancing investment may represent a regime-contingent equilibrium possibility - conditional on the captive system threshold being maintained.

</details>


### [170] [Training Neural Networks Embedded in Dynamic Discrete Choice Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09736)
*Ecenur Oguz,Robert L. Bray*

Main category: econ.EM

TL;DR: 提出首个通用无限期动态离散选择模型估计器，通过双重表示分离效用参数与动态规划固定点，避免大规模线性方程组约束


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统动态离散选择模型估计需要解决大规模线性方程组，计算负担重，限制了模型的灵活性和实用性

Method: 开发UFXP和OUFXP估计器，利用贝尔曼方程的双重表示分离效用参数与动态规划固定点，支持神经网络非参数建模

Result: 证明UFXP和OUFXP的一致性和渐近正态性，OUFXP具有效率性，显著降低计算复杂度

Conclusion: 新估计器为动态离散选择模型提供高效灵活的估计框架，支持复杂效用函数的非参数建模

Abstract: We develop the first general-purpose estimator for infinite-horizon dynamic discrete choice models whose estimation problem, after pre-computation, is unencumbered by large systems of linear equations -- either imposed as constraints, or embedded in the objective function. Our unnested fixed point (UFXP) and optimal unnested fixed point (OUFXP) estimators exploit a dual representation of Bellman's equation to separate the utility parameters from the dynamic programming fixed point. We establish the consistency and asymptotic normality of UFXP and OUFXP, as well as the efficiency of the latter. Our estimators enable researchers to model utility functions non-parametrically via flexible neural-network approximations.

</details>


### [171] [Global Persistence, Local Residual Structure: Forecasting Heterogeneous Investment Panels](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09821)
*Oleg Roshka*

Main category: econ.EM

TL;DR: 论文提出了一种两阶段架构，通过全局AR(1)模型捕捉共享持续性，再通过区块特定局部模型处理残差动态，显著提升了混合类型面板数据的预测性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统全局因子增强方法在处理异质面板数据时，会因共享基无法准确表示某些子组的动态而降低预测性能。需要一种能同时捕捉共享持续性和区块特定动态的方法。

Method: 采用两阶段架构：第一阶段使用全局池化AR(1)模型捕捉共享持续性；第二阶段针对不同区块（如科技/医疗、宏观/企业等）建立局部模型处理残差动态。通过区块分解和低秩因子提取相结合。

Result: 全面板样本外R²从0.630提升至0.677（Δ=+0.047），在10/10时间窗口中都有效。科技/医疗区块贡献了约72%的增益，表明跨部门协同运动因子的重要性。该方法在异质混合类型面板上表现优异，但在同质企业面板上无效。

Conclusion: 两阶段架构通过结合全局共享持续性建模和区块特定动态捕捉，显著提升了异质混合类型面板数据的预测性能。数据类型的异质性是该方法有效的关键条件，而非单纯的方法论改进。

Abstract: On a 93-actor quarterly panel mixing macro indicators, institutional data, and firm-level investment ratios, global factor augmentation degrades prediction for actor subgroups whose dynamics are misrepresented by the shared basis. A two-stage architecture -- global pooled AR(1) for shared persistence, block-specific local models for residual dynamics -- improves full-panel out-of-sample $R^2$ from 0.630 to 0.677 ($Δ= +0.047$, CI $[+0.036, +0.058]$, 10/10 windows, placebo $p \leq 0.001$). A held-out decade test -- block partition frozen on 2005--2014 data, evaluated on unseen 2015--2024 windows -- confirms the gain ($Δ= +0.050$, 10/10). Dropping the tech/health block eliminates roughly 72\% of the gain, making it the primary driver; rank-matched decomposition confirms this reflects a genuine cross-sector co-movement factor, not a rank-capacity artefact. Among the linear estimators tested, the gain is architectural rather than methodological; per-actor gradient boosting with the same block decomposition ($R^2 = 0.657$) does not close the gap, showing the advantage combines block-specific estimation with low-rank factor extraction. The gain arises only on heterogeneous mixed-type panels -- not on homogeneous firm-only panels -- identifying data-type heterogeneity as the operative condition. The result survives recursive macro normalisation ($+0.048$), a one-quarter filing-lag correction ($+0.038$, 10/10), and a stratified placebo that fixes the macro/firm data-type split and permutes only firm-sector assignments ($z = 7.25$, $p \leq 0.001$).

</details>


### [172] [Coupling Designs for Randomized Experiments with Complex Treatments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09858)
*Max Cytrynbaum,Fredrik Sävje*

Main category: econ.EM

TL;DR: 提出了一种新的耦合设计方法，将分层随机化的基本原理扩展到连续、约束多元、文本/图像等不规则处理空间的实验中，通过匹配单位到同质组并使用蒙特卡洛耦合技术分配高度分散的处理，提高估计效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统实验设计方法在处理连续、多元、文本/图像等不规则处理空间时存在局限，需要扩展分层随机化原理以适应更复杂的实验场景，提高估计效率。

Method: 首先将实验单位匹配到同质组，然后使用蒙特卡洛耦合技术在组内分配高度分散的处理，确保相似实验单位接收高度不同的处理，通过谱分析揭示效率如何依赖于估计器影响函数的平滑度和形状与耦合主方向的匹配。

Result: 耦合设计能显著提高估计效率，效率增益与分散度和匹配质量的乘积成正比，分散度衡量耦合设计相对于独立随机化时处理分配的分散程度。

Conclusion: 耦合设计为连续、约束多元、文本/图像等不规则处理空间的实验提供了有效的设计框架，通过确保相似单位接收不同处理来提高估计效率，在开发经济学现金转移实验和双边市场离散选择实验中展示了实际应用价值。

Abstract: We describe a new family of coupling designs, extending the basic principle of stratified randomization to experiments with continuous, constrained multivariate, text/image and other irregular treatment spaces. Our approach is to first match units into homogeneous groups, then use Monte Carlo coupling techniques to assign within-group treatments that are highly dispersed over the treatment space. We show that ensuring similar experimental units receive highly dissimilar treatments generically improves estimation efficiency. In particular, the efficiency gains from a coupling design are proportional to the product of dispersion and match quality, where dispersion measures how spread out the treatment assignments are under a given coupling relative to independent randomization. We develop a new spectral analysis, revealing how efficiency depends on a match between the smoothness and shape of the estimator's influence function and the principal directions of a given coupling. We illustrate how coupling designs work in practice using a cash transfer experiment in development economics and a discrete-choice experiment in two-sided marketplaces.

</details>


### [173] [Gaussian approximation for maximum score and non-smooth M-estimators with multiway dependence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10232)
*Harold D. Chiang,Ahnaf Rafi*

Main category: econ.EM

TL;DR: 多向依赖下最大得分估计量达到参数速率渐近正态性，突破了传统i.i.d.采样下的立方根渐近和非高斯极限分布限制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Manski(1975)的最大得分估计量在二值选择模型中无需误差分布参数假设，但在i.i.d.采样下具有非高斯极限分布和立方根渐近性，使统计推断复杂化。本文旨在探索在多向依赖条件下该估计量的渐近性质。

Method: 发展了适用于多向依赖下非光滑目标函数的一般M估计理论，证明了最大得分估计量在多向依赖下达到参数速率的渐近正态性，并提出了有效的bootstrap推断程序。

Result: 在多向依赖条件下，最大得分估计量实现了参数速率的渐近正态性，这一结果令人惊讶地突破了传统i.i.d.设定下的立方根渐近限制，并建立了有效的bootstrap推断方法。

Conclusion: 多向依赖结构显著改善了最大得分估计量的渐近性质，使其达到参数速率渐近正态性，为二值选择模型的非参数推断提供了更有效的工具，并建立了可靠的bootstrap推断框架。

Abstract: The maximum score estimator of Manski (1975) provides an elegant approach to estimate slope coefficient in binary choice models without requiring parametric assumptions on the error distribution. However, under i.i.d. sampling, it admits a non-Gaussian limiting distribution and exhibits cube-root asymptotics, which complicates statistical inference. We show that, under multiway dependence, the maximum score estimator attains asymptotic normality at a parametric rate. We obtain this surprising result through the development of a general M-estimation theory that accommodates non-smooth objective functions under multiway dependence. We further propose and establish the validity of a bootstrap procedure for inference.

</details>


### [174] [Econometric Inference with Machine-Learned Proxies: Partial Identification via Data Combination](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10770)
*Lixiong Li*

Main category: econ.EM

TL;DR: 提出一个处理机器学习生成代理变量的部分识别与推断框架，避免下游计量模型中的偏差


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 实证研究中越来越多使用机器学习方法从复杂非结构化数据构建潜在目标变量的代理变量，但直接将代理变量代入下游计量模型会导致估计偏差和推断无效

Method: 使用两个数据集：包含协变量和代理变量的下游样本，以及包含代理变量和目标变量的辅助验证样本；将代理变量视为连接两个样本的链接变量，基于无条件最优运输表征开发尖锐识别策略，使用解析临界值进行推断

Result: 蒙特卡洛模拟显示在各种预测准确度场景下都能可靠控制规模并提供信息丰富的置信集

Conclusion: 该框架为使用机器学习生成代理变量的计量模型提供了有效的部分识别和推断方法，无需对上游机器学习过程施加严格假设

Abstract: Empirical researchers increasingly use upstream machine-learning (ML) methods to construct proxies for latent target variables from complex, unstructured data. A naive plug-in use of such proxies in downstream econometric models, however, can lead to biased estimation and invalid inference. This paper develops a framework for partial identification and inference in general moment models with ML-generated proxies. Our approach does not require restrictive assumptions on the upstream ML procedure, such as consistency or known convergence rates, nor does it require a complete validation sample containing all variables used in the downstream analysis. Instead, we assume access to two datasets: a downstream sample containing observed covariates and the proxy, and an auxiliary validation sample containing joint observations on the proxy and its target variable. We treat the proxy as a linking variable between these two samples, rather than as a literal noisy substitute for the latent target variable. Building on this idea, we develop a sharp identification strategy based on an unconditional optimal transport characterization and an inference procedure that controls asymptotic size using analytical critical values without resampling. Monte Carlo simulations show reliable size control and informative confidence sets across a range of predictive-accuracy scenarios.

</details>


### [175] [Knowledge Compounding: An Empirical Economic Analysis of Self-Evolving Knowledge Wikis under the Agentic ROI Framework](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11243)
*Shuide Wen,Beier Ku*

Main category: econ.EM

TL;DR: 论文提出知识复利概念，通过实验验证在LLM智能体中引入持久化知识层可显著降低长期成本，相比传统RAG节省84.6%令牌消耗。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统Agentic ROI框架假设任务成本相互独立，这在RAG范式下成立，但引入持久化结构化知识层后该假设失效。需要研究知识积累如何动态影响LLM智能体成本。

Method: 基于Agentic ROI框架提出动态成本模型Cost(t)，引入知识库覆盖率H(t)。在工业级C#实现的多智能体框架Qing Claw上进行四查询序列实验，对比知识复利机制与传统RAG基线。

Result: 四查询实验中，知识复利机制累计消耗47K令牌，传统RAG消耗305K令牌，节省84.6%。30天预测显示中等主题集中度下节省53.7%，高集中度下节省81.3%，差距随时间单调扩大。

Conclusion: LLM令牌应从消耗品重新分类为资本品，经济分析应从静态边际成本转向动态资本积累。知识复利通过三种微观机制实现：一次性知识摄入摊销、高质量答案自动反馈、外部搜索结果写回实体页面。

Abstract: Building on the Agentic ROI framework proposed by Liu et al. (2026), this paper introduces knowledge compounding as a new measurable concept in the empirical economics of LLM agents and validates it through a controlled four-query experiment on Qing Claw, an industrial-grade C# reimplementation of the OpenClaw multi-agent framework. Our central theoretical claim is that the cost term in the original Agentic ROI equation contains an unexamined assumption -- that the cost of each task is mutually independent. This assumption holds under the traditional retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) paradigm but breaks down once a persistent, structured knowledge layer is introduced. We propose a dynamic Agentic ROI model in which cost is treated as a time-varying function Cost(t) governed by a knowledge-base coverage rate H(t). Empirical results from four sequential queries on the same domain yield a cumulative token consumption of 47K under the compounding regime versus 305K under a matched RAG baseline -- a savings of 84.6%. Calibrated 30-day projections indicate cumulative savings of 53.7% under medium topic concentration and 81.3% under high concentration, with the gap widening monotonically over time. We further identify three microeconomic mechanisms underlying the compounding effect: (i) one-time INGEST amortized over N retrievals, (ii) auto-feedback of high-value answers into synthesis pages, and (iii) write-back of external search results into entity pages. The theoretical contribution of this paper is a recategorization of LLM tokens from consumables to capital goods, shifting the economic discussion from static marginal cost analysis to dynamic capital accumulation. The engineering contribution is a minimal reproducible implementation in approximately 200 lines of C#, which we believe is the first complete industrial-grade reference implementation of Karpathy's (2026) LLM Wiki paradigm.

</details>


### [176] [Average Marginal Effects in One-Step Partially Linear Instrumental Regressions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11393)
*Lucas Girard,Elia Lapenta*

Main category: econ.EM

TL;DR: 提出一种基于再生核希尔伯特空间方法的半线性工具变量回归中平均边际效应的估计与推断新方法，使用单一正则化参数，通过贝叶斯自助法进行推断验证


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在半线性工具变量回归中，传统方法难以有效估计平均边际效应并进行统计推断，需要开发更稳健且易于实现的方法

Method: 使用再生核希尔伯特空间方法，采用单一正则化参数，结合贝叶斯自助法进行统计推断

Result: 证明了估计量的一致性和渐近正态性，模拟显示良好的有限样本性能，三个实证应用表明能产生有经济意义的结果

Conclusion: 该方法易于实现，在理论和实证上都表现良好，为半线性工具变量回归中的平均边际效应估计提供了有效工具

Abstract: We propose a novel procedure for estimating and conducting inference on average marginal effects in partially linear instrumental regressions using Reproducing Kernel Hilbert Space methods. Our procedure relies on a single regularization parameter. We obtain the consistency and asymptotic normality of our estimator. Since the variance of the limiting distribution has a complex analytical form, we propose a Bayesian bootstrap method to conduct inference and establish its validity. Our procedure is easy to implement and exhibits good finite-sample performance in simulations. Three empirical applications illustrate its implementation on real data, showing that it yields economically meaningful results.

</details>


<div id='q-fin.RM'></div>

# q-fin.RM [[Back]](#toc)

### [177] [On the Structure of Risk Contribution: A Leave-One-Out Decomposition into Inherent and Correlation Risk](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10375)
*Nolan Alexander,Frank Fabozzi*

Main category: q-fin.RM

TL;DR: 将标准风险贡献分解为两个经济可解释的组成部分：固有风险和相关性风险，提供更透明的风险诊断工具


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统风险贡献分析无法区分风险来源是来自资产自身的波动性还是与其他资产的相关性，需要更精细的分解来理解风险构成

Method: 使用留一法表示，将每个头寸的风险贡献分解为独立于组合的固有波动性贡献项和与组合其余部分协方差的相关性贡献项

Result: 固有风险成分始终为正，相关性风险可正可负；分解保持了严格可加性；提供了两种时间序列分析方法来追踪不同市场环境下风险成分的变化

Conclusion: 该分解提供了稳定、透明且易于实施的风险诊断工具，可支持投资组合风险报告、压力测试和绩效归因，能区分风险来源并识别有效对冲

Abstract: This paper develops a decomposition of standard Risk Contribution (RC) into two economically interpretable components: inherent risk and correlation risk. Using a leave-one-out representation, each position's RC separates into a term reflecting its own volatility contribution independent of the portfolio and a term capturing its covariance with the remainder of the portfolio. The inherent component is always positive, arising from the intrinsic volatility of the position, while the correlation component may amplify or mitigate total portfolio risk depending on how the position moves relative to other holdings. Because the decomposition operates within standard RC, it preserves the property of strict additivity. This separation provides diagnostic insight not visible from aggregate risk contributions alone. It distinguishes whether a position contributes risk because it is volatile in isolation or because it is highly correlated with the rest of the portfolio, and it clarifies when a negatively correlated position functions as an effective hedge. Two approaches to time-series analysis are presented to track how inherent and correlation risk evolve across market regimes, revealing whether changes in portfolio risk during stress periods are driven by volatility shocks, correlation shifts, or both. Empirical illustrations suggest that the decomposition provides stable, transparent, and easily implementable risk diagnostics that can support portfolio risk reporting, stress testing, and performance attribution.

</details>


### [178] [Lambda R{é}nyi entropic value-at-risk](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10657)
*Zhenfeng Zou*

Main category: q-fin.RM

TL;DR: 本文提出了Λ-EVaR，一种将Λ框架的灵活置信水平结构与EVaR的高阶矩敏感性相结合的新型风险度量族。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有风险度量工具在自适应风险容忍度和矩敏感风险评估之间存在差距，需要一种能同时处理灵活置信水平结构和高阶矩敏感性的统一框架。

Method: 定义Λ-EVaR风险度量，建立其基本性质（单调性、现金次可加性、拟凸性），提供完整的公理化特征，推导对偶表示和扩展的Rockafellar-Uryasev型公式，并分析在Wasserstein和均值-方差不确定性下的最坏情况行为。

Result: 证明了Λ-EVaR的凸性、混合凹性和现金可加性仅在Λ为常数时成立，获得了闭式表达式揭示了其鲁棒性特性，提供了高效计算方法。

Conclusion: Λ-EVaR填补了自适应风险容忍度和矩敏感风险评估之间的空白，为现代风险管理提供了一个多功能工具。

Abstract: This paper introduces the Lambda extension of the Rényi entropic value-at-risk ($Λ$-EVaR), a novel family of risk measures that unifies the flexible confidence level structure of the $Λ$-framework with the higher-moment sensitivity of EVaR. We define $Λ$-EVaR, establish its foundational properties including monotonicity, cash subadditivity, and quasi-convexity, and provide a complete axiomatic characterization showing that convexity, concavity in mixtures and cash additivity hold only when $Λ$ is constant. A dual representation and an extended Rockafellar-Uryasev-type formula are derived, enabling efficient computation. We further analyze the worst-case behavior of $Λ$-EVaR under Wasserstein and mean-variance uncertainty, obtaining closed-form expressions that reveal its robustness properties. The proposed measure bridges the gap between adaptive risk tolerance and moment-sensitive risk assessment, offering a versatile tool for modern risk management.

</details>


### [179] [A Counterfactual Diagnostic Framework for Explaining KS Deterioration in Credit Risk Model Validation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11561)
*Yiqing Wang*

Main category: q-fin.RM

TL;DR: 提出一个反事实诊断框架来解释信用风险模型验证中KS统计量的下降，通过分层归因方法识别KS恶化的原因


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前信用风险模型验证中，KS统计量下降的诊断通常依赖验证者的个人判断而非标准化分析框架，缺乏系统性的归因方法

Method: 提出一个反事实诊断框架，按顺序将KS下降归因于：抽样变异性、投资组合构成变化、协变量偏移、以及模型漂移导致的残差恶化，每个阶段都有明确的网关条件控制升级

Result: 模拟实验表明，该方法比基于阈值的单独审查提供更具解释性和治理相关性的解释，有助于实现更一致、透明和可辩护的性能违规评估

Conclusion: 该反事实诊断框架为信用风险模型验证中的KS下降提供了标准化、系统化的诊断方法，提高了评估的一致性和透明度

Abstract: The Kolmogorov-Smirnov (KS) statistic is widely used in credit risk model monitoring and validation to assess discriminatory power. In practice, a material decline in KS often triggers governance review and requires validation teams to identify the breach source and the potential business risk. However, such diagnosis is frequently conducted on an ad hoc basis, relying on the judgment of individual validators rather than a standardized analytical framework. This paper proposes a counterfactual diagnostic framework for explaining KS deterioration in credit risk model validation. The framework sequentially attributes observed KS decline to sampling variability, portfolio composition change, covariate shift, and residual deterioration consistent with model drift, with explicit gateway conditions governing escalation at each stage. Simulation experiments demonstrate that the proposed approach provides more interpretable and governance-relevant explanations than threshold-based review alone, and contributes to more consistent, transparent, and defensible performance-breach assessment in credit risk model validation.

</details>


<div id='q-fin.MF'></div>

# q-fin.MF [[Back]](#toc)

### [180] [The Long-Only Minimum Variance Portfolio in a One-Factor Market: Theory and Asymptotics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09986)
*Alec Kercheval,Ololade Sowunmi*

Main category: q-fin.MF

TL;DR: 该论文研究了在单因子协方差模型下，具有任意符号资产beta的长多头最小方差投资组合，给出了显式解和活跃资产集的明确表征，并解决了关于混合符号beta扩展的开放问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究单因子协方差模型下长多头最小方差投资组合问题，特别是当资产beta具有任意符号（正负混合）时的情形。这扩展了现有研究，解决了Qi等人（2021）提出的关于混合符号beta扩展的开放问题。

Method: 在单因子协方差模型框架下，推导长多头最小方差投资组合的显式解，明确表征活跃资产集（权重为正的资产）。在高维渐近分析中，假设beta来自分布F，证明活跃资产比例收敛到F(β*)，其中β*是显式积分方程的根。

Result: 1. 给出了长多头最小方差投资组合的显式解和活跃资产集的明确可计算表征；2. 解决了Qi等人（2021）关于混合符号beta扩展的开放问题；3. 在高维极限下，活跃资产比例收敛到F(β*)；4. 当所有beta为正时，活跃比例收敛到零；5. 当F(0)较小时，建立了收敛速率F(β*)=O(F(0)^{1/3})。

Conclusion: 该论文完整解决了单因子协方差模型下长多头最小方差投资组合的理论问题，提供了显式解和活跃资产集的明确表征，并在高维极限下建立了活跃比例的收敛性结果，特别是解决了混合符号beta情形的开放问题。

Abstract: We study the long-only minimum variance (LOMV) portfolio under a one-factor covariance model with asset betas of arbitrary sign.
  We provide an explicit solution in terms of the set of active (positive weight) assets, and provide an explicit and computable characterization of the active set. As a corollary we resolve an open question of \citet{qi2021} concerning the extension to mixed-sign betas.
  In the high-dimensional regime $p \to \infty$ where the betas are drawn from a distribution with cdf $F$, we prove that the proportion of active assets (the active ratio) in the LOMV portfolio converges in almost all cases to $F(β^{*})$, where $β^* \geq 0$ is the root of an explicit integral equation determined by $F$. This is a variation of a result first appearing in \citet{bernstein2025}. In particular, when $F$ is continuous and all betas are positive ($F(0)=0$), the active ratio converges to zero. When $F(0) >0$ is small, under mild moment conditions and concentration bounds we establish the convergence rate
  $F(β^*)=O(F(0)^{1/3})$ as $F(0) \to 0$.

</details>


### [181] [Aharanov-Bohm Type Arbitrage and Homological Obstructions in Financial Markets](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10492)
*Takanori Adachi*

Main category: q-fin.MF

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种基于过滤市场系统中全局环路效应的新型套利概念，称为Aharonov-Bohm套利，它源于环路效应而非局部价格差异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统套利理论主要关注局部价格差异，但本文旨在探索由全局环路效应产生的套利机会，这种效应在单个交易中不可见，但在环路中显现。

Method: 使用滤过建模为逆变函子F，考虑相关的条件期望函子，定义乘性畸变dF，计算dF沿环路的和乐，并将非平凡和乐解释为全局不一致性。

Result: 证明了在适当的可容许条件下，非平凡和乐可以转化为可预测的自融资交易策略，建立了上同调结构与经济可实现套利机会之间的概念联系。

Conclusion: 提出了一种新的套利范式，强调全局环路效应在金融市场中的重要性，为理解套利提供了拓扑和几何视角。

Abstract: We introduce a new notion of arbitrage based on global loop effects in filtered market systems. Given a filtration modeled as a contravariant functor $F : \mathcal{T}^{op} \to \mathrm{Prob}$, we consider the associated conditional expectation functor $\mathcal{E} \circ F$ and show that it induces a canonical multiplicative distortion $dF(i) := (\mathcal{E} \circ F)(i)(1)$, which measures the failure of constant functions to be preserved under non-measure-preserving transitions. We define the holonomy of $dF$ along loops in $\mathcal{T}$ and interpret non-trivial holonomy as a global inconsistency that is invisible at the level of individual transitions. This leads to a notion of Aharonov--Bohm (AB) arbitrage, in which arbitrage arises from loop effects rather than local price discrepancies. We further show that, under suitable admissibility conditions, non-trivial holonomy can be converted into a predictable self-financing trading strategy. This provides a conceptual link between cohomological structures and economically realizable arbitrage opportunities.

</details>


### [182] [Mechanism Design for Investment Regulation under Herding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11100)
*Huisheng Wang,H. Vicky Zhao*

Main category: q-fin.MF

TL;DR: 提出基于最优控制理论的三方博弈框架来量化监管羊群效应，包括监管者、领导者和跟随者，旨在最大化社会福利并最小化监管成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 羊群效应在金融市场普遍存在，会扭曲理性决策、放大波动性，并可能被操纵者利用损害市场。传统监管工具（如信息披露和交易限制）往往不够精确且缺乏理论有效性保证，需要量化方法来监管羊群效应。

Method: 提出基于最优控制理论的监管者-领导者-跟随者三方博弈框架：领导者做出理性决策，跟随者在最大化效用的同时与领导者决策保持一致，监管者设计机制以最大化社会福利并最小化监管成本。

Result: 推导出跟随者的决策和监管者的机制，理论分析了监管对决策的影响，并研究了改善社会福利的有效机制。

Conclusion: 该研究为羊群效应的量化监管提供了理论框架，能够帮助监管者设计更有效的机制来减少羊群效应的负面影响，提高市场效率和社会福利。

Abstract: Herding, where investors imitate others' decisions rather than relying on their own analysis, is a prevalent phenomenon in financial markets. Excessive herding distorts rational decisions, amplifies volatility, and can be exploited by manipulators to harm the market. Traditional regulatory tools, such as information disclosure and transaction restrictions, are often imprecise and lack theoretical guarantees for effectiveness. This calls for a quantitative approach to regulating herding. We propose a regulator-leader-follower trilateral game framework based on optimal control theory to study the complex dynamics among them. The leader makes rational decisions, the follower maximizes utility while aligning with the leader's decisions, whereas the regulator designs a mechanism to maximize social welfare and minimize regulatory cost. We derive the follower's decisions and the regulator's mechanisms, theoretically analyze the impact of regulation on decisions, and investigate effective mechanisms to improve social welfare.

</details>


<div id='q-fin.ST'></div>

# q-fin.ST [[Back]](#toc)

### [183] [Dynamic Forecasting and Temporal Feature Evolution of Stock Repurchases in Listed Companies Using Attention-Based Deep Temporal Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09650)
*Xiang Ao,Jingxuan Zhang,Xinyu Zhao*

Main category: q-fin.ST

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种结合经济理论与深度时序网络的动态预警系统，用于预测股票回购行为，显著优于传统静态模型，并通过可解释AI揭示了回购决策的时序动态机制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 准确预测股票回购对量化投资和风险管理至关重要，但传统静态模型无法捕捉企业财务状况的复杂时序依赖关系，需要开发能够处理时序动态的预测方法。

Method: 使用中国A股面板数据（2014-2024），采用混合时序卷积网络（TCN）和基于注意力的LSTM来捕捉长短期财务演化模式，通过滚动窗口交叉验证评估模型性能。

Result: 模型显著优于逻辑回归和XGBoost等静态基线模型。通过可解释AI揭示了回购决策的时序动态：长期"低估"是根本动机，而"现金流"的急剧增加是短期触发因素。

Conclusion: 本研究为金融预测提供了稳健的深度学习范式，并为经典公司财务假设提供了动态实证支持，展示了深度时序网络在捕捉企业财务行为复杂动态方面的优势。

Abstract: Accurately predicting stock repurchases is crucial for quantitative investment and risk management, yet traditional static models fail to capture the complex temporal dependencies of corporate financial conditions. This paper proposes a dynamic early warning system integrating economic theory with deep temporal networks. Using Chinese A-share panel data (2014-2024), we employ a hybrid Temporal Convolutional Network (TCN) and Attention-based LSTM to capture long- and short-term financial evolutionary patterns. Rolling-window cross-validation demonstrates our model significantly outperforms static baselines like Logistic Regression and XGBoost. Furthermore, utilizing Explainable AI (XAI), we reveal the temporal dynamics of repurchase decisions: prolonged "undervaluation" serves as the long-term underlying motive, while a sharp increase in "cash flow" acts as the decisive short-term trigger. This study provides a robust deep learning paradigm for financial forecasting and offers dynamic empirical support for classic corporate finance hypotheses.

</details>


### [184] [Regime-Aware Specialist Routing for Volatility Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10402)
*Tenghan Zhong*

Main category: q-fin.ST

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种基于市场状态的专家路由框架，用于ETF波动率预测，通过在线风险评估和状态相关门控机制，在不同市场状态下组合不同预测专家，显著提升了高波动率时期的预测性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 市场条件变化时，波动率预测变得困难，模型性能在不同市场状态下表现不稳定。现有预测方法往往无法适应市场状态的变化，需要一个能够根据市场状态动态调整的预测框架。

Method: 开发了一个基于市场状态的专家路由框架，包含在线风险评估和状态相关门控机制。该框架在平静和压力市场状态下组合不同的预测专家，使用每日ETF面板数据，采用滚动向前设计进行验证。

Result: 研究发现最强的预测器是市场状态依赖的而非全局最优。相对于滚动最佳基线，提出的路由框架将高波动率预测损失降低了约24%，预测不足损失降低了约22%。

Conclusion: 专家路由框架为变化的市场条件提供了一个实用的自适应预测架构，能够有效应对市场状态变化带来的预测挑战，显著提升波动率预测的准确性和稳定性。

Abstract: Volatility forecasting becomes challenging when market conditions change and model performance varies across regimes. Motivated by this instability, we develop a regime-aware specialist routing framework for ETF volatility forecasting. The framework uses online risk-sensitive evaluation and state-dependent gating to combine different forecasting specialists across calm and stressed market states. Using a daily panel of six ETFs under a rolling walk-forward design, we find that the strongest forecaster is regime-dependent rather than global. Relative to the rolling-best baseline, the proposed routing framework reduces high-volatility forecast loss by about 24\% and underprediction loss by about 22\%. These results suggest that specialist routing provides a practical adaptive forecasting architecture for changing market conditions.

</details>


### [185] [A Herding-Based Model of Technological Transfer and Economic Convergence: Evidence from Central and Eastern Europe](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11413)
*Vygintas Gontis,Lesya Kolinets*

Main category: q-fin.ST

TL;DR: 论文扩展新古典增长框架，引入微观基础的全球技术扩散机制，将生产率增长建模为从技术前沿采纳现有技术的过程，使用羊群效应互动机制描述扩散过程。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管发展中经济体向发达国家的长期趋同表现出稳健的经验规律，但标准增长模型中技术扩散机制仍不够明确。现有模型通常将技术进步视为外生或纯粹创新驱动，缺乏对技术转移作为全要素生产率驱动因素的微观基础。

Method: 扩展新古典框架，引入微观基础的技术转移机制，将生产率增长建模为从全球技术前沿采纳现有技术的过程。使用羊群型互动机制描述扩散过程，其中个体在个体激励和同伴效应的共同影响下从非采纳者转变为采纳者。

Result: 该方法产生了全要素生产率动态的易处理聚合表示，其特征是向移动技术前沿的非线性趋同。推导出显式解析解，并将模型参数解释为初始生产率、趋同极限和扩散速度。使用OECD中东欧经济体生产率数据进行模型评估。

Conclusion: 论文提供了一个具有微观基础的技术扩散模型，能够更好地解释发展中经济体的趋同模式，将技术转移作为全要素生产率增长的核心机制，为理解技术扩散过程提供了新的分析框架。

Abstract: The long-run convergence of developing economies toward advanced countries exhibits robust empirical regularities, yet the mechanisms underlying technological diffusion remain insufficiently specified in standard growth models. In this paper, we extend the neoclassical framework by introducing a micro-founded mechanism of technological transfer as a driver of total factor productivity. Rather than treating technological progress as exogenous or purely innovation-driven, we model productivity growth as a process of adopting existing technologies from the global frontier. The diffusion process is described using a herding-type interaction mechanism, in which agents transition from non-adopters to adopters under the combined influence of individual incentives and peer effects. This approach yields a tractable aggregate representation of TFP dynamics characterized by nonlinear convergence toward a moving technological frontier. We derive an explicit analytical solution and provide an interpretation of model parameters in terms of initial productivity, convergence limits, and diffusion speed. The model is evaluated using OECD productivity data for Central and Eastern European economies.

</details>


<div id='eess.SY'></div>

# eess.SY [[Back]](#toc)

### [186] [On Feedback Speed Control for a Planar Tracking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09795)
*Xincheng Li,Tengyue Liu,Udit Halder*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出一种结合速度反馈控制与恒定方位转向策略的平面跟踪方法，实现领导-跟随者的并排编队，证明系统稳定性，并扩展到多智能体链式网络。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究平面跟踪问题中领导与跟随者之间的编队控制，旨在实现并排编队，这对于生物群体和工程集群中的信息传播具有重要意义。

Method: 提出新颖的速度反馈控制律配合恒定方位转向策略，当领导者转向已知时保证渐近稳定性；转向未知时证明输入到状态稳定性；领导者转向周期性时跟随者收敛到同周期轨道。

Result: 通过数值仿真和移动机器人实验验证了控制方法的有效性，并将两智能体控制律扩展到N智能体链式网络，展示了在生物和工程集群中定向信息传播的应用潜力。

Conclusion: 提出的控制方法能够有效实现并排编队，具有理论保证的稳定性，可扩展到多智能体系统，为生物群体行为和工程集群控制提供了新思路。

Abstract: This paper investigates a planar tracking problem between a leader and follower agent. We propose a novel feedback speed control law, paired with a constant bearing steering strategy, to maintain an abreast formation between the two agents. We prove that the proposed control yields asymptotic stability of the closed-loop system when the steering of the leader is known. For the case when the leader's steering is unavailable to the follower, we show that the system is still input-to-state stable with respect to the leader's steering viewed as an input. Furthermore, we demonstrate that if the leader's steering is periodic, the follower will asymptotically converge to a periodic orbit with the same period. We validate these results through numerical simulations and experimental implementations on mobile robots. Finally, we demonstrate the scalability of the proposed approach by extending the two-agent control law to an N-agent chain network, illustrating its implications for directional information propagation in biological and engineered flocks.

</details>


### [187] [Variable Dead-Time Based Novel Soft-Start Method for Dual Active Bridge Converters](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09811)
*Sachith Wijesooriya,Sandun S. Kuruppu*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出一种基于死区时间渐减的双有源桥变换器启动控制方法，通过逐步减小死区时间实现平滑启动，有效抑制电压过冲和浪涌电流。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统软启动技术仅依赖相移控制或固定死区时间设置，在DAB变换器启动时会产生严重的电压过冲和高浪涌电流，影响系统安全性和可靠性。

Method: 提出一种新颖的启动控制方法：将死区时间从接近一个开关周期的值逐渐减小到硬件定义的最小值，从而实现次级侧电压的平滑建立，并有效抑制启动过程中的电压过冲和浪涌电流。

Result: 仿真结果表明传统方法导致严重电压过冲和高浪涌电流，而所提方法实现了电压的渐进上升和良好调节的电流特性。在15 kW硬件平台上的实验验证了该方法在不同工况下的有效性和鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 该技术简单、硬件友好、易于在标准微控制器上实现，适用于n阶DAB架构，是提高DAB变换器在实际应用中可靠性和安全性的通用解决方案。

Abstract: Effective startup control is critical for the safe and reliable operation of Dual Active Bridge (DAB) converters. Unlike traditional soft-start techniques that rely solely on phase-shift control or fixed dead-time settings, the proposed approach gradually reduces the dead time from a value close to one switching period to the hardware-defined minimum. This enables a smooth buildup of the secondary-side voltage while effectively minimizing voltage overshoot and suppressing inrush current during startup. As a result, the leakage inductor current rises in a controlled manner, ensuring safe and predictable startup behavior. Simulation results demonstrate that conventional startup methods lead to severe voltage overshoot and high inrush currents, whereas the proposed method achieves a gradual voltage rise with well-regulated current profiles. Experimental validation using a 15 kW hardware platform confirms the effectiveness and robustness of the approach under different operating conditions. The proposed technique is simple, hardware-friendly, easily implementable on standard microcontrollers, and applicable to nth - order DAB architecture, making it a versatile solution for enhancing the reliability and safety of DAB converters in practical applications.

</details>


### [188] [Agentic Workflows for Resolving Conflict Over Shared Resources: A Power Grid Application](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09823)
*Shiva Poudel,Thiagarajan Ramachandran,Orestis Vasios,Andrew P. Reiman*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出一个多智能体去冲突框架，通过双边协商、结构化调解和程序化去冲突三种模式协调LLM智能体的决策，避免资源冲突


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着LLM智能体在各领域决策支持中的应用增加，需要系统性地解决多个智能体对共享资源提出的潜在冲突行动

Method: 设计基于LLM的客户端智能体原则（包括思维链推理），引入迭代加权共识机制，支持双边协商、结构化调解和程序化去冲突三种模式

Result: 框架在电力分配用例中验证，协调成本优化和韧性增强的分布式管理系统应用，有效管理柴油发电机和电池储能系统的冲突

Conclusion: 提出的去冲突框架能有效协调多智能体决策，支持数值和非数值决策，具有领域无关性，为LLM智能体系统集成提供解决方案

Abstract: The increasing use of LLM-based agents to support decision-making and control across diverse domains motivates the need for systematic deconfliction of their proposed actions. We present a deconfliction framework for coordinating multiple agents that formally encapsulate individual applications, each proposing potentially conflicting actions over shared resources. Conflicts are resolved through three deconfliction modes: bilateral negotiation, structured mediation, and procedural (deterministic) deconfliction. We define design principles for large language model-based client agents, including a chain-of-thought style reasoning process, and introduce an iterative weighted-consensus mechanism that does not require the applications themselves to solve optimization problems. The framework is domain agnostic and supports both numeric and non-numeric decisions. Its performance is demonstrated on a power distribution use case with conflicting advanced distribution management system applications for cost optimization and resilience, coordinating diesel generators and battery energy storage systems.

</details>


### [189] [Online Electricity Pricing from Frequency Measurements](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09931)
*Xinwei Liu,Vladimir Dvorkin*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出基于频率测量的实时电价机制，将电力市场与电网频率动态集成，通过本地频率测量直接驱动和补偿发电机的频率响应。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有实时电力市场运行时间尺度较慢，未能充分利用电网频率动态反映的实时有功功率不平衡信号。频率动态能实时反映功率不平衡，为电价提供即时信号，但当前市场未能有效利用这一信息。

Method: 将实时市场建模为动态价格发现过程，并将其与电网频率动态集成。从频率测量中推导出明确的价格形成机制，表现为每个发电机的分布式PID类控制器，频率响应由仅基于本地频率测量的电价驱动和补偿。

Result: 开发了集成的市场-频率动态模型，实现了直接从频率测量进行在线定价。该机制使频率响应能够通过本地频率测量得出的电价来驱动和获得补偿。

Conclusion: 通过集成市场动态与频率动态，实现了基于频率测量的实时电价机制，为电力系统频率响应提供了更快速、更有效的市场激励和补偿方案。

Abstract: Frequency dynamics in power systems reflect active power imbalance in real time, thereby providing an instantaneous signal to inform electricity pricing. However, existing real-time markets operate on much slower timescales and fail to exploit this signal. In this letter, we develop integrated market--frequency dynamics that enable online pricing directly from frequency measurements. Representing the real-time market as a dynamic price-discovery process, and integrating this process with the grid frequency dynamics, we derive an explicit price formation mechanism from frequency measurements. This mechanism manifests as a distributed PID-like controller for each generator, where frequency response is driven and remunerated by electricity prices derived solely from local frequency measurements.

</details>


### [190] [Agentic Application in Power Grid Static Analysis: Automatic Code Generation and Error Correction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09995)
*Qinjuan Wang,Shan Yang,Yongli Zhu*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 开发了一个LLM代理，将自然语言转换为MATPOWER脚本来自动化电网静态分析，通过三层纠错系统确保可靠性，达到82.38%的代码保真度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 电网静态分析通常需要专业知识编写MATPOWER脚本，过程复杂且容易出错。需要一种方法让非专家也能通过自然语言描述自动生成可靠的电网分析代码。

Method: 1. 使用DeepSeek-OCR构建增强的MATPOWER手册向量数据库；2. 设计三层纠错系统：静态预检查、动态反馈循环和语义验证器；3. 通过模型上下文协议实现异步执行和MATLAB自动调试。

Result: 系统在代码保真度方面达到82.38%的准确率，即使在复杂的分析任务中也能有效消除幻觉现象。

Conclusion: 该LLM代理框架成功实现了自然语言到MATPOWER脚本的可靠转换，为电网分析提供了高效、准确的自动化工具，显著降低了技术门槛。

Abstract: This paper introduces an LLM agent that automates power grid static analysis by converting natural language into MATPOWER scripts. The framework utilizes DeepSeek-OCR to build an enhanced vector database from MATPOWER manuals. To ensure reliability, it devises a three-tier error-correction system: a static pre-check, a dynamic feedback loop, and a semantic validator. Operating via the Model Context Protocol, the tool enables asynchronous execution and automatically debugging in MATLAB. Experimental results demonstrate that the system achieves a 82.38% accuracy regarding the code fidelity, effectively eliminating hallucinations even in complex analysis tasks.

</details>


### [191] [Natural Gradient Gaussian Approximation Filter with Positive Definiteness Guarantee](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10053)
*Tianyi Zhang,Wenhan Cao,Shengbo Eben Li*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文分析了NANO滤波器在自然梯度更新中可能发散的问题，发现后验协方差失去正定性是根本原因，并提出两种保证正定性的改进方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统贝叶斯滤波器使用线性化技术（如泰勒展开或随机线性回归）来应用卡尔曼滤波器结构，但在强非线性系统中可能导致较大误差。NANO滤波器通过将预测和更新步骤解释为两个优化问题来避免模型线性化误差，但其自然梯度更新可能因后验协方差失去正定性而发散。

Method: 提出两种改进方法：1）使用高斯-牛顿法近似对数似然Hessian矩阵，表示为归一化测量残差雅可比矩阵的自伴积，保证半正定性；2）将协方差更新重新表述为Cholesky因子的指数形式更新，并通过其Gram矩阵重构协方差，确保正定性。

Result: 在三个经典非线性系统上的实验表明，具有保证正定性的改进NANO滤波器优于卡尔曼滤波器家族的流行成员和原始NANO滤波器。

Conclusion: 通过分析NANO滤波器更新失败的根本原因，提出了两种保证后验协方差正定性的有效方法，显著提高了滤波器的稳定性和性能。

Abstract: Popular Bayes filters often apply linearization techniques, such as Taylor expansion or stochastic linear regression, to enable the use of the Kalman filter structure, but this can lead to large errors in strongly nonlinear systems. The recently proposed NANO filter addresses this issue by interpreting the prediction and update steps of Bayesian filtering as two distinct optimization problems and solving them through moment matching and natural gradient descent, thereby avoiding model linearization errors. However, the natural gradient update in NANO can occasionally diverge because the posterior covariance in its iteration may lose positive definiteness. Our analysis shows that the posterior covariance is the sum of the inverse prior covariance and the expected Hessian of the log-likelihood function, and that the indefiniteness of the latter term is the root cause of update failure. To address this issue, we propose two remedies. The first approximates the log-likelihood Hessian using the Gauss-Newton method, representing it as the self-adjoint product of the Jacobian of the normalized measurement residual, which is guaranteed to be positive semi-definite. The second reformulates the covariance update as an exponential-form update of the Cholesky factor and reconstructs the covariance via its Gram matrix, which ensures positive definiteness. Experiments on three classical nonlinear systems demonstrate that the proposed NANO filter with guaranteed positive definiteness outperforms popular members of the Kalman filter family and original NANO filter.

</details>


### [192] [Analysis and Enhancement of Incremental-Quantity-Based Distance Protection With Grid-Forming Inverters](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10129)
*Henrik Johansson,Qianli Xing,Nathaniel Taylor,Xiongfei Wang*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 该论文研究了电网形成逆变器对基于瞬时增量量的时域距离保护的影响，提出了分析模型和新的跳闸判据，以解决传统保护与非线性逆变器源之间的互操作性问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着电网中逆变器比例增加，传统基于相量的保护方案面临挑战。基于瞬时增量量的时域保护方案虽能处理非线性数据，但仍假设线性性，而电网形成逆变器在故障期间是非线性源，这导致互操作性问题。

Method: 提出了分析模型来研究电网形成逆变器对继电器测量的瞬时增量量的影响，使用PSCAD/EMTDC仿真验证模型，并研究时域基于瞬时增量量的距离保护与采用不同电流限制器的电网形成逆变器的互操作性。

Result: 时域基于瞬时增量量的距离保护在近区故障时比四边形距离保护具有更高的可靠性，在外部故障时可能更安全，但其设置难以针对不同源和故障进行通用化调整。

Conclusion: 基于观察到的互操作性问题，提出了可靠且安全的时域基于瞬时增量量的距离保护跳闸判据，该判据便于调整设置并适用于电网形成逆变器应用。

Abstract: Grid-forming (GFM) inverters are expected in future inverter-dominated grids. In such grids, time-domain protection schemes, for example those based on instantaneous incremental quantities (IQs), are being advocated as potential solutions to the challenges faced by traditional phasor-based protection schemes, due to their ability to process nonlinear data. However, IQ-based protection uses the superposition principle; thus, linearity is still assumed in their application, while GFM inverters are nonlinear sources during faults. This paper proposes an analytical model to study the impact of GFM inverters on the relay-measured IQs. The model is validated with PSCAD/EMTDC simulations, and is used to investigate the interoperability of time-domain IQ-based distance protection with GFM inverters employing different current limiters. Results show that time-domain IQ-based distance protection demonstrates superior dependability for close-in faults compared to that of quadrilateral distance protection with GFM inverters, and it has the possibility to be secure for external faults when quadrilateral distance protection overreaches; however, tuning of its settings is hard to generalize for various sources and faults. Taking the observed interoperability issues into account, a trip criterion for dependable and secure time-domain IQ-based distance protection is proposed, which facilitates easy-to-tune and general settings for applications with GFM inverters.

</details>


### [193] [Digital Control of Negative Imaginary Systems Using Discrete-Time Multi-HIGS: Application to a Dual-Stage MEMS Force Sensor](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10176)
*Kanghong Shi,Diyako Dadkhah,Ian R. Petersen,S. O. Reza Moheimani*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出一种基于离散时间混合积分器-增益系统(HIGS)控制器的多输入多输出负虚(NI)系统数字控制方法，证明了离散时间HIGS的NI特性，并应用于双级力传感器控制，有效抑制谐振同时保持良好相位特性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 针对多输入多输出负虚系统的数字控制需求，需要开发能够保持NI特性并有效抑制谐振的鲁棒非线性控制器，离散时间HIGS控制器为此提供了解决方案。

Method: 提出基于离散时间双模态和三模态HIGS控制器的数字控制方法，证明了这些离散时间HIGS及其并行组合（多HIGS）的NI特性，并将其应用于双输入双输出双级力传感器系统。

Result: 理论证明了离散时间HIGS的NI特性及其对线性NI系统的渐近稳定能力；实验验证了离散时间多HIGS控制器能有效抑制谐振模态，同时保持有利的相位特性。

Conclusion: 离散时间多HIGS控制器作为鲁棒非线性NI控制器，在NI系统的数字控制中具有良好潜力，能有效抑制谐振并保持相位特性，为多输入多输出NI系统控制提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: In this paper, we propose a digital control approach for multi-input multi-output negative imaginary (NI) systems using discrete-time hybrid integrator-gain systems (HIGS) controllers. We show the NI property of the bimodal and trimodal discrete-time HIGS, as well as the parallel combinations of them, which are referred to as the multi-HIGS. Also, we demonstrate that linear NI systems can be asymptotically stabilized using discrete-time HIGS in digital control. We apply discrete-time bimodal and trimodal multi-HIGS controllers to a two-input two-output dual-stage force sensor with lightly damped resonant modes. To validate the theoretical findings, the closed-loop performance is evaluated in both time and frequency domains. Experimental results show that the discrete-time multi-HIGS effectively suppresses resonances while preserving favorable phase characteristics, which highlights its potential as a robust nonlinear NI controller for the digital control of NI systems.

</details>


### [194] [Performance Enhancement of MVDC Aircraft Cables Using Micro-Multilayer Insulation Under Low-Pressure Conditions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10238)
*Saikat Chowdhury,Mona Ghassemi*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 微多层多功能绝缘结构在低压环境下显著提升中压直流航空电缆的局部放电起始电压和介电强度，相比传统单层绝缘性能更优且厚度减少90%


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为宽体全电动飞机开发中压直流电缆系统需要能在低压环境下可靠工作的绝缘技术。传统地下电缆绝缘设计用于大气条件，在低压下局部放电和介电性能会退化，限制了其在航空航天系统中的应用。

Method: 对传统单层挤出绝缘系统和微多层多功能电气绝缘架构进行受控实验比较，保持所有电缆组件相同仅改变绝缘结构。MMEI系统仅使用基线绝缘厚度的10%，在大气压和18.8 kPa低压条件下评估直流电压下的局部放电特性和介电强度。

Result: MMEI电缆在低压下表现出更高的局部放电起始电压，并能检测到局部放电熄灭电压，而传统电缆则不能。尽管厚度显著减少，MMEI系统的介电击穿强度大幅增加，在低压条件下能承受超过20 kV电压，而传统设计低于5 kV。

Conclusion: 绝缘结构而非厚度本身主导中压直流航空电缆的性能。MMEI系统有望实现更轻、更紧凑、更高性能的电缆设计，为未来电动航空平台提供支持。

Abstract: The development of medium-voltage direct current (MVDC) cable systems for wide-body all-electric aircraft (AEA) requires insulation technologies capable of operating reliably under reduced-pressure environments. Conventional underground cable insulation, designed for atmospheric conditions, exhibits degraded partial discharge (PD) and dielectric performance at low pressure, limiting its applicability to aerospace systems. This work presents a controlled experimental comparison between a conventional single-layer extruded insulation system and a micro-multilayer multifunctional electrical insulation (MMEI) architecture, in which all cable components are kept identical except for the insulation. The MMEI system is implemented with only 10% of the baseline insulation thickness to evaluate the effectiveness of insulation architecture in enhancing performance. PD characteristics and dielectric strength are experimentally evaluated under DC voltage at atmospheric pressure and 18.8 kPa. Results show that the MMEI-based cable exhibits higher PD inception voltage (PDIV) and maintains a detectable PD extinction voltage (PDEV) under reduced pressure, unlike the conventional cable. Furthermore, despite its significantly reduced thickness, the MMEI system demonstrates a substantial increase in dielectric breakdown strength, withstanding voltages exceeding 20 kV compared to below 5 kV for the conventional design under low-pressure conditions. These findings demonstrate that insulation architecture, rather than thickness alone, governs performance in MVDC aerospace cables. The results highlight the potential of MMEI systems to enable lighter, more compact, and higher-performance cable designs for future electrified aviation platforms.

</details>


### [195] [Stability and Robustness of Tensor-Coupled Flow-Conservation Dynamical Systems on Hypergraphs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10260)
*Chencheng Zhang,Hao Yang,Bin Jiang,Shaoxuan Cui*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 论文为非线性超图动力学建立了基于熵的稳定性与鲁棒性分析框架，针对具有守恒和流量平衡特性的系统，在张量广义细致平衡条件下证明了全局渐近稳定性，并揭示了谱间隙与系统鲁棒性之间的定量关系。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究缺乏对具有守恒和流量平衡特性的非线性超图动力学的统一稳定性与鲁棒性分析框架，特别是在考虑高阶（张量）节点相互作用时，需要建立能够同时处理稳定性和扰动敏感性的理论工具。

Method: 采用生成器形式的系统在单纯形上建模，利用状态依赖的转移率捕捉节点间的高阶张量相互作用。在张量广义细致平衡条件下，构建熵Lyapunov函数证明全局渐近稳定性，分析雅可比矩阵在单纯形切子空间上的谱性质，并推导平衡点对耦合张量扰动的一阶敏感性界。

Result: 系统存在唯一平衡点且具有全局渐近稳定性，雅可比矩阵在切子空间上是Hurwitz的，其谱间隙决定了指数收敛速率。建立了谱间隙与系统鲁棒性裕度之间的定量联系：更大的谱间隙意味着更小的平衡点偏移和更快的扰动恢复能力。

Conclusion: 提出的熵耗散框架统一了保守高阶网络系统的稳定性与鲁棒性分析，为非线性超图动力学提供了理论保证和实用工具，数值实验验证了理论预测的有效性。

Abstract: This paper develops an entropy-based stability and robustness framework for nonlinear hypergraph dynamics with conservation and flow balance. We consider generator-form systems on the simplex whose state-dependent transition rates capture higher-order (tensor) interactions among nodes. Under a tensor generalized detailed-balance (TGDB) condition, we show that the system admits a unique equilibrium and an entropy Lyapunov function ensuring global asymptotic stability. The Jacobian restricted to the tangent subspace of the simplex is Hurwitz, and its spectral gap determines the exponential convergence rate. Building on this structure, we derive first-order sensitivity bounds of the equilibrium under perturbations of the coupling tensor and establish a local input-to-state stability (ISS) estimate with respect to external inputs. The results reveal a quantitative link between the spectral gap and the system's robustness margin: larger spectral gaps imply smaller equilibrium shifts and faster recovery under structural or parametric perturbations. Numerical experiments on tensor-coupled flow models confirm the theoretical predictions and illustrate how the proposed entropy-dissipating framework unifies stability and robustness analysis for conservative higher-order network systems.

</details>


### [196] [Quantum Graph Neural Networks for Double-Sided Reconfigurable Intelligent Surface Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10453)
*Noha Hassan,Xavier Fernando,Halim Yanikomeroglu*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出量子图卷积网络(QGCN)框架，用于优化双面可重构智能表面(RIS)的物理和电磁响应，通过PIN二极管开关自适应激活/去激活元件，在量子处理器上实现计算复杂度和内存需求的降低。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 6G无线通信中，可重构智能表面(RIS)能灵活控制信号强度，但优化数百个元件计算成本高昂。需要克服这一挑战，同时考虑离散相位偏移和元件间耦合。

Method: 提出量子图卷积网络(QGCN)框架，联合优化双面RIS设计的物理和电磁响应。核心贡献是通过PIN二极管开关自适应激活或去激活元件，实现虚拟间距机制。解决多目标优化问题：在孔径长度和活动元件间互耦约束下最大化最小用户数据率。

Result: 在IBM Quantum的127量子比特ibm_kyiv超导处理器上的实验结果表明，QGCN算法相比现有方法降低了每次迭代的计算复杂度和内存需求。QGCN在等效图拓扑上比经典图神经网络(GNN)额外提升+0.38 bps/Hz，且随着阵列尺寸增大优势更明显。

Conclusion: 提出的量子图卷积网络框架能有效优化双面RIS设计，通过量子计算降低计算复杂度，在6G无线通信中具有实际应用价值，且性能随阵列规模扩大而增强。

Abstract: As a key enabler for sixth-generation (6G) wireless communications, reconfigurable intelligent surfaces (RISs) provide the flexibility to control signal strength. Nevertheless, optimizing hundreds of elements is computationally expensive. To overcome this challenge, we present a quantum framework (QGCN) to jointly optimize the physical and electromagnetic response of a double-sided RIS design that incorporates discrete phase shifts and inter-element coupling. The core contribution is the adaptive activation or deactivation of elements, allowing a virtual spacing mechanism using PIN diode switches. We then solve a multi-objective problem that maximizes the minimum user data rate subject to constraints on aperture length and mutual coupling between active elements. Experimental results on IBM Quantum's 127-qubit ibm_kyiv superconducting processor demonstrate that the proposed QGCN algorithm reduces both per-iteration computational complexity and memory requirements compared to existing approaches. Also, the QGCN outperforms classical graph neural networks (GNN) on an equivalent graph topology by an additional $+$0.38 bps/Hz. This advantage is increasing with increasing array sizes.

</details>


### [197] [Real-Time Coordinated Operation of Off-Grid Wind Powered Multi-Electrolyzer Systems Considering Thermal Dynamics and HTO Safety](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10565)
*Chang Su,Ming Li,Zhanglin Shangguan,Zhaojian Wang,Bo Yang*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出一种结合反馈优化与安全层的双层协调运行方法，用于多电解槽碱性水电解系统在波动可再生能源输入下的安全高效运行。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 碱性水电解系统在波动可再生能源输入下的协调运行面临挑战，包括功率可用性变化、动态安全约束，以及传统优化与控制分离可能导致跨时间尺度决策不一致的问题。

Method: 提出双层协调运行方法：反馈优化层生成实时参考输入以提高可再生能源利用率；基于投影的安全层修正这些输入以确保符合操作和安全约束。将离散时间控制屏障函数理论纳入安全层，专门处理AWE系统惯性动力学产生的安全约束。

Result: 理论分析证明了所提方法的可行性和有效性。基于年度风力发电数据的案例研究表明，该方法实现了高能源利用率，保持了安全运行，并展示了在线适用性、可扩展性和鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 该方法成功解决了多电解槽碱性水电解系统在波动可再生能源输入下的协调运行问题，通过整合反馈优化与安全层，实现了高效能源利用与安全运行的平衡。

Abstract: Coordinated operation of alkaline water electrolysis (AWE) systems with multiple electrolyzers under fluctuating renewable power input is challenging due to varying power availability and dynamic safety constraints. Moreover, the conventional separation between optimization and control may result in inconsistent decisions across timescales. To address these issues, this paper proposes a two-layer coordinated operation method integrating feedback optimization (FO) with a projection-based safety layer. The FO layer generates real-time reference inputs to improve renewable energy utilization, while the safety layer corrects these inputs to ensure compliance with operational and safety constraints. To explicitly address the safety constraints arising from the inertial dynamics of AWE systems, discrete-time control barrier function theory is incorporated into the safety layer, thereby enhancing safety assurance and online computational tractability. Theoretical analysis establishes the feasibility and effectiveness of the proposed method. Case studies based on annual wind generation data show that the proposed method achieves high energy utilization, maintains safe operation, and demonstrates online applicability, scalability, and robustness.

</details>


### [198] [Distributed Observers with Dynamic Event-Triggered Communication](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10596)
*Yiyang Liu,Xianwei Li,Shaoyuan Li*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出了一种动态事件触发分布式观测器，证明了其具有严格正的最小事件间隔时间，并确保估计误差指数收敛，同时构建了节点和边两种动态事件触发机制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
