Motivation: 研究线性时不变系统在事件触发通信下的分布式状态估计问题。动态事件触发机制能有效减少冗余通信，但对于分布式观测器，尚不清楚动态事件触发机制是否能确保正的最小事件间隔时间，这对实际应用至关重要。

Method: 提出动态事件触发分布式观测器，通过引入新的比较函数，证明该观测器能保证严格正的最小事件间隔时间。同时构建了节点和边两种动态事件触发机制，而现有工作大多只考虑节点级触发。

Result: 理论证明了动态事件触发分布式观测器能保证严格正的最小事件间隔时间，并确保估计误差指数收敛。数值仿真验证了所提方法的有效性。

Conclusion: 成功解决了动态事件触发机制在分布式观测器中确保正最小事件间隔时间的问题，扩展了事件触发机制的应用范围，为实际分布式估计系统提供了理论保障。

Abstract: This paper studies the problem of distributed state estimation of linear time-invariant (LTI) systems under event-triggered communication. For event-triggering mechanisms, the existence of positive minimum inter-event times (MIETs) is an essential property for ensuring practicality. It is widely recognized that dynamic event-triggering mechanisms can effectively reduce redundant communication. However, for distributed observers, it remains unclear whether dynamic event-triggering mechanisms can ensure positive MIETs. This paper proposes a dynamic event-triggered distributed observer. By introducing new comparison functions, it is proven that the dynamic event-triggered distributed observer can guarantee strictly positive MIETs and ensure the exponential convergence of the estimation error. Moreover, most existing works on event-triggered distributed observers only consider node-based event-triggering mechanisms, while both node-based and edge-based dynamic event-triggering mechanisms are constructed in this paper. Numerical examples are provided to illustrate the effectiveness of the proposed results.

</details>


### [199] [On the Optimization Landscape of Observer-based Dynamic Linear Quadratic Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10635)
*Jingliang Duan,Jie Li,Yinsong Ma,Liye Tang,Guofa Li,Liping Zhang,Shengbo Eben Li,Lin Zhao*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文研究了基于观测器的动态输出反馈LQR问题的优化景观，发现标准LQR控制器与最小化估计误差协方差迹的观测器组合通常不是整体闭环性能目标的驻点，并推导了表征驻点条件的离散时间Sylvester方程组。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 理解LQR问题的优化景观对于设计高效强化学习解决方案至关重要。现有研究在静态输出反馈和LQG控制方面取得了进展，但LQG分析通常依赖分离原理。然而当估计器和控制器参数的梯度本质耦合时，这种简化失效，需要更复杂的分析。

Method: 研究基于观测器的动态输出反馈LQR问题的优化景观。在瞬态二次性能不可忽略的设置下推导最优观测器-控制器对。分析标准LQR控制器与最小化估计误差协方差迹的观测器组合是否对应整体闭环性能目标的驻点。

Result: 发现标准LQR控制器与最小化估计误差协方差迹的观测器组合通常不是整体闭环性能目标的驻点。推导了一对具有对称结构的离散时间Sylvester方程，这两个方程涉及相同的矩阵元素集，共同表征了基于观测器的动态LQR问题的驻点。

Conclusion: 这些Sylvester方程为最优性条件的结构提供了分析洞察，并为开发旨在学习依赖重构状态信息的复杂控制器的数值策略梯度方法奠定了基础。研究揭示了在动态输出反馈设置中，控制器和估计器的联合优化需要超越传统分离原理的方法。

Abstract: Understanding the optimization landscape of linear quadratic regulation (LQR) problems is fundamental to the design of efficient reinforcement learning solutions. Recent work has made significant progress in characterizing the landscape of static output-feedback control and linear quadratic Gaussian (LQG) control. For LQG, much of the analysis leverages the separation principle, which allows the controller and estimator to be designed independently. However, this simplification breaks down when the gradients with respect to the estimator and controller parameters are inherently coupled, leading to a more intricate analysis. This paper investigates the optimization landscape of observer-based dynamic output-feedback control of LQR problems. We derive the optimal observer-controller pair in settings where transient quadratic performance cannot be neglected. Our analysis reveals that, in general, the combination of the standard LQR controller and the observer that minimizes the trace of the accumulated estimation error covariance does not correspond to a stationary point of the overall closed-loop performance objective. Moreover, we derive a pair of discrete-time Sylvester equations with symmetric structure, both involving the same set of matrix elements, that characterize the stationary point of the observer-based dynamic LQR problem. These equations offer analytical insight into the structure of the optimality conditions and provide a foundation for developing numerical policy gradient methods aimed at learning complex controllers that rely on reconstructed state information.

</details>


### [200] [Resilient and Effort-Optimal Controller Synthesis under Temporal Logic Specifications](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10680)
*Youssef Ait Si,Ratnangshu Das,Negar Monir,Sadegh Soudjani,Pushpak Jagtap,Adnane Saoud*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出两种度量：弹性（系统在满足时态逻辑规范下能承受的最大扰动）和努力（满足规范所需的最小输入边界），并研究两者权衡，为线性和非线性系统提供解决方案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有控制系统中，如何在满足时态逻辑规范的同时最大化系统对扰动的抵抗能力（弹性）并最小化控制输入（努力）是一个重要问题。需要量化系统在扰动下的性能并优化控制器设计。

Method: 将问题建模为鲁棒优化程序：1) 对于线性系统和线性控制器，针对时变多面体规范提供精确解；2) 对于非线性系统和非线性控制器，采用场景优化方法，提供概率保证和计算可行性。

Result: 提出了弹性度量和努力度量的数学框架，为线性系统提供精确解，为非线性系统提供概率保证的解决方案。通过案例研究验证了理论结果。

Conclusion: 本文建立了控制系统中弹性和努力度量的系统框架，为满足时态逻辑规范的控制设计提供了优化方法，平衡了系统抗扰动能力和控制成本。

Abstract: In this paper, we consider the notions of effort and resilience of a dynamical control system defined by the maximum disturbance the system can withstand while satisfying given finite temporal logic specifications. Given a dynamical system and a specification, the objective is to synthesize the controller such that the system satisfies the specification while maximizing its resilience, taking into account input constraints. In addition, we introduce a new metric, called the effort metric, which characterizes the minimal input bound necessary to satisfy a given specification for a perturbed system. The problem for both metrics is formulated as a robust optimization program where the objective is to compute the maximum resilience for the system with input constraints or the minimal effort while simultaneously synthesizing the corresponding controller parameters. Moreover, we study the trade-off between resilience and effort, where we seek to maximize resilience and minimize the control effort. For linear systems and linear controllers, exact solutions are provided for the class of time-varying polytopic specifications for the closed-loop and open-loop systems. For the case of nonlinear systems, nonlinear controllers, and more general specifications, we leverage tools from the scenario optimization approach, offering a probabilistic guarantee of the solution as well as computational feasibility. Different case studies are presented to illustrate the theoretical results.

</details>


### [201] [i-Tac: Inverse Design of 3D-Printed Tactile Elastomers with Scalable and Tunable Optical and Mechanical Properties](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10692)
*Wen Fan,Dandan Zhang*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: i-Tac是一个用于定制3D打印触觉弹性体的逆向设计框架，通过多材料混合设计和响应面模型，实现目标光学和机械性能的单次迭代制造。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统弹性体设计采用正向试错优化过程，从材料制备到性能评估效率低下，且性能可扩展性和目标可调性有限。视觉触觉传感器需要不同的光学和机械特性，特别是透明度和硬度。

Method: 采用多材料PolyJet增材制造技术，结合三种互补树脂。使用混合设计方法表征打印弹性体，建立响应面模型将材料成分映射到功能特性。基于用户定义目标，进行基于期望函数的多目标优化，识别可行成分区域并推导最佳制造操作窗口。

Result: 实验验证了i-Tac框架在性能可扩展性和逆向设计性能方面的有效性，能够有效定制弹性体透明度和硬度，同时减少传统正向设计的迭代负担。通过制造商业和定制设计的物理传感器样品，展示了逆向设计、整体制造弹性体在可定制VBTS制造中的潜力。

Conclusion: i-Tac框架通过逆向设计方法实现了触觉弹性体的高效定制制造，为视觉触觉传感器的可定制化制造提供了新途径，显著提高了设计效率和目标可调性。

Abstract: Elastomers are central to vision-based tactile sensors (VBTSs), where they transduce external contact into observable deformation. Different VBTS architectures, however, require distinct optical and mechanical properties, particularly transparency and hardness. Conventional elastomer design relies on a forward, trial-and-error optimisation process from material preparation to property evaluation, which is inefficient and offers limited property scalability and target tunability.
  In this work, we present i-Tac, an inverse design pipeline for tailoring 3D-printed tactile elastomers with target optical and mechanical properties. Inspired by the composite structure of the human dermis, i-Tac exploits multi-material PolyJet additive manufacturing with three complementary resins. A mixture design methodology is employed to characterise the printed elastomers and establish response surface models (ReSMs) that map material compositions to functional properties, thereby defining a scalable property space. Based on user-defined targets, a desirability-function-based multi-objective optimisation is then performed to identify feasible composition regions and derive an optimal operating window for fabrication. This enables elastomers with desired properties to be manufactured in a single iteration, thereby achieving efficient target tunability.
  Experimental results validate the proposed i-Tac framework in terms of both property scalability and inverse design performance, showing that i-Tac can effectively tailor elastomer transparency and hardness while reducing the iterative burden of conventional forward design. By fabricating physical sensor samples from both commercial and custom designs, the proposed framework further demonstrates the potential of inverse-designed, monolithically manufactured elastomers for customisable VBTS fabrication.

</details>


### [202] [Motion planning and approximate controllability of a moving cantilever beam with a tip-mass](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10750)
*Soham Chatterjee,Aman Batra,Vivek Natarajan*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 研究非均匀欧拉-伯努利梁的运动规划与近似能控性，梁一端有尖端质量，另一端为可移动的悬臂接头，通过移动接头位置控制梁的动态


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究具有尖端质量和可移动悬臂接头的非均匀欧拉-伯努利梁的运动规划问题，该模型由耦合的PDE-ODE方程描述，边界输入控制，需要解决从初始状态到目标状态在指定时间内的转移问题，并建立模型的近似能控性

Method: 采用生成函数方法扩展平坦性控制理论到梁模型，证明当初始和最终状态属于特定集合时转移可行，该集合包含梁模型的稳态和所有特征函数，特征函数构成状态空间的Riesz基

Result: 证明了当初始和最终状态属于包含稳态和特征函数的特定集合时，梁模型的运动规划可行；建立了该集合包含所有特征函数，这些函数构成状态空间的Riesz基，从而证明了梁模型在所有时间区间上的近似能控性

Conclusion: 通过生成函数和平坦性控制方法成功解决了非均匀欧拉-伯努利梁的运动规划问题，建立了模型的近似能控性，并通过仿真和实验验证了理论结果

Abstract: Consider a non-uniform Euler-Bernoulli beam with a tip-mass at one end and a cantilever joint at the other end. The cantilever joint is not fixed and can itself be moved along an axis perpendicular to the beam. The position of the cantilever joint is the control input to the beam. The dynamics of the beam is governed by a coupled PDE-ODE model with boundary input. On a natural state-space, there exists a unique state trajectory for this beam model for every initial state and each twice continuously differentiable control input which is compatible with the initial state. In this paper, we study the motion planning problem of transferring the beam model from an initial state to a final state over a prescribed time-interval and then employ the results obtained to establish the approximate controllability of this model. We address these problems by extending and applying the generating functions approach to flatness-based control to the beam model. We prove that the transfer described above is feasible if the initial and final states belong to a certain set, which also contains the steady-states of the beam model. We then establish that this set contains all the eigenfunctions of the beam model, which form a Riesz basis for the state-space, and thereby conclude the approximate controllability of the beam model over all time intervals. We illustrate our theoretical results on motion planning using simulations and experiments.

</details>


### [203] [Workload composition smooths aggregate power demand while sustaining short-horizon ramps in AI data centers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10769)
*Subir Majumder,Minlan Yu,Le Xie*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: AI数据中心在共享GPU系统中，批处理和推理工作负载的组成会解耦总功率波动与短期爬坡需求，形成U形波动和驼峰形爬坡模式


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AI快速发展导致电力需求激增，但AI数据中心面向电网的功率动态特性尚未被充分理解，需要研究不同工作负载组成对电网影响

Method: 使用基于轨迹校准的框架，将工作负载到达、排队、调度和GPU功率联系起来，分析共享GPU系统中批处理和推理工作负载混合对功率动态的影响

Result: 随着推理工作负载比例增加，总功率波动呈U形变化，而短期爬坡需求呈驼峰形变化；在中等工作负载混合时，排队的批处理工作可以填补推理需求波动留下的空闲容量，降低总功率波动

Conclusion: AI数据中心应被视为动态系统，其工作负载组成决定了电网影响；推理侧的波动更直接地转化为实际功率，导致短期爬坡需求保持较高水平

Abstract: Artificial intelligence (AI) is driving rapid growth in electricity demand, yet the grid-facing power dynamics of AI data centers remain poorly understood. Here we show that, in shared-GPU systems, the composition of batch and inference workloads decouples aggregate power variability from short-horizon ramping. As the inference share rises, variability becomes U-shaped, whereas ramping becomes hump-shaped, particularly under higher loading. The magnitude and turning points of these patterns also depend on system loading. Using a trace-calibrated framework linking workload arrivals, queueing, scheduling, and GPU power, we show that the underlying mechanism is asymmetric. At intermediate workload mixes, queued batch jobs fill capacity left idle by fluctuating inference demand, reducing aggregate power variability. However, short-horizon ramping remains elevated because inference-side fluctuations propagate more directly into realized power. AI data centers should therefore be understood as dynamic systems whose workload composition shapes their grid impact.

</details>


### [204] [Optimization Under Uncertainty for Energy Infrastructure Planning: A Synthesis of Methods, Tools, and Open Challenges](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10795)
*Rahman Khorramfar,Aron Brenner,Lara Booth,Ana Rivera,Ruaridh Macdonald,Priya Donti,Saurabh Amin*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文综述了能源基础设施规划在不确定性下的最新进展，重点关注发电与输电扩展规划、不确定性优化方法，并探讨了优化与机器学习交叉领域的新方向。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 电气化、能源载体互依性、脱碳和极端天气事件使能源基础设施规划日益复杂，需要更先进的不确定性优化方法来支持长期投资决策。

Method: 采用文献综述方法，系统调研发电与输电扩展规划领域的最新进展，重点关注随机规划、鲁棒优化和分布鲁棒优化等方法，并沿建模保真度、不确定性表征和求解方法三个维度进行分类分析。

Result: 识别了主导建模特征和研究空白，探讨了优化与机器学习交叉领域的新兴方向，包括代理建模、不确定性集学习、概率预测和合成场景生成等方法。

Conclusion: 能源基础设施规划需要整合先进的不确定性优化方法和机器学习技术，以应对日益复杂的决策环境，未来研究应关注将这些工具嵌入基础设施规划模型中。

Abstract: Energy infrastructure planning under uncertainty has become increasingly complex as electrification, interdependence between energy carriers, decarbonization, and extreme weather events reshape long-term investment decisions. This paper surveys recent advances at the intersection of generation and transmission expansion, and optimization under uncertainty, with a focus on stochastic programming, robust optimization, and distributionally robust optimization. We then categorize modeling needs along the axes of modeling fidelity, uncertainty characterization, and solution methods to identify dominant modeling features and trace research gaps. We further examine emerging directions at the interface of optimization and machine learning, including surrogate modeling, learning uncertainty sets, probabilistic forecasting, and synthetic scenarios, and discuss how these tools can be embedded within infrastructure planning models.

</details>


### [205] [A Control-Referenced Tri-Channel OECT Receiver for Hybrid Molecular Communication Toward Brain Organoid Interfaces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10798)
*Hongbin Ni,Ozgur B. Akan*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种用于脑类器官界面的三通道有机电化学晶体管接收器，通过控制参考像素减少漂移，评估了多种检测方案，发现控制参考主要改善混合检测器的振幅分支性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 脑类器官界面需要能够读取神经递质信号的化学接收器，这些接收器需要具备分子特异性和对漂移的耐受性。现有技术在处理基线漂移和低频波动方面存在挑战。

Method: 设计了控制参考的三通道有机电化学晶体管接收器，包含多巴胺和血清素选择性像素以及水凝胶匹配的控制像素。通过蒙特卡洛模拟耦合了有限持续时间释放、受限扩散清除、适配体结合、OECT转导和相关噪声，评估了MoSK、CSK-4和2位混合检测器。

Result: 在45微米距离下，控制参考主要改善混合检测器的振幅分支，将SER从3.71×10⁻²降低到1.09×10⁻²。在无ISI前端基准测试中，Hybrid+CTRL在45微米处达到11866分子/符号的检测限，并在中长距离范围内优于CSK-4+CTRL。

Conclusion: 研究提供了基于场景的接收器性能预测，但更可转移的结果是确定了匹配控制参考在何时对混合振幅解码有益的制度依赖规则，为脑类器官界面的化学接收器设计提供了理论指导。

Abstract: Brain organoid interfaces that seek neuromodulator readout benefit from chemical receivers with molecular specificity and tolerance to drift. This paper presents a receiver-centric theoretical study of a control-referenced tri-channel organic electrochemical transistor (OECT) receiver with dopamine- and serotonin-selective pixels alongside a hydrogel-matched control pixel. The Ag/AgCl electrode provides the electrochemical gate reference, whereas the control pixel is used only as a matched reference for common-mode drift and other low-frequency baseline fluctuations during amplitude decisions. We couple finite-duration release, restricted diffusion with clearance, aptamer binding, OECT transduction, and correlated thermal, flicker, and drift noise, and we evaluate MoSK, CSK-4, and a 2-bit Hybrid detector on the same front-end by Monte Carlo simulation. At $r=45$ micrometers, control referencing mainly benefits the Hybrid amplitude branch, reducing Hybrid SER from $3.71\times 10^{-2}$ to $1.09\times 10^{-2}$ at $N_m=1.40\times 10^4$ molecules/symbol while barely changing the MoSK component. In calibrated no-ISI front-end benchmarks, Hybrid+CTRL reaches an LoD of 11866 molecules/symbol at 45 micrometers and remains below CSK-4+CTRL over much of the medium-to-long-distance range studied. The reported SER and LoD values are scenario-based receiver forecasts, whereas the more transferable result is the regime-dependent rule for when matched control referencing benefits Hybrid amplitude decoding.

</details>


### [206] [System Identification of Lithium-Ion Battery Equivalent Circuit Models Using Ensemble Kalman Inversion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10813)
*Farzaneh Barat,Sara Wilson,Huijeong Kim,Huazhen Fang*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 使用集成卡尔曼反演方法进行锂离子电池系统辨识，通过蒙特卡洛采样与卡尔曼更新相结合，实现了对非线性多物理耦合电池模型的准确参数估计


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 锂离子电池系统辨识面临挑战，因为许多模型具有非线性、多物理耦合特性且参数众多。传统方法难以有效处理这些复杂特性。

Method: 采用集成卡尔曼反演方法，通过连续局部高斯近似进行最大后验参数估计，结合蒙特卡洛采样和卡尔曼型更新来演化样本集合，处理强非线性模型。

Result: 在具有耦合电热动力学的两种等效电路模型上验证，通过仿真和实验证明该方法能够实现准确的参数估计，具有快速的迭代收敛性。

Conclusion: 集成卡尔曼反演方法为锂离子电池系统辨识提供了有效解决方案，显示出应用于其他电池模型的强大潜力。

Abstract: System identification remains an intriguing challenge for lithium-ion batteries, as many models are nonlinear, exhibit multi-physics coupling, and involve a large number of parameters. In this paper, we address this challenge using the ensemble Kalman inversion (EnKI) method for battery system identification. EnKI performs maximum a posteriori parameter estimation through successive local Gaussian approximations, enabling an iterative and incremental search for unknown parameters. The search combines Monte Carlo sampling with Kalman-type updates to evolve an ensemble of samples, thereby offering empirical stability and the ability to handle strongly nonlinear models. We validate the proposed approach on two equivalent circuit models with coupled electro-thermal dynamics, through both simulation and experiments. The results demonstrate that the proposed approach achieves accurate parameter estimation with rapid iterative convergence, and it shows strong potential for application to other battery models.

</details>


### [207] [PFAgent: A Tractable and Self-Evolving Power-Flow Agent for Interactive Grid Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10846)
*Buxin She,Brian Chen,Luanzheng Guo,Fangxing Li*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: PFAgent是一个可追踪、自演化的电力潮流代理，用于自动化电力系统仿真工作流，通过意图解析、知识检索、工具执行和结构化报告实现交互式电网分析。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 电力系统仿真工作流仍然需要专家参与，工程师需要将研究意图转化为代码或API调用、执行分析并解释输出，这个过程专家密集且效率低下。

Method: PFAgent集成了四个关键能力：1）可追踪的交互式架构（意图解析、知识检索、工具执行、结构化报告）；2）自演化机制（验证驱动细化和人在回路反馈）；3）AI辅助评估调试循环（利用对话上下文、生成代码和执行错误进行迭代修复）；4）评估框架（任务成功率、收敛有效性、数值一致性和解释质量）。

Result: 在IEEE基准系统上的验证表明，PFAgent能够自动化案例变更、分析电压违规、执行N-1事故分析、生成图表和简洁摘要，并返回可重复的结果和透明的执行日志。

Conclusion: 该框架标志着从传统仿真工具向交互式、可追踪和自演化代理的转变，为电力系统分析提供了新的范式。

Abstract: Power system simulation workflows remain expert-intensive. Engineers must translate study intents into code or API calls, execute analyses, and interpret outputs. To automate this workflow, this paper presents PFAgent, a tractable and self-evolving power-flow agent for interactive grid analysis. PFAgent integrates four key capabilities: i) a tractable and interactive architecture for intent parsing, knowledge retrieval, tool execution, and structured reporting; ii) a self-evolution mechanism combining verification-driven refinement and human-in-the-loop feedback; iii) an AI-assisted evaluation and debugging loop that leverages conversational context, generated code, and execution errors for iterative fixing; and iv) an evaluation framework covering task success, convergence validity, numerical consistency, and explanation quality. Verification on IEEE benchmark systems shows that PFAgent can automate case change, analyze voltage violations, perform N-1 contingency analysis, generate plots and concise summaries, and return reproducible results with transparent execution logs. The proposed framework highlights a shift from conventional simulation tools to interactive, tractable, and self-evolving agents for power system analysis.

</details>


### [208] [Tensor-based Multi-layer Decoupling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10858)
*Joppe De Jonghe,Konstantin Usevich,Philippe Dreesen,Mariya Ishteva*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出基于ParaTuck型张量分解的多层解耦框架，通过约束优化和双层次优化平衡一阶与零阶信息，应用于系统辨识和神经网络压缩


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多变量函数的解耦是学习多变量输入输出关系的强大建模范式，但现有方法主要针对单层情况，多层解耦问题尚未充分探索

Method: 基于ParaTuck型张量分解和约束优化的张量框架，提出结构化耦合矩阵-张量分解，结合雅可比矩阵和函数评估，采用双层次优化自适应平衡一阶和零阶信息

Result: 在合成系统、非线性系统辨识基准和神经网络压缩任务上验证了所提方法的可行性

Conclusion: 提出的张量框架为多层解耦问题提供了有效的解决方案，通过理论分析和实验验证展示了其在系统建模和神经网络压缩中的应用潜力

Abstract: The decoupling of multivariate functions is a powerful modeling paradigm for learning multivariate input-output relations from data. For the single-layer case, established CPD-based methods are available, but the multi-layer case remained largely unexplored. This work introduces a tensor-based framework for multi-layer decoupling, which is based on ParaTuck-type tensor decompositions and constrained optimization. We provide theoretical justification behind the considered tensor decompositions and parameterizations. Furthermore, we formulate a structured coupled matrix-tensor factorization that incorporates both Jacobian and function evaluations, together with a bilevel optimization approach for adaptively balancing first- and zeroth-order information. The feasibility of the proposed methodology is illustrated on synthetic systems, a nonlinear system identification benchmark and neural network compression.

</details>


### [209] [Generative Design for Direct-to-Chip Liquid Cooling for Data Centers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10941)
*Zheng Liu*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种生成式设计框架，用于优化NVIDIA GB200 Grace Blackwell Superchip的液冷通道几何形状，通过结合物理热模型和约束反应扩散过程，显著提升了冷却性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AI工作负载快速增长导致数据中心功率密度增加，需要先进的散热管理。现有的直接芯片液冷通道布局大多基于启发式设计，未能针对现代异构封装中高度不均匀的温度分布进行优化。

Method: 提出生成式设计框架：1) 使用基于物理的有限差分热模型进行快速稳态温度预测；2) 将空间热反馈提供给约束反应扩散过程，生成满足入口/出口和组件约束的新型通道拓扑；3) 在闭环中迭代通道生成和热评估。

Result: 相比基线平行通道设计，生成的通道实现了平均温度降低超过5°C，最高温度降低超过35°C，有效抑制了热点形成。

Conclusion: 将生成式算法与轻量级物理建模相结合，可以显著提升直接芯片液冷性能，支持AI计算更可持续的扩展。

Abstract: Rapid growth in artificial intelligence (AI) workloads is driving up data center power densities, increasing the need for advanced thermal management. Direct-to-chip liquid cooling can remove heat efficiently at the source, but many cold plate channel layouts remain heuristic and are not optimized for the strongly non-uniform temperature distribution of modern heterogeneous packages. This work presents a generative design framework for synthesizing cooling channel geometries for the NVIDIA GB200 Grace Blackwell Superchip. A physics-based finite-difference thermal model provides rapid steady-state temperature predictions and supplies spatial thermal feedback to a constrained reaction-diffusion process that generates novel channel topologies while enforcing inlet/outlet and component constraints. By iterating channel generation and thermal evaluation in a closed loop, the method naturally redistributes cooling capacity toward high-power regions and suppresses hot-spot formation. Compared with a baseline parallel channel design, the resulting channels achieve more than a 5 degree Celsius reduction in average temperature and over 35 degree Celsius reduction in maximum temperature. Overall, the results demonstrate that coupling generative algorithms with lightweight physics-based modeling can significantly enhance direct-to-chip liquid cooling performance, supporting more sustainable scaling of AI computing.

</details>


### [210] [On Switched Event-triggered Full State-constrained Formation Control for Multi-vehicle Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10993)
*Zihan Li,Ziming Wang,Xin Wang*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种用于自动驾驶车辆编队控制的切换事件触发控制框架，解决了状态约束边界处的控制奇异性和通信负担问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 车辆编队控制在智能交通系统中很重要，但实际应用中需要满足多种状态约束（如车间距和车速）。当系统状态接近约束边界时，现有方法会出现控制奇异性和过大控制力，限制了实际应用。

Method: 1. 引入平滑非线性映射将约束状态空间转换为无约束空间，避免边界奇异；2. 使用RBF神经网络在线逼近未知非线性动态；3. 基于反步法构建自适应控制器；4. 设计切换事件触发机制（SETM），在瞬态阶段增加控制更新频率，在稳态阶段减少通信负担。

Result: Lyapunov分析证明闭环系统中所有信号一致有界且排除了Zeno行为。仿真结果表明，该方法在规定的状态约束下实现了稳定的编队形成，同时显著减少了通信更新。

Conclusion: 提出的切换事件触发控制框架有效解决了车辆编队控制中的状态约束问题，避免了控制奇异性和过大控制力，同时通过智能的事件触发机制平衡了控制性能和通信效率。

Abstract: Vehicular formation control is an important component of intelligent transportation systems (ITSs). In practical implementations, the controller design needs to satisfy multiple state constraints, including inter-vehicle spacing and vehicle speed. When system states approach the constraint boundaries, control singularity and excessive control effort may arise, which limits the practical applicability of existing methods. To address this problem, this paper investigates a class of nonlinear vehicular formation systems for autonomous vehicles (AVs) with uncertain dynamics and develops a switched event-triggered control framework. A smooth nonlinear mapping is first introduced to transform the constrained state space into an unconstrained one, thereby avoiding singularity near the constraint boundaries. A radial basis function neural network (RBFNN) is then employed to approximate the unknown nonlinear dynamics online, based on which an adaptive controller is constructed via the backstepping technique. In addition, a switched event-triggered mechanism (SETM) is designed to increase the control update frequency during the transient stage and reduce the communication burden during the steady-state stage. Lyapunov-based analysis proves that all signals in the closed-loop system remain uniformly bounded and that Zeno behavior is excluded. Simulation results verify that the proposed method achieves stable platoon formation under prescribed state constraints while significantly reducing communication updates.

</details>


### [211] [A Two-Stage Optimization Framework for Validating Electric Vehicle Charging Infrastructure under Grid Constraints](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10997)
*Biswarup Mukherjee*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出两阶段优化框架，评估成本最优的电动汽车充电基础设施在配电网约束下是否有效运行，揭示成本最优规划与系统性能间的权衡关系。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究动机是评估成本最优的电动汽车充电基础设施规划在实际配电网约束下的运行效果，探究单纯成本最优规划是否足以保证系统性能。

Method: 采用两阶段优化框架，通过一致的优化潮流（OPF）公式将基础设施规划与电网约束下的充电运行联系起来，构建混合整数规划（MIP）模型，包含快充、慢充、单端口和多端口等异构充电技术。

Result: 结果显示成本最优性与服务性能存在根本权衡：最小化资本投资的基础设施配置倾向于空间集中充电资源，导致较低充电状态和较高未满足能源需求；而均匀分布相同基础设施可显著改善充电空间可用性和运行性能，减少高达74%的能源短缺。

Conclusion: 成本最优规划本身不足以保证满意的系统性能，有效的电动汽车充电基础设施设计必须同时考虑成本最优性、充电资源的空间分布和电网约束，电池容量的敏感性分析进一步突显基础设施需求的非线性扩展特性。

Abstract: This paper proposes a two-stage optimization framework to evaluate whether cost-optimal electric vehicle (EV) charging infrastructure translates into effective operation under distribution grid constraints. The proposed approach explicitly links infrastructure planning with grid-constrained charging operation through a consistent optimal power flow (OPF) formulation applied in both stages. The framework is formulated as a mixed-integer program (MIP) and evaluated across different fleet sizes, demonstrating its scalability and applicability to realistic planning scenarios. The model incorporates heterogeneous charging technologies, including fast and slow chargers with both single-port and multi-port configurations. The results show a fundamental trade-off between cost optimality and service performance. Infrastructure configurations that minimize capital investment tend to spatially concentrate charging resources, resulting in lower achieved state-of-charge (SOC) and higher unmet energy demand. In contrast, uniformly distributed deployments of the same infrastructure significantly improve the spatial availability of charging and operational performance, reducing energy shortfall by up to 74%. Our findings reveal that cost-optimal planning alone is insufficient to guarantee satisfactory system performance. Effective EV charging infrastructure design must jointly consider cost optimality, spatial distribution of charging resources, and grid constraints. Sensitivity analysis with respect to battery capacity further highlights the nonlinear scaling of infrastructure requirements.

</details>


### [212] [Strategic Spatial Load Shifting and Market Efficiency](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10998)
*Aron Brenner,Deepjyoti Deka,Line Roald,Saurabh Amin*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 大型数据中心等空间灵活用电负荷可通过跨区域转移需求影响电力市场调度和价格。研究表明，追求成本最小化的分散式负荷转移不一定与系统运行成本最小化一致，特别是在最优潮流运行边界处，可能导致效率损失。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统观点认为灵活负荷能提高电力系统效率，但这通常基于价格接受行为假设。本文研究价格预期型空间负荷转移策略，探讨大型灵活消费者作为Stackelberg领导者与市场互动的实际效果。

Method: 建立Stackelberg博弈模型，将大型灵活消费者作为领导者与基于DC最优潮流（DC-OPF）的市场出清机制互动。在73节点RTS-GMLC测试系统上评估战略负荷转移效果。

Result: 在大多数时段系统运行成本降低，但在部分情况下存在不匹配现象，主要由最优潮流运行边界处的再调度引起。这些结果主要是再分配性质的，降低了发电商利润，同时降低了灵活和非灵活消费者的购电成本，即使在系统总运行成本增加的情况下也是如此。

Conclusion: 分散式、成本最小化的负荷转移不一定与系统运行成本最小化一致，特别是在最优潮流运行边界处。战略负荷转移主要产生再分配效应，而非效率改进，这对电力市场设计和监管有重要启示。

Abstract: Large, spatially flexible electricity consumers such as data centers can reallocate demand across locations, influencing dispatch and prices in wholesale electricity markets. While flexible load is often assumed to improve system efficiency, this intuition typically relies on price-taking behavior. We study price-anticipatory spatial load shifting by modeling a large flexible consumer as a Stackelberg leader interacting with DC optimal power flow (DC-OPF) based market clearing. We show that decentralized, cost-minimizing load shifting need not align with system operating cost minimization, and that misalignment arises at boundaries between DC-OPF operating regimes, where small changes in load can induce discrete changes in marginal generators or congestion patterns. We evaluate strategic load shifting on the 73-bus RTS-GMLC test system, where findings indicate reductions in system operating cost in most hours, but misalignment in a subset of cases that are driven by redispatch at merit-order discontinuities. We find that these outcomes are primarily redistributive relative to a price-taking benchmark, reducing generator profits while lowering electricity procurement costs for both flexible and inflexible consumers, even in cases where total system operating costs increase.

</details>


### [213] [Contouring Error Bounded Control for Biaxial Systems with Structural Flexibility and Input Delay](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11018)
*Meng Yuan,Tianyou Chai*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出一种针对双轴机床的新型控制策略，通过模型预测控制处理位置依赖柔性和输入延迟，确保末端执行器在轮廓误差边界内精确跟踪任意形状曲线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 工业加工中（如激光/水刀切割）的精密轮廓控制对产品质量至关重要，但现有方法难以处理双轴机床中的位置依赖柔性、机械振动和输入延迟等复杂动态特性。

Method: 引入高保真模型捕捉旋转动力学和机械振动，显式考虑输入延迟并扩展系统状态，基于模型预测控制设计控制器，使系统状态保持在由参考模型和切换线性时不变控制导向模型定义的鲁棒控制不变集中。

Result: 在具有离散化和输入延迟的实验环境中验证了算法有效性，结果显示在性能退化环境下，所提方法能以较低的调试工作量实现有界轮廓误差。

Conclusion: 提出的控制策略能够处理双轴机床中的位置依赖柔性和输入延迟，实现对任意形状曲线的高精度轮廓跟踪，在工业应用中具有实用价值。

Abstract: Precision contouring control is crucial in industrial machining processes, particularly for applications such as laser and water jet cutting, where contouring accuracy directly determines product quality. This paper presents a novel control strategy for biaxial machines featuring position-dependent flexibility and input delays, ensuring that the end-effector accurately traverses the desired contour within specified contouring error bounds and system constraints. To capture the rotation dynamics for systems with mechanical vibration, we introduce a high-fidelity model and explicitly consider the input delay with augmented system states. The controller design is based on the model predictive control scheme to enforce system states staying in robust control invariant sets defined by the reference model and switched linear time-invariant control-oriented models. The proposed algorithm is not restricted to a specific shape of the curve that is being traversed. The effectiveness of the proposed control algorithm is demonstrated in an experimental environment with discretizations and input delay. The results show that a bounded contouring error can be achieved by the proposed method in a performance degradation environment with a low commissioning effort.

</details>


### [214] [Data-Driven Global Stabilization of Unknown Infinite Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11024)
*Mahdieh Zaker,Andrii Mironchenko,Amy Nejati,Abolfazl Lavaei*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出一种直接数据驱动框架，用于具有未知非线性多项式子系统的无限网络，通过构建数据驱动的ISS李雅普诺夫函数和控制器，结合组合小增益框架确保整个无限网络的UGAS稳定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 处理无限网络的控制问题面临两大挑战：1）子系统非线性且参数未知；2）高维性带来的可扩展性问题。传统基于模型的方法难以应对这些挑战，需要开发数据驱动方法。

Method: 1）为每个未知子系统使用噪声污染的单组输入-状态轨迹数据构建数据驱动的ISS李雅普诺夫函数和控制器；2）利用无限维空间的组合小增益框架，将这些子系统级结果组合成全局控制李雅普诺夫函数和控制器。

Result: 该方法在三个案例研究中得到验证：无限航天器网络、Lorenz混沌系统网络，以及具有状态依赖控制输入矩阵的学术示例，均成功实现了整个无限网络的UGAS稳定性。

Conclusion: 提出了一种可扩展的数据驱动控制框架，能够处理具有未知非线性多项式子系统的无限网络，通过组合小增益方法确保全局稳定性，为大规模网络控制提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: This paper develops a direct data-driven framework for infinite networks with unknown nonlinear polynomial subsystems, enabling the synthesis of controllers that ensure the entire network is uniformly globally asymptotically stable (UGAS). To address scalability challenges arising from high dimensionality, we develop a data-driven approach to construct an input-to-state stable (ISS) Lyapunov function and its corresponding controller for each unknown subsystem using only a single set of noise-corrupted input-state trajectories collected from that subsystem. Once each subsystem admits a data-driven ISS Lyapunov function, we leverage a compositional small-gain framework for infinite-dimensional spaces to construct a global control Lyapunov function and its associated controller, thereby ensuring UGAS of the entire infinite network. The effectiveness of the proposed data-driven approach is demonstrated through three case studies, including infinite networks of spacecraft, Lorenz chaotic systems, and an academic example with a state-dependent control input matrix.

</details>


### [215] [An Argument-Principle Based Stability Assessment Method for Grey-Box DFIG Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11073)
*Tao Zhang,Zhiguo Hao,Songhao Yang,Hongyue Ma,Baohui Zhang*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出一种基于幅角原理的稳定性评估方法，用于分析灰盒双馈感应发电机系统的稳定性，无需详细系统模型


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 双馈感应发电机系统由于商业保密性和频率耦合特性，成为难以进行稳定性分析的灰盒MIMO系统，需要开发无需详细模型的分析方法

Method: 使用频率扫描技术获取黑盒设备的MIMO模型和系统返回差矩阵的行列式，提出基于行列式轨迹的稳定性判据，并开发基于轨迹信息的临界极点估计方法

Result: 仿真和硬件在环实验结果表明所提方法的有效性，并对模型选择、估计误差和应用潜力等问题进行了深入分析

Conclusion: 该方法为灰盒MIMO系统的稳定性分析提供了一种有效工具，无需详细系统模型即可评估系统稳定性和主导模式

Abstract: Considerable efforts have been made to analyze the small-signal stability of doubly fed induction generator (DFIG) systems. However, commercial confidentiality and frequency coupling make the DFIG system a grey-box multiple-input-multiple-output (MIMO) system with highly challenging stability analysis. This paper proposes an Argument-principle based stability assessment method to analyze the stability of the grey-box DFIG system. The frequency sweeping technique is first used to acquire the MIMO model of the black-box device, as well as the determinant of the system's return difference matrix. Then a stability criterion based on the determinant trajectory is presented. This criterion applies to the stability analysis of grey-box MIMO systems without detailed system models. Further, acritical-pole estimation method with trajectory information is developed to assess the dominant mode of the target system. The simulation and hardware-in-loop experiment results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method. Finally, some concerns about this method, such as model selection, estimation errors and application potential, are thoroughly analyzed and clarified.

</details>


### [216] [Block Diagram Analysis of a Design Principle for Amplitude-Frequency Profiles in Biological Oscillations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11108)
*Sidhanta Mohanty,Shaunak Sen*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 论文提出了一种块图建模框架来分析生物振荡器的设计原则，揭示了正负反馈强度对振荡存在的约束条件


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生物振荡器设计原则分为固定频率可变振幅和固定振幅可变频率两类，但由于非线性和反馈的复杂性，现有分析主要依赖数值模拟，需要更定性和定量的表征方法

Method: 采用并发展了块图建模框架，通过该框架分析振幅-频率特性，推导振荡存在的正负反馈强度约束条件

Result: 成功从块图模型中获得观察到的振幅-频率特性，确定了振荡存在的正负反馈强度约束条件

Conclusion: 该研究为生物学及相关领域的振荡现象提供了系统和控制的视角，有助于深入理解生物振荡器的设计原理

Abstract: An important design principle for biological oscillators divides the oscillators into two classes: fixed frequency, variable amplitude and fixed amplitude, variable frequency. Because of the interplay of nonlinearity and feedback, both positive and negative, analytical investigations of this design principle are primarily based on numerical simulations of ordinary differential equations. To enhance the qualitative and quantitative characterization, we adapted and developed a block diagram modeling framework. We showed how the observed amplitude-frequency characteristics could be obtained from the block diagram models. We obtained constraints on the positive feedback and negative feedback strengths for the oscillations to exist. These results should contribute to a systems and control perspective on oscillations in biology and related contexts.

</details>


### [217] [Divide and Discard: Fast Tightening of Guaranteed State Bounds for Nonlinear Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11336)
*Nico Holzinger,Matthias Althoff*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出了一种简单有效的"分而弃之"方法，用于非线性离散时间系统的有保证状态估计，通过迭代细分状态区间包络并传播，实现计算效率高且包络紧密的观测器。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有非线性系统有保证状态估计方法通常使用复杂集合表示，实现困难且计算成本高。需要一种简单、易于实现且计算高效的方法。

Method: 采用"分而弃之"策略：迭代细分状态区间包络，使用均值包络向前传播，早期丢弃许多集合以限制维护集合数量，仅依赖简单集合的重复细化。

Result: 在非线性基准问题上评估，在计算效率和包络紧密度方面均优于现有最先进方法，计算复杂度仅随状态维度二次方增长。

Conclusion: 提出的方法简单有效，易于实现和集成到现有框架中，为非线性系统有保证状态估计提供了一种计算高效且性能优越的解决方案。

Abstract: We propose a simple yet effective divide-and-discard (DD) approach to guaranteed state estimation for nonlinear discrete-time systems. Our method iteratively subdivides interval enclosures of the state and propagates them forward in time using a mean-value enclosure. The central idea is to rely on repeated refinement of simple sets rather than on more complex set representations, yielding an observer that is straightforward to implement and easy to integrate into existing frameworks. Our divide-and-discard strategy exploits that many sets can be discarded early and limits the number of maintained sets, resulting in low computational cost with complexity that scales only quadratically in the state dimension. The proposed method is evaluated on nonlinear benchmark problems previously used to compare guaranteed observers, where it outperforms state-of-the-art approaches in terms of both computational efficiency and enclosure tightness.

</details>


### [218] [Data-Driven Observers Design for Descriptor Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11345)
*Yuan Zhang,Yu Wang,Keke Huang,Zhongqi Sun,Tyrone Fernando*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种用于描述系统状态观测器设计的数据驱动框架，包括标准状态观测器、未知输入观测器和扩展状态观测器，建立了数据驱动条件与经典模型驱动条件的数学等价性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 状态估计是动态系统监控、监督和控制的核心任务。传统方法通常需要精确的系统模型，但在实际应用中，系统模型可能难以获得或不准确。因此，需要开发直接从数据设计状态观测器的方法。

Method: 提出一个数据驱动框架，直接从数据推导标准状态观测器存在的充要条件。当系统存在未知输入时，扩展框架到全阶未知输入观测器设计。通过系统增广方法，将数据驱动方法应用于扩展状态观测器设计，实现系统状态和扰动的同时估计。

Result: 建立了数据驱动存在条件与经典模型驱动条件的数学等价性。数值仿真验证了所提方法的有效性，表明数据驱动方法能够成功设计各种类型的状态观测器。

Conclusion: 该研究为描述系统提供了一种有效的纯数据驱动状态观测器设计框架，无需精确的系统模型，具有重要的理论和应用价值，特别是在模型难以获得或不确定的实际工程场景中。

Abstract: State estimation constitutes a core task in monitoring, supervision, and control of dynamic systems. This paper proposes a data-driven framework for the design of state observers for descriptor systems. Necessary and sufficient conditions for the existence of a standard state observer are derived purely from data under mild assumptions. When the system is subject to unknown inputs, we further extend the framework to the data-driven design method for full-order unknown input observer (UIO). Notably, for both the standard state observer and the UIO, we establish the mathematical equivalence between the proposed data-driven existence conditions and classical model-based ones. Moreover, the data-driven approach is applied to the design of extended state observers, enabling simultaneous estimation of system states and disturbances via system augmentation. Numerical simulations validate the effectiveness of the proposed methods.

</details>


### [219] [Leader-Follower Density Control of Multi-Agent Systems with Interacting Followers: Feasibility and Convergence Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11353)
*Beniamino Di Lorenzo,Gian Carlo Maffettone,Mario di Bernardo*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 该论文研究大规模多智能体系统中领导-跟随者设置下的密度控制问题，考虑跟随者之间的相互作用，建立宏观偏微分方程框架，推导可行性条件和反馈控制律。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决大规模多智能体系统中领导-跟随者的密度控制问题，特别考虑跟随者之间的相互作用（如集群行为和碰撞避免），这些在先前工作中常被忽略。

Method: 采用基于偏微分方程的宏观框架描述密度动态，推导出目标分布与相互作用强度、扩散和领导质量之间的必要和充分可行性条件，并提出保证局部稳定性的反馈控制律。

Result: 分析揭示了尖锐的可行性阈值和相变现象，超过这些阈值就无法实现期望配置。一维和二维数值模拟验证了宏观理论结果，基于智能体的有限群体模拟证实了框架的实际可部署性。

Conclusion: 该研究为考虑跟随者相互作用的大规模多智能体系统密度控制提供了理论框架，揭示了可行性限制并提出了有效的控制策略，具有实际应用价值。

Abstract: We address density control problems for large-scale multi-agent systems in leader-follower settings, where a group of controllable leaders must steer a population of followers toward a desired spatial distribution. Unlike prior work, we explicitly account for follower-follower interactions, capturing realistic behaviors such as flocking and collision avoidance. Within a macroscopic framework based on partial differential equations governing the density dynamics, we derive (i) necessary and sufficient feasibility conditions linking the target distribution to interaction strength, diffusion, and leader mass, and (ii) a feedback control law guaranteeing local stability with an explicit estimate of the basin of attraction. Our analysis reveals sharp feasibility thresholds, phase transitions beyond which no control effort can achieve the desired configuration. Numerical simulations in one- and two-dimensional domains validate the theoretical results at the macroscopic level, and agent-based simulations on finite populations confirm the practical deployability of the proposed framework.

</details>


### [220] [End-to-end differentiable network traffic simulation with dynamic route choice](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11380)
*Toru Seo*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出基于链路传输模型(LTM)的可微分网络交通流模拟器UNsim，支持自动微分计算梯度，用于大规模交通优化问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统交通流模型优化方法存在局限性：数值微分或无导数方法在参数维度高时扩展性差，伴随方法需要针对每个模型手动推导，缺乏通用的可微分模拟器

Method: 基于链路传输模型(LTM)构建端到端可微分模拟器，利用LTM的连续累积状态变量和分段线性min/max操作（几乎处处存在次梯度），结合动态用户最优(DUO)路径选择模型及其logit扩展，通过反向模式自动微分计算精确梯度

Result: 在芝加哥草图数据集（约2500条链路，100万辆车）上成功求解动态拥堵收费优化问题（15000个决策变量），10000次迭代约2小时完成，每次模拟和梯度计算仅需0.8秒

Conclusion: 提出的UNsim模拟器实现了高效的大规模交通网络优化，通过自动微分避免了传统方法的扩展性问题，开源软件为交通优化研究提供了新工具

Abstract: Optimization using network traffic flow models require computing gradients of objective functions with respect to model parameters. Conventional approaches rely on numerical differentiation or derivative-free methods that does not scale well with the parameter dimension, or on adjoint methods that require manual derivation for each specific model. This study proposes a novel end-to-end differentiable network traffic flow simulator based on the Link Transmission Model (LTM), incorporating general node models and a dynamic user optimum (DUO) route choice model. We observe that the LTM operates on continuous aggregate state variables (cumulative vehicle counts) through piecewise-linear $\min$/$\max$ operations, which admit subgradients almost everywhere and thus require no smooth relaxation for automatic differentiation (AD). We incorporate the DUO route choice model and its logit extension to explicitly consider endogenous dynamic route choice of travelers while preserving differentiability, because the diverge ratios are continuous functions of per-destination vehicle counts. The resulting simulator computes exact gradients via reverse-mode AD in a single backward pass regardless of the parameter dimension. In order to demonstrate the capability of the proposed model, we solved a dynamic congestion toll optimization problem on Chicago-Sketch dataset with around 2500 links and 1 million vehicles with 15 000 decision variables. The proposed model successfully derived a high quality solution with 10 000 iterations that took about 2 hours, meaning that 1 simulation run and gradient derivation took 0.8 second. The simulator, implemented in Python and JAX, is released as an open-source software named UNsim (https://github.com/toruseo/UNsim).

</details>


### [221] [Data-driven augmentation of first-principles models under constraint-free well-posedness and stability guarantees](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11421)
*Bendegúz Györök,Roel Drenth,Chris Verhoek,Tamás Péni,Maarten Schoukens,Roland Tóth*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种改进的模型增强方法，通过无约束参数化解决代数环路和稳定性问题，并采用高效识别流程实现自动模型阶次选择和配置发现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 基于第一性原理模型与学习组件的模型增强方法相比黑盒方法具有更高精度和更快收敛性，但现有线性分式表示方法存在代数环路、稳定性保证不足以及模型配置选择困难等限制。

Method: 1) 提出无约束直接参数化方法保证模型结构的适定性；2) 引入基于收缩理论的无约束参数化确保整体模型增强结构的稳定性；3) 采用能处理非光滑成本函数的高效识别流程，支持组套索正则化以实现自动模型阶次选择和增强配置发现。

Result: 在多个仿真和基准识别示例中验证了所提方法的有效性，解决了代数环路问题，保证了模型稳定性，并实现了自动模型配置选择。

Conclusion: 本文提出的改进模型增强框架解决了现有方法的三个关键限制，为物理可解释的混合建模提供了更可靠和实用的解决方案。

Abstract: The integration of first-principles models with learning-based components, i.e., model augmentation, has gained increasing attention, as it offers higher model accuracy and faster convergence properties compared to black-box approaches, while generating physically interpretable models. Recently, a unified formulation has been proposed that generalizes existing model augmentation structures, utilizing linear fractional representations (LFRs). However, several potential benefits of the approach remain underexplored. In this work, we address three key limitations. First, the added flexibility of LFRs also introduces possible algebraic loops, i.e., a problem of well-posedness. To address this challenge, we propose a constraint-free direct parametrization of the model structure with a well-posedness guarantee. Second, we introduce a constraint-free parametrization that ensures stability of the overall model augmentation structure via contraction. Third, we adopt an efficient identification pipeline capable of handling non-smooth cost functions, such as group-lasso regularization, which facilitates automatic model order selection and discovery of the required augmentation configuration. These contributions are demonstrated on various simulation and benchmark identification examples.

</details>


### [222] [Air supply control for proton exchange membrane fuel cells without explicit modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11433)
*Méziane Ait Ziane,Michel Zasadzinski,Cédric Join,Michel Fliess*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 研究模型自由控制在质子交换膜燃料电池空气供应系统氧化学计量控制中的性能和鲁棒性，通过数值仿真验证其在不同工况下的表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 模型自由控制方法具有实时适应性强、计算负担低的优点，适合工业应用，特别是在燃料电池空气供应系统这种需要跟踪不同工作点的场景。

Method: 采用模型自由控制策略来控制质子交换膜燃料电池空气供应系统的氧化学计量，通过数值仿真评估其在恒定和可变氧化学计量两种场景下的性能，并考虑系统参数显著变化来测试鲁棒性。

Result: 数值仿真结果表明，模型自由控制律在两种电流分布下都表现出令人满意的性能，能够有效跟踪工作点，并且在系统参数发生显著变化时仍保持鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 模型自由控制是质子交换膜燃料电池空气供应系统氧化学计量控制的有效方法，具有实时适应性强、计算负担低、鲁棒性好的特点，适合工业应用。

Abstract: Our objective is to study the performance and robustness of the model-free strategy for controlling the oxygen stoichiometry of a fuel cell air supply system with a proton exchange membrane. After reviewing the literature on modeling and control of this process, the model-free approach appears to be a good candidate because, on the one hand, it allows straightforward real-time adaptation to track operating points and, on the other hand, it requires a low computational burden, which is attractive for industrial applications. Numerical simulations for two scenarios (constant and variable oxygen stoichiometry) with two current profiles reveal satisfactory performance of the model-free control law. The robustness is addressed by considering significant variations in the parameters of the proton exchange membrane air supply system.

</details>


### [223] [To Learn or Not to Learn: A Litmus Test for Using Reinforcement Learning in Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11463)
*Victor Schulte,Michael Eichelbeck,Matthias Althoff*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出一种无需RL训练即可预测RL控制是否优于模型控制的计算高效测试方法


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: RL训练成本高，需要一种方法在训练前就能判断RL是否比模型控制更优，避免不必要的计算资源浪费

Method: 通过两部分分析：1) 评估模型对模型控制适用性（分析模型不确定性影响）；2) 基于相关性分析评估不确定性的可学习性。使用可达集一致性模型识别和仿真分析

Result: 测试应用于多个基准问题，证明适用于广泛控制问题，能显著节省计算资源

Conclusion: 提出了一种有效的"试金石"测试，可在不训练RL代理的情况下明智决定是否采用RL控制

Abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) can be a powerful alternative to classical control methods when standard model-based control is insufficient, e.g., when deriving a suitable model is intractable or impossible. In many cases, however, the choice between model-based and RL-based control is not obvious. Due to the high computational costs of training RL agents, RL-based control should be limited to cases where it is expected to yield superior results compared to model-based control. To the best of our knowledge, there exists no approach to quantify the benefit of RL-based control that does not require RL training. In this work, we present a computationally efficient, purely simulation-based litmus test predicting whether RL-based control is superior to model-based control. Our test evaluates the suitability of the given model for model-based control by analyzing the impact of model uncertainties on the control problem. For this, we use reachset-conformant model identification combined with simulation-based analysis. This is followed by a learnability evaluation of the uncertainties based on correlation analysis. This two-part analysis enables an informed decision on the suitability of RL for a control problem without training an RL agent. We apply our test to several benchmarks, demonstrating its applicability to a wide range of control problems and highlight the potential to save computational resources.

</details>


### [224] [A Study on the Controllability of Lithium-Ion Batteries](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11531)
*Preston T. Abadie,Donald J. Docimo*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 该论文对锂离子电池进行非线性可控性分析，揭示电池可控性矩阵条件数与控制努力之间的关系，并分析新旧电池参数对控制效果的影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 电池包管理因单体电池参数差异而变得复杂，现有研究主要关注估计和控制方案，但对单体电池对这些方案的响应性研究不足。需要探索电池的可控性及其所需的控制努力。

Method: 对实验参数化的电池进行非线性可控性分析，建立电池可控性矩阵条件数与控制努力之间的关系，分析新旧电池参数下的可控性条件数，并进行敏感性分析。

Result: 发现电池动态数学条件差时需要更多时间或更高功率来控制；电池老化会增加控制努力；所有参数对电池条件数的影响程度相同；确定了新旧电池混合的最佳组装配置。

Conclusion: 电池可控性分析为电池管理提供了重要见解，揭示了电池老化对控制努力的影响机制，并为新旧电池混合组装提供了优化指导。

Abstract: This work explores controllability and the control effort required for lithium-ion batteries. Battery packs have become a critical technology in both personal and professional applications as a means to store large amounts of energy. Management of cells in a pack becomes increasingly difficult though, with charging and discharging operations requiring more complex strategies due to parameter variations between the cells. There are numerous studies which develop effective estimation and control schemes to reduce the impact of the imbalances present in battery packs, but the receptiveness of the individual cells to these schemes is much less explored. This paper performs a nonlinear controllability analysis for experimentally parameterized cells. A connection is shown between the condition number of a battery's controllability matrix and the amount of control effort that battery will require. This reveals that if a cell's dynamics are poorly mathematically conditioned, it will require more time or higher power to control than one that is not. The controllability condition number of each cell's model is then determined both with new and aged parameters, and a sensitivity analysis shows that the cells' conditioning is equally impacted by all parameters. This offers insight into the increased control effort required for a battery as it ages and the culprit of said increase. The results of this analysis are then used to determine the best conditioned assemblies for a batch of cells with a mix of new and second-life parameters.

</details>


### [225] [Distributed State Estimation for Discrete-Time Systems With Unknown Inputs: An Optimization Approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11588)
*Ruixuan Zhao,Guitao Yang,Nicola Bastianello,Boli Chen*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出分布式未知输入观测器框架，用于大规模系统在局部未知输入下的状态估计，通过分布式优化融合局部估计，并加入归一化步骤改善性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 针对大规模系统中存在局部未知输入的问题，传统集中式观测器难以处理分布式传感器网络和分散输入通道的场景，需要开发分布式估计框架。

Method: 每个节点利用局部输入输出测量估计最大局部可重构状态，然后通过分布式优化算法融合这些部分估计来重构整个系统状态，并嵌入归一化步骤应对系统几何条件差的问题。

Result: 理论分析表明估计误差有界，误差界明确依赖于每时间步的通信迭代次数和系统参数决定的强凸常数。仿真结果验证了框架有效性，归一化步骤显著提升性能。

Conclusion: 提出的DUIO框架能够有效处理大规模系统中局部未知输入的状态估计问题，通过分布式优化和归一化技术实现了有界误差估计和性能改进。

Abstract: This paper proposes a novel Distributed Unknown Input Observer (DUIO) framework for state estimation in large-scale systems subject to local unknown inputs. We consider systems where outputs are measured by a network of spatially distributed sensors and inputs are introduced through multiple dispersed channels. In this framework, each local node utilizes only its local input and output measurements to estimate the maximal locally reconstructible state. Subsequently, nodes collaboratively reconstruct the whole system state via a distributed optimization algorithm that fuses these partial estimates. We provide a rigorous analysis showing that the estimation error is bounded, with the error bound explicitly dependent on the number of communication iterations per time step and strongly convexity constant determined by the system parameters. Furthermore, to counteract curvature anisotropy induced by poor conditioned system geometry, we embed a normalization step into the distributed optimization procedure. Simulation results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed framework and the performance improvements yielded by the normalization procedure.

</details>


### [226] [Model-free Anomaly Detection for Dynamical Systems with Gaussian Processes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11629)
*Alejandro Penacho Riveiros,Nicola Bastianello,Matthieu Barreau*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出基于高斯过程的模型无关方法，用于检测动态系统中的异常或变化，通过离线训练名义数据GP模型，在线检测状态测量是否偏离名义操作，并处理噪声干扰。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决基于历史名义操作数据检测动态系统差异或异常的问题，涵盖质量控制和检测因退化或维修引起的动态变化，挑战在于过程噪声和测量噪声可能掩盖动态偏差。

Method: 采用高斯过程（GP）模型无关方法：1）离线训练基于名义数据的GP模型；2）在线部署检测系统状态测量是否与名义操作兼容；3）基于阈值检测确保特定误报率；4）处理过程噪声和测量噪声的干扰。

Result: 在两个系统上展示了有前景的性能表现，验证了方法的有效性。

Conclusion: 提出的基于高斯过程的方法能有效检测动态系统中的异常变化，并指出了几个有趣的未来研究方向。

Abstract: In this paper we address the problem of detecting differences or anomalies in a dynamical system, based on historical data of nominal operations. This problem encompasses quality control, where newly manufactured systems are tested against desired nominal operations, and the detection of changes in the dynamics due to degradation or repairs. We propose a model free approach based on Gaussian processes (GPs). The idea is to train offline a GP based on nominal data, which is then deployed online to detect whether measurements of the system state are compatible with nominal operations or if they deviate. Detecting this deviation is made more challenging by the presence of process and measurement noise, which might obfuscate deviations in the dynamics. The detection then is based on a threshold that ensures a specific false positive rate. We showcase the promising performance of the proposed method with two systems, and highlight several interesting future research questions.

</details>


### [227] [Detectability of Subtle Anomalies in Dynamical Systems via Log-Likelihood Ratio](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11631)
*Alejandro Penacho Riveiros,Matthieu Barreau,Nicola Bastianello*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出基于对数似然比的实时异常检测器，为线性高斯系统提供错误率的理论分析，并展示其在观测器设计中的应用


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 工业控制应用需要准确快速地检测系统异常以进行及时维护。虽然对数似然比方法已广泛应用于各种系统，但缺乏对异常检测难易程度的正式分析

Method: 基于对数似然比的实时异常检测器，针对线性高斯系统进行理论分析，提供错误率的理论表征

Result: 获得了异常检测器错误率的理论表征，展示了算法性能，并证明了该表征可用于观测器设计

Conclusion: 为线性高斯系统中的异常检测提供了理论分析框架，该分析可用于指导观测器设计，提高异常检测性能

Abstract: Industrial control applications require detecting system anomalies as accurately and quickly as possible to enable prompt maintenance. In this context, it is common to consider several possible plant models, each linked to a different anomaly. The log-likelihood ratio method can then be used to identify the most accurate model and thereby classify which anomaly, if any, has occurred. Although the method has been applied to a wide variety of systems, there is no formal analysis of what makes anomalies more or less prone to detection. In this paper, we investigate a real-time anomaly detector based on the log-likelihood ratio and provide a theoretical characterization of its error rate when it is applied to linear Gaussian systems. We showcase the performance of this algorithm and the characterization obtained, and demonstrate how the latter can be leveraged for observer design.

</details>


### [228] [Performance Characterization of Frequency-Selective Wireless Power Transfer Toward Scalable Untethered Magnetic Actuation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11645)
*Gabriel Cooper,Xiaolong Liu*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 该研究量化了基于频率选择性无线能量传输的多机器人独立控制的可扩展性，证明了可寻址谐振器数量主要取决于品质因数(Q-factor)，并通过实验验证了三个厘米级无缆致动器的独立控制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 频率选择性无线能量传输为多个无缆机器人在共享工作空间中的独立控制提供了可行方案，但其可扩展性尚未量化，特别是给定频率带宽内可可靠寻址的最大谐振器数量。

Method: 建立了谐振器品质因数与可独立寻址LC谐振能量收集器数量之间的关系，将选择性激活的收集能量转换为机械运动。定义了有效串联电阻作为频率的函数来分配带宽给离散致动器，提供了基于Q因子优化的无缆磁致动扩展设计方程。

Result: 理论证明和实验验证了可扩展性主要取决于Q因子。在100kHz至1MHz带宽范围内分析了谐振器网络，量化了增加谐振器数量对独立寻址能力的影响。成功制造了三个厘米级无缆致动器，分别在734kHz、785kHz和855kHz频率下选择性触发机械梁运动，无意外交叉触发。

Conclusion: 该研究为基于频率选择性无线能量传输的多机器人系统提供了可扩展性量化框架，证明了Q因子是决定可寻址致动器数量的关键参数，为大规模无缆机器人系统的设计提供了理论基础和实验验证。

Abstract: Frequency-selective wireless power transfer provides a feasible route to enable independent actuation and control of multiple untethered robots in a common workspace; however, the scalability remains unquantified, particularly the maximum number of resonators that can be reliably addressed within a given frequency bandwidth. To address this, we formulate the relationship between resonator quality factor (Q-factor) and the number of individually addressable inductor-capacitor (LC) resonant energy harvesters within a fixed radio-frequency (RF) spectrum, and we convert selectively activated harvested energy into mechanical motion. We theoretically proved and experimentally demonstrated that scalability depends primarily on the Q-factor. For this proof-of-concept study, we define effective series resistance as a function of frequency allocating bandwidths to discrete actuators. We provide design equations for scaling untethered magnetic actuation with Q-factor optimization. Resonator networks spanning bandwidths from 100kHz to 1MHz were analyzed to quantify how increasing the number of resonators affects independent addressability. We validated the approach experimentally by fabricating three centimeter-scale untethered actuators that selectively trigger the motion of mechanical beams at 734kHz, 785kHz, and 855kHz. We also characterized the generated mechanical force and the activation bandwidth of each actuator, confirming that no unintended cross-triggering occurred.

</details>


### [229] [Data Poisoning Attacks on Informativity for Observability: Invariance-Based Synthesis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11657)
*Iori Takaki,Ahmet Cetinkaya,Hideaki Ishii*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 研究针对数据驱动控制中信息性分析的网络攻击，通过可逆线性变换后处理时间序列数据，嵌入恶意状态破坏信息性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究数据驱动控制系统中信息性分析面临的安全威胁，特别是针对强可观测性的攻击，探索攻击者如何通过数据后处理破坏信息性证书

Method: 考虑攻击者对有限时间序列数据进行可逆线性变换，作用于数据矩阵；提供构造性攻击方法，推导攻击可行性条件，并构建最小范数攻击优化问题以量化破坏信息性所需的最小数据失真

Result: 证明此类变换能够在变换后数据集解释的不变子空间中嵌入恶意状态；数值示例显示小而结构化的变换足以使信息性证书失效

Conclusion: 数据驱动控制中的信息性分析易受精心设计的线性变换攻击，即使小的数据失真也能破坏信息性证书，揭示了数据驱动控制系统面临的安全漏洞

Abstract: This paper studies cyber attacks against informativity-based analysis in data-driven control. Focusing on strong observability, we consider an adversary who post-processes finite time-series data by an invertible linear transformation acting on the data matrices. We show that such transformations are capable of embedding malicious states into the invariant subspace explained by the transformed dataset. We provide a constructive attack method and derive feasibility conditions that characterize when such transformations exist. Moreover, we formulate an optimization problem to obtain the minimum-norm attack that quantifies the smallest data distortion required to destroy informativity. Numerical examples demonstrate that small and structured transformations can invalidate informativity certificates.

</details>


### [230] [Koopman Representations for Non-Vanishing Time Intervals: An Optimization Approach and Sampling Effects](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11715)
*Younghwan Cho,Richard Sowers*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 该论文研究了从任意时间间隔的观测数据中学习Koopman特征函数的问题，分析了振荡动力学和采样模式引起的混叠效应，发现不规则采样可以打破混叠并帮助恢复真实的Koopman谱。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Koopman算子理论是复杂动力系统数据同化的关键工具，但现有方法通常假设连续或均匀采样。实际应用中观测数据往往在任意、可能非零的时间间隔上获得，这给学习Koopman特征函数带来了挑战。需要研究如何从这种非理想采样数据中准确恢复Koopman谱。

Method: 将学习Koopman特征函数的问题形式化为优化问题，分析振荡动力学和采样模式引起的混叠效应。揭示相位对齐现象在真实Koopman频率附近形成陡峭的损失谷，需要仔细优化。理论分析表明不规则采样可以打破混叠并导致相位抵消。

Result: 数值结果表明，与生成器扩展动态模态分解相比，所提方法在大规则时间间隔下表现更优。支持不规则采样有助于恢复真实Koopman谱的观点，揭示了采样模式对可识别性的固有限制。

Conclusion: 该研究为从任意时间间隔观测数据中学习Koopman特征函数提供了理论框架和实用方法，揭示了采样模式对Koopman谱恢复的关键影响，特别是不规则采样在打破混叠方面的优势，对实际应用中处理非均匀采样数据具有重要指导意义。

Abstract: Koopman operator theory is a key tool in data assimilation of complex dynamical systems, with the potential to be applied to multimodal data. We formulate the problem of learning Koopman eigenfunctions from observations at arbitrary, possibly non-vanishing, time intervals as an optimization problem. Analysis of the formulation reveals aliasing induced by oscillatory dynamics and the sampling pattern, making an inherent identifiability limit explicit. The analysis also uncovers phase alignment near the true Koopman frequency, which creates a steep loss valley and demands careful optimization. We further show that irregular sampling can break aliasing and lead to phase cancellation. Numerical results demonstrate the efficacy of the proposed method under large regular time intervals compared to generator extended dynamic mode decomposition, and support the idea that irregular sampling can help recover the true Koopman spectrum.

</details>


### [231] [Angle-based Localization and Rigidity Maintenance Control for Multi-Robot Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11754)
*J. Francisco Presenza,Leonardo J. Colombo,Juan I. Giribet,Ignacio Mas*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 该论文研究了多机器人网络中基于角度的定位和刚性保持控制，建立了有向感知图下角度刚性与方位刚性的等价关系，提出了分布式角度定位方案和刚性保持控制器。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在多机器人网络中，由于感知约束（有向感知图和机体坐标系方位测量），需要研究角度刚性与方位刚性的关系，并开发能够在执行任务时保持足够刚性的控制方案。

Method: 1. 建立了有向感知图下角度刚性与方位刚性的等价关系；2. 提出了基于角度的分布式定位方案；3. 引入了角度刚性特征值作为刚性度量；4. 设计了能够执行任务特定指令同时保持角度刚性的分散梯度控制器。

Result: 证明了在SE(d)中，框架是无穷小方位刚性的当且仅当它是无穷小角度刚性的且每个机器人至少获得d-1个方位测量；提出的定位方案在切换感知图下具有局部指数稳定性；控制器能够有效保持刚性。

Conclusion: 该工作首次建立了有向感知图下角度刚性与方位刚性的等价关系，提出的分布式角度定位和刚性保持控制方案为多机器人网络在感知约束下的协同控制提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: In this work, we study angle-based localization and rigidity maintenance control for multi-robot networks under sensing constraints. We establish the first equivalence between angle rigidity and bearing rigidity considering \textit{directed} sensing graphs and \textit{body-frame} bearing measurements in both $2$ and $3$-\textit{dimensional space}. In particular, we demonstrate that a framework in $\mathrm{SE}(d)$ is infinitesimally bearing rigid if and only if it is infinitesimally angle rigid and each robot obtains at least $d-1$ bearing measurements ($d \in \{2, 3\}$). Building on these findings, this paper proposes a distributed angle-based localization scheme and establishes local exponential stability under switching sensing graphs, requiring only infinitesimal angle rigidity across the visited topologies. Then, since angle rigidity strongly depends on the robots' spatial configuration, we investigate rigidity maintenance control. The \textit{angle rigidity eigenvalue} is presented as a metric for the degree of rigidity. A decentralized gradient-based controller capable of executing mission-specific commands while maintaining a sufficient level of angle rigidity is proposed. Simulations were conducted to evaluate the scheme's effectiveness and practicality.

</details>


<div id='cs.LG'></div>

# cs.LG [[Back]](#toc)

### [232] [The Diffusion-Attention Connection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09560)
*Julio Candanedo*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 论文展示了Transformer、扩散映射和磁拉普拉斯算子实际上是同一马尔可夫几何的不同表现形式，都源于预softmax查询分数构建的QK双散度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统上Transformer、扩散映射和磁拉普拉斯算子被视为独立工具，本文旨在揭示它们之间的深层统一性，将它们整合到同一理论框架中。

Method: 定义QK"双散度"，通过指数化和归一化得到注意力、扩散映射和磁扩散；使用专家乘积和薛定谔桥将它们组织为平衡态、非平衡稳态和驱动动力学。

Result: 建立了Transformer、扩散映射和磁拉普拉斯算子的统一理论框架，展示了它们作为同一马尔可夫几何不同机制的内在联系。

Conclusion: Transformer、扩散映射和磁拉普拉斯算子本质上是统一的，可以通过QK双散度框架相互转化，为理解这些重要工具提供了新的理论视角。

Abstract: Transformers, diffusion-maps, and magnetic Laplacians are usually treated as separate tools; we show they are all different regimes of a single Markov geometry built from pre-softmax query-scores. We define a QK "bidivergence" whose exponentiated and normalized forms yield attention, diffusion-maps, and magnetic diffusion. And use product of experts and Schrödinger-bridges to connect and organize them into equilibrium, nonequilibrium steady-state, and driven dynamics.

</details>


### [233] [Fairboard: a quantitative framework for equity assessment of healthcare models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09656)
*James K. Ruffle,Samia Mohinta,Chris Foulon,Mohamad Zeina,Zicheng Wang,Sebastian Brandner,Harpreet Hyare,Parashkev Nachev*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 评估18个开源脑肿瘤分割模型的公平性，发现患者身份比模型选择更能解释性能差异，临床因素比模型架构更能预测分割准确性，并发布了Fairboard工具包


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管已有超过1000个FDA授权的AI医疗设备，但正式的公平性评估（模型在不同患者亚组中的表现是否一致）仍然很少。本研究旨在评估脑肿瘤分割模型在不同患者亚组中的公平性

Method: 评估18个开源脑肿瘤分割模型在648名胶质瘤患者（来自两个独立数据集，共11,664次模型推断）上的表现，采用单变量、贝叶斯多变量、空间和表征维度分析，并进行体素级空间元分析

Result: 患者身份比模型选择更能解释性能差异；临床因素（分子诊断、肿瘤分级、切除范围）比模型架构更能预测分割准确性；空间元分析发现神经解剖定位的偏差具有区室特异性但跨模型一致；在高维潜在空间中，模型性能显著聚类；较新模型趋向更公平但无正式公平性保证

Conclusion: 脑肿瘤分割模型存在系统性公平性问题，患者特征空间包含算法脆弱性轴。研究发布了Fairboard开源工具包，降低医学影像中公平性监测的门槛

Abstract: Despite there now being more than 1,000 FDA-authorised AI medical devices, formal equity assessments -- whether model performance is uniform across patient subgroups -- are rare. Here, we evaluate the equity of 18 open-source brain tumour segmentation models across 648 glioma patients from two independent datasets (n = 11,664 model inferences) along distinct univariate, Bayesian multivariate, spatial, and representational dimensions. We find that patient identity consistently explains more performance variance than model choice, with clinical factors, including molecular diagnosis, tumour grade, and extent of resection, predicting segmentation accuracy more strongly than model architecture. A voxel-wise spatial meta-analysis identifies neuroanatomically localised biases that are compartment-specific yet often consistent across models. Within a high-dimensional latent space of lesion masks and clinic-demographic features, model performance clusters significantly, indicating that the patient feature space contains axes of algorithmic vulnerability. Although newer models tend toward greater equity, none provide a formal fairness guarantee. Lastly, we release Fairboard, an open-source, no-code dashboard that lowers barriers to equitable model monitoring in medical imaging.

</details>


### [234] [Deliberative Alignment is Deep, but Uncertainty Remains: Inference time safety improvement in reasoning via attribution of unsafe behavior to base model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09665)
*Pankayaraj Pathmanathan,Furong Huang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了审议对齐在语言模型中的影响，发现即使使用更大的教师模型进行对齐，学生模型仍存在对齐差距并可能保留基础模型的不安全行为。作者提出了一种BoN采样方法，在潜在空间中将不安全行为归因于基础LLM，从而降低不安全响应的排名，在多个安全基准上显著提升模型安全性且效用损失最小。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管拒绝训练在大型语言模型中的广泛采用展示了模型安全性的改进，但最近的研究表明这些对齐方法存在浅层性的缺点。审议对齐通过从更强的推理模型蒸馏推理能力来灌输更深层次的安全性，但需要研究审议对齐在语言模型中的实际影响。

Method: 首先揭示了教师和学生语言模型之间存在对齐差距，即使教师模型更大且安全性更强。然后提出BoN（BoN）采样方法，在潜在空间中将不安全行为归因于基础LLM，通过降低不安全响应的排名来提升安全性。该方法在7个教师模型和6个不同类别和大小的学生模型上进行验证。

Result: 在多个安全基准测试中取得了显著改进：DAN基准的攻击成功率平均降低28.2%，WildJailbreak降低31.3%，StrongREJECT降低35.4%。这些安全增益在RL训练后仍然保持，突显了安全推理的不确定性及其对基础模型的明确归因。

Conclusion: 审议对齐虽然能提升语言模型的安全性，但仍存在对齐差距和不安全行为残留的问题。提出的BoN采样方法通过将不安全行为归因于基础模型，能有效提升模型安全性且最小化效用损失，为深层安全对齐提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: While the wide adoption of refusal training in large language models (LLMs) has showcased improvements in model safety, recent works have highlighted shortcomings due to the shallow nature of these alignment methods. To this end, the work on Deliberative alignment proposed distilling reasoning capabilities from stronger reasoning models, thereby instilling deeper safety in LLMs. In this work, we study the impact of deliberative alignment in language models. First, we show that despite being larger in model size and stronger in safety capability, there exists an alignment gap between teacher and student language models, which affects both the safety and general utility of the student model. Furthermore, we show that models aligned through deliberative alignment can retain unsafe behaviors from the base model despite learning the reasoning patterns of larger reasoning models. Building upon this observation, we propose a BoN sampling method that attributes the unsafe behavior back to the base LLMs in the latent space, thereby down-ranking unsafe responses to gain a meaningful improvement in model safety across multiple safety benchmarks with minimal loss in utility. In particular, across 7 teacher models and 6 student models of different classes and sizes, we show an average attack success rate (ASR) reduction of 28.2% in DAN, 31.3% in WildJailbreak and 35.4 % in StrongREJECT benchmarks. We further show that these safety gains prevail post RL training, thus highlighting the uncertainty in safety reasoning and it's explicit attribution to the base model.

</details>


### [235] [Human-like Working Memory Interference in Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09670)
*Hua-Dong Xiong,Li Ji-An,Jiaqi Huang,Robert C. Wilson,Kwonjoon Lee,Xue-Xin Wei*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 研究发现预训练大语言模型存在工作记忆限制，其机制与人类相似：记忆负荷增加时性能下降，受近因效应和刺激统计影响。模型通过纠缠表征编码多个记忆项，成功回忆依赖于干扰控制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管Transformer通过注意力机制可以完全访问先前上下文，但大语言模型仍表现出工作记忆限制。这引发了一个关键问题：为什么拥有1000亿参数的大语言模型仍存在这种限制？研究旨在探索LLMs工作记忆限制的机制及其与人类认知的相似性。

Method: 研究训练了两层Transformer完美解决工作记忆任务，然后测试了多种预训练LLMs的工作记忆表现。分析了模型在不同记忆负荷下的性能，观察了近因效应和刺激统计的影响。通过相关性分析考察工作记忆能力与标准基准测试表现的关系，并探究了模型的底层计算机制。

Result: LLMs表现出与人类相似的工作记忆干扰特征：性能随记忆负荷增加而下降，受近因效应和刺激统计偏差影响。工作记忆能力强的模型在标准基准测试中表现更好。所有模型都采用相同的计算机制：通过纠缠表征编码多个记忆项，依赖干扰控制来抑制任务无关内容。针对性干预（抑制刺激内容信息）能提高性能，为表征干扰提供了因果证据。

Conclusion: 表征干扰是预训练LLMs工作记忆的核心约束机制。生物和人工系统的工作记忆限制可能反映了共同的计算挑战：在干扰下选择任务相关信息。这一发现揭示了LLMs与人类认知的深层相似性。

Abstract: Intelligent systems must maintain and manipulate task-relevant information online to adapt to dynamic environments and changing goals. This capacity, known as working memory, is fundamental to human reasoning and intelligence. Despite having on the order of 100 billion neurons, both biological and artificial systems exhibit limitations in working memory. This raises a key question: why do large language models (LLMs) show such limitations, given that transformers have full access to prior context through attention? We find that although a two-layer transformer can be trained to solve working memory tasks perfectly, a diverse set of pretrained LLMs continues to show working memory limitations. Notably, LLMs reproduce interference signatures observed in humans: performance degrades with increasing memory load and is biased by recency and stimulus statistics. Across models, stronger working memory capacity correlates with broader competence on standard benchmarks, mirroring its link to general intelligence in humans. Yet despite substantial variability in working memory performance, LLMs surprisingly converge on a common computational mechanism. Rather than directly copying the relevant memory item from context, models encode multiple memory items in entangled representations, such that successful recall depends on interference control -- actively suppressing task-irrelevant content to isolate the target for readout. Moreover, a targeted intervention that suppresses stimulus content information improves performance, providing causal support for representational interference. Together, these findings identify representational interference as a core constraint on working memory in pretrained LLMs, suggesting that working-memory limits in biological and artificial systems may reflect a shared computational challenge: selecting task-relevant information under interference.

</details>


### [236] [Structural Consequences of Policy-Based Interventions on the Global Supply Chain Network](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11479)
*Lea Karbevska,Liming Xu,Zehui Dai,Sara AlMahri,Alexandra Brintrup*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 研究分析了三种贸易政策（Country Plus One、Friendshoring、Reshoring）对全球电动汽车供应链网络的影响，发现Friendshoring意外地促进了全球化，Country Plus One增加了网络密度，而Reshoring在电动汽车领域面临挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着全球政治紧张局势加剧、美国可能加征关税、COVID-19疫情和乌克兰战争等供应链中断事件频发，经济独立性和供应链韧性变得日益重要。各国政府正积极采取新的贸易政策来应对地缘政治不稳定和产品供应不确定性等挑战。

Method: 本研究通过分析三种关键贸易政策对全球电动汽车供应链网络的影响，特别关注这些政策对国家集群和国际贸易结构的影响。具体分析了Country Plus One、Friendshoring和Reshoring三种政策。

Result: 1. Friendshoring政策出人意料地促进了全球化，增加了友好国家间的供应链连接数量，但可能提高交易成本；2. Country Plus One政策通过冗余连接增强了网络密度；3. Reshoring政策在电动汽车领域面临挑战，因为存在大量不可替代产品；4. 不同行业受影响程度不同，例如在Country Plus One政策下，矿产品受影响小于Friendshoring政策。

Conclusion: 不同的贸易政策对全球电动汽车供应链网络产生差异化影响，政策制定者需要考虑行业特性和政策的具体实施方式。Friendshoring可能意外促进全球化，而Reshoring在复杂供应链行业如电动汽车领域面临特殊挑战。

Abstract: As global political tensions rise and the anticipation of additional tariffs from the United States on international trade increases, the issues of economic independence and supply chain resilience become more prominent. The importance of supply chain resilience has been further underscored by disruptions caused by the COVID-19 pandemic and the ongoing war in Ukraine.In light of these challenges, ranging from geopolitical instability to product supply uncertainties, governments are increasingly focused on adopting new trade policies. This study explores the impact of several of these policies on the global electric vehicle (EV) supply chain network, with a particular focus on their effects on country clusters and the broader structure of international trade. Specifically, we analyse three key policies: Country Plus One, Friendshoring, and Reshoring. Our findings show that Friendshoring, contrary to expectations, leads to greater globalisation by increasing the number of supply links across friendly countries, potentially raising transaction costs. The Country Plus One policy similarly enhances network density through redundant links, while the Reshoring policy creates challenges in the EV sector due to the high number of irreplaceable products. Additionally, the effects of these policies vary across industries; for instance, mining goods being less affected in Country Plus One than the Friendshoring policy.

</details>


### [237] [Belief-State RWKV for Reinforcement Learning under Partial Observability](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09671)
*Liu Xiao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出基于RWKV循环模型的强化学习新框架，将循环状态显式解释为信念状态而非隐藏向量，通过不确定性感知状态提升部分可观测环境中的策略性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 针对传统固定状态策略在部分可观测环境中的关键弱点：它们可能存储证据但缺乏置信度信息，需要更明确的信念状态表示来提升决策质量

Method: 将RWKV循环状态重新解释为信念状态b_t = (μ_t, Σ_t)，其中包含均值和协方差，让控制策略同时依赖记忆和不确定性信息，而非单一隐藏向量h_t

Result: 实验显示信念状态策略在整体性能上接近最佳循环基线，在最具挑战性的分布内机制和保持噪声偏移下略有提升；简单信念读取优于门控记忆控制和特权信念目标等结构化扩展

Conclusion: 信念状态表示是提升部分可观测环境中RL性能的有效方法，但需要更丰富的基准测试来评估更复杂的扩展，当前简单信念读取已显示出优势

Abstract: We propose a stronger formulation of RL on top of RWKV-style recurrent sequence models, in which the fixed-size recurrent state is explicitly interpreted as a belief state rather than an opaque hidden vector. Instead of conditioning policy and value on a single summary h_t, we maintain a compact uncertainty-aware state b_t = (μ_t, Σ_t) derived from RWKV-style recurrent statistics and let control depend on both memory and uncertainty. This design targets a key weakness of plain fixed-state policies in partially observed settings: they may store evidence, but not necessarily confidence. We present the method, a theoretical program, and a pilot RL experiment with hidden episode-level observation noise together with a test-time noise sweep. The pilot shows that belief-state policies nearly match the best recurrent baseline overall while slightly improving return on the hardest in-distribution regime and under a held-out noise shift. Additional ablations show that this simple belief readout is currently stronger than two more structured extensions, namely gated memory control and privileged belief targets, underscoring the need for richer benchmarks.

</details>


### [238] [Active Inference with a Self-Prior in the Mirror-Mark Task](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09673)
*Dongmin Kim,Hoshinori Kanazawa,Yasuo Kuniyoshi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究提出一个计算模型，通过自先验机制让模拟婴儿自发完成镜像自我识别测试，无需外部奖励。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 镜像自我识别测试被广泛用作自我意识的指标，但缺乏计算层面的解释。研究旨在通过计算模型解释这种行为如何自发产生。

Method: 使用基于Transformer的自先验机制学习熟悉的多感官体验密度分布，当出现新标记时，与学习分布的差异通过主动推理驱动标记导向行为。模拟婴儿仅依赖视觉和本体感觉，没有触觉输入。

Result: 模拟婴儿在约70%的情况下自发发现并移除脸上的贴纸。移除后预期自由能显著降低，证实自先验作为区分自我与非自我的内部标准。跨模态采样显示自先验捕捉视觉-本体感觉关联，作为概率性身体图式。

Conclusion: 该模型为镜像测试的关键行为提供了简洁的计算解释，表明自由能原理可作为研究自我意识发展起源的统一假说。

Abstract: The mirror self-recognition test evaluates whether a subject touches a mark on its own body that is visible only in a mirror, and is widely used as an indicator of self-awareness. In this study, we present a computational model in which this behavior emerges spontaneously through a single mechanism, the self-prior, without any external reward. The self-prior, implemented with a Transformer, learns the density of familiar multisensory experiences; when a novel mark appears, the discrepancy from this learned distribution drives mark-directed behavior through active inference. A simulated infant, relying solely on vision and proprioception without tactile input, discovered a sticker placed on its own face in the mirror and removed it in approximately 70% of cases without any explicit instruction. Expected free energy decreased significantly after sticker removal, confirming that the self-prior operates as an internal criterion for distinguishing self from non-self. Cross-modal sampling further demonstrated that the self-prior captures visual--proprioceptive associations, functioning as a probabilistic body schema.
