Conclusion: 结构化推理能够解锁现有生成器中潜在的能力，这些能力在次优提示下无法被激发，表明奖励模型从被动评估器转变为主动优化工具的价值。

Abstract: Most reward models for visual generation reduce rich human judgments to a single unexplained score, discarding the reasoning that underlies preference. We show that teaching reward models to produce explicit, multi-dimensional critiques before scoring transforms them from passive evaluators into active optimization tools, improving generators in two complementary ways: at training time, structured rationales provide interpretable, fine-grained rewards for reinforcement learning; at test time, a Generate-Critique-Refine loop turns critiques into targeted prompt revisions that improve outputs without any parameter updates. To train such a reward model without costly rationale annotations, we introduce Preference-Anchored Rationalization (PARROT), a principled framework that recovers high-quality rationales from readily available preference data through anchored generation, consistency filtering, and distillation. The resulting model, RationalRewards (8B), achieves state-of-the-art preference prediction among open-source reward models, competitive with Gemini-2.5-Pro, while using 10-20x less training data than comparable baselines. As an RL reward, it consistently improves text-to-image and image-editing generators beyond scalar alternatives. Most strikingly, its test-time critique-and-refine loop matches or exceeds RL-based fine-tuning on several benchmarks, suggesting that structured reasoning can unlock latent capabilities in existing generators that suboptimal prompts fail to elicit.

</details>


### [540] [Why Do Large Language Models Generate Harmful Content?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11663)
*Rajesh Ganguli,Raha Moraffah*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于因果中介分析的方法来识别导致大语言模型生成有害内容的因果因素，发现有害生成主要发生在模型后层，由MLP模块而非注意力模块的故障引起，并与作为有害生成门控机制的神经元相关。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型已被证明会生成有害内容，但导致这种行为的根本原因尚未得到充分探索。需要深入理解有害内容生成的因果机制，以便更好地检测和缓解这一问题。

Method: 采用因果中介分析方法，在模型层、模块（MLP和注意力块）以及单个神经元等多个粒度上进行分析，识别导致有害生成的因果因素。

Result: 实验表明：1）有害生成主要发生在模型的后层；2）主要由MLP模块而非注意力模块的故障引起；3）与作为有害生成门控机制的稀疏神经元集合相关；4）早期层用于理解提示中的有害性上下文，然后通过模型传播到后层。

Conclusion: 有害内容生成遵循特定的因果路径：早期层识别有害性上下文，通过MLP模块传播信号，最终由后层稀疏神经元门控机制决定是否生成有害内容。这为检测和缓解有害生成提供了新的见解。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have been shown to generate harmful content. However, the underlying causes of such behavior remain under explored. We propose a causal mediation analysis-based approach to identify the causal factors responsible for harmful generation. Our method performs a multi-granular analysis across model layers, modules (MLP and attention blocks), and individual neurons. Extensive experiments on state-of-the-art LLMs indicate that harmful generation arises in the later layers of the model, results primarily from failures in MLP blocks rather than attention blocks, and is associated with neurons that act as a gating mechanism for harmful generation. The results indicate that the early layers in the model are used for a contextual understanding of harmfulness in a prompt, which is then propagated through the model, to generate harmfulness in the late layers, as well as a signal indicating harmfulness through MLP blocks. This is then further propagated to the last layer of the model, specifically to a sparse set of neurons, which receives the signal and determines the generation of harmful content accordingly.

</details>


### [541] [DreamKG: A KG-Augmented Conversational System for People Experiencing Homelessness](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11703)
*Javad M Alizadeh,Genhui Zheng,Chiu C Tan,Yuzhou Chen,Omar Martinez,Philip McCallion,Ying Ding,Chenguang Yang,AnneMarie Tomosky,Huanmei Wu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: DreamKG是一个基于知识图谱增强的对话系统，专门为无家可归者提供社区服务的准确信息查询，通过结合Neo4j知识图谱和结构化查询理解，有效避免LLM幻觉问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 无家可归者面临获取社区服务信息的巨大障碍，现有大型语言模型容易产生幻觉，无法提供准确、及时的服务信息

Method: 结合Neo4j知识图谱和结构化查询理解，构建混合架构系统，支持位置感知和时间敏感的查询，进行空间推理（距离推荐）和时间过滤（营业时间）

Result: 初步评估显示，在相关查询上比Google Search AI优越59%，对无关查询的拒绝率达到84%

Conclusion: 混合架构结合LLM的灵活性和知识图谱的可靠性，能有效改善弱势群体的服务可及性，展示了这种方法的潜力

Abstract: People experiencing homelessness (PEH) face substantial barriers to accessing timely, accurate information about community services. DreamKG addresses this through a knowledge graph-augmented conversational system that grounds responses in verified, up-to-date data about Philadelphia organizations, services, locations, and hours. Unlike standard large language models (LLMs) prone to hallucinations, DreamKG combines Neo4j knowledge graphs with structured query understanding to handle location-aware and time-sensitive queries reliably. The system performs spatial reasoning for distance-based recommendations and temporal filtering for operating hours. Preliminary evaluation shows 59% superiority over Google Search AI on relevant queries and 84% rejection of irrelevant queries. This demonstration highlights the potential of hybrid architectures that combines LLM flexibility with knowledge graph reliability to improve service accessibility for vulnerable populations effectively.

</details>


### [542] [SWE-AGILE: A Software Agent Framework for Efficiently Managing Dynamic Reasoning Context](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11716)
*Shuquan Lian,Juncheng Liu,Yazhe Chen,Yuhong Chen,Hui Li*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: SWE-AGILE提出了一种新的软件代理框架，通过动态推理上下文策略解决自主软件工程中推理深度与上下文限制的平衡问题，在保持推理连续性的同时避免上下文爆炸。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有ReAct风格的自主软件工程方法缺乏显式的System-2推理能力来处理复杂边缘情况，而将扩展的思维链应用于多轮软件工程任务时面临两难：保留完整推理历史会导致上下文爆炸和"迷失在中间"问题，丢弃历史则迫使代理在每个步骤冗余重新推理。

Method: SWE-AGILE引入了动态推理上下文策略，维护一个详细推理的"滑动窗口"以保证即时连续性，同时将历史推理内容压缩为简洁的推理摘要，从而在推理深度、效率和上下文约束之间取得平衡。

Result: SWE-AGILE在SWE-Bench-Verified上为7B-8B模型设立了新标准，仅使用2.2k轨迹和896个任务就取得了优异表现。

Conclusion: SWE-AGILE成功解决了自主软件工程中推理深度与上下文管理的根本困境，通过创新的动态推理上下文策略实现了高效且深入的软件工程任务处理。

Abstract: Prior representative ReAct-style approaches in autonomous Software Engineering (SWE) typically lack the explicit System-2 reasoning required for deep analysis and handling complex edge cases. While recent reasoning models demonstrate the potential of extended Chain-of-Thought (CoT), applying them to the multi-turn SWE task creates a fundamental dilemma: retaining full reasoning history leads to context explosion and ``Lost-in-the-Middle'' degradation, while discarding it would force the agent to redundantly re-reason at every step. To address these challenges, we propose SWE-AGILE, a novel software agent framework designed to bridge the gap between reasoning depth, efficiency, and context constraints. SWE-AGILE introduces a Dynamic Reasoning Context strategy, maintaining a ``sliding window'' of detailed reasoning for immediate continuity to prevent redundant re-analyzing, while compressing historical reasoning content into concise Reasoning Digests. Empirically, SWE-AGILE sets a new standard for 7B-8B models on SWE-Bench-Verified using only 2.2k trajectories and 896 tasks. Code is available at https://github.com/KDEGroup/SWE-AGILE.

</details>


### [543] [A Mamba-Based Multimodal Network for Multiscale Blast-Induced Rapid Structural Damage Assessment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11709)
*Wanli Ma,Sivasakthy Selvakumaran,Dain G. Farrimond,Adam A. Dennis,Samuel E. Rigby*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出一种基于Mamba的多模态网络，用于快速结构损伤评估，整合多尺度爆炸载荷信息与光学遥感图像，在2020年贝鲁特爆炸案例中表现优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统现场检查受限于可访问性、安全风险和时间限制，特别是在大规模爆炸后。现有机器学习方法需要大量训练数据和数据集，且未能纳入爆炸载荷的关键物理特性，限制了实际应用。

Method: 提出基于Mamba的多模态网络，整合多尺度爆炸载荷信息与光学遥感图像，用于快速结构损伤评估。

Result: 在2020年贝鲁特爆炸案例评估中，该方法显著优于现有最先进方法。

Conclusion: 该方法通过整合爆炸载荷物理特性与遥感图像，提高了结构损伤评估的准确性和实用性，代码已开源。

Abstract: Accurate and rapid structural damage assessment (SDA) is crucial for post-disaster management, helping responders prioritise resources, plan rescues, and support recovery. Traditional field inspections, though precise, are limited by accessibility, safety risks, and time constraints, especially after large explosions. Machine learning with remote sensing has emerged as a scalable solution for rapid SDA, with Mamba-based networks achieving state-of-the-art performance. However, these methods often require extensive training and large datasets, limiting real-world applicability. Moreover, they fail to incorporate key physical characteristics of blast loading for SDA. To overcome these challenges, we propose a Mamba-based multimodal network for rapid SDA that integrates multi-scale blast-loading information with optical remote sensing images. Evaluated on the 2020 Beirut explosion, our method significantly improves performance over state-of-the-art approaches. Code is available at: https://github.com/IMPACTSquad/Blast-Mamba

</details>


### [544] [Detecting Safety Violations Across Many Agent Traces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11806)
*Adam Stein,Davis Brown,Hamed Hassani,Mayur Naik,Eric Wong*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: Meerkat：一种结合聚类与智能搜索的方法，用于在大量智能体轨迹中发现自然语言描述的安全违规行为，相比基线方法显著提升检测效果


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法难以检测复杂的安全违规行为，因为违规往往罕见、复杂，有时甚至被对抗性隐藏，需要跨多个轨迹分析才能发现。现有方法存在单轨迹判断遗漏跨轨迹违规、智能体审计难以扩展到大规模轨迹集合、固定监控器对未预期行为脆弱等问题。

Method: Meerkat结合聚类与智能搜索，通过结构化搜索和自适应调查有希望的区域，无需依赖种子场景、固定工作流程或穷举枚举，就能发现稀疏的违规行为。

Result: 在滥用、错位和任务博弈场景中，Meerkat相比基线监控器显著提升安全违规检测能力；在一个顶级智能体基准测试中发现广泛的开发者作弊行为；在CyBench上发现的奖励黑客示例比先前审计多近4倍。

Conclusion: Meerkat提供了一种有效的方法来检测复杂、稀疏且跨多个轨迹才能发现的安全违规行为，解决了现有方法在可扩展性、跨轨迹分析和适应性方面的局限性。

Abstract: To identify safety violations, auditors often search over large sets of agent traces. This search is difficult because failures are often rare, complex, and sometimes even adversarially hidden and only detectable when multiple traces are analyzed together. These challenges arise in diverse settings such as misuse campaigns, covert sabotage, reward hacking, and prompt injection. Existing approaches struggle here for several reasons. Per-trace judges miss failures that only become visible across traces, naive agentic auditing does not scale to large trace collections, and fixed monitors are brittle to unanticipated behaviors. We introduce Meerkat, which combines clustering with agentic search to uncover violations specified in natural language. Through structured search and adaptive investigation of promising regions, Meerkat finds sparse failures without relying on seed scenarios, fixed workflows, or exhaustive enumeration. Across misuse, misalignment, and task gaming settings, Meerkat significantly improves detection of safety violations over baseline monitors, discovers widespread developer cheating on a top agent benchmark, and finds nearly 4x more examples of reward hacking on CyBench than previous audits.

</details>


### [545] [Collaborative Multi-Agent Scripts Generation for Enhancing Imperfect-Information Reasoning in Murder Mystery Games](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11741)
*Keyang Zhong,Junlin Xie,Hefeng Wu,Haofeng Li,Guanbin Li*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出一个协作多智能体框架，用于评估和合成高质量的角色驱动多人游戏剧本，通过两阶段智能体监控训练策略增强视觉语言模型在不确定和欺骗性信息下的多跳推理能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 视觉语言模型在感知任务中表现出色，但在多人游戏设置中面对不完美和欺骗性信息时，复杂多跳推理能力会下降。需要研究如何在不确定、对抗性和社会复杂条件下提升模型的多模态多跳推理能力。

Method: 1) 提出协作多智能体框架，生成角色驱动的多人游戏剧本，包含角色背景、视觉和文本线索、多跳推理链；2) 设计两阶段智能体监控训练策略：基于思维链的微调（处理不确定性和欺骗性数据）和GRPO强化学习（智能体监控奖励塑造）。

Result: 该方法显著提升了视觉语言模型在叙事推理、隐藏事实提取和抗欺骗理解方面的性能，为在不确定、对抗性和社会复杂条件下训练和评估视觉语言模型提供了可扩展的解决方案。

Conclusion: 该研究为多模态多跳推理在不完美信息下的未来基准测试奠定了基础，展示了通过协作多智能体框架和智能体监控训练策略可以有效增强视觉语言模型在复杂社会推理任务中的能力。

Abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) have shown impressive capabilities in perceptual tasks, yet they degrade in complex multi-hop reasoning under multiplayer game settings with imperfect and deceptive information. In this paper, we study a representative multiplayer task, Murder Mystery Games, which require inferring hidden truths based on partial clues provided by roles with different intentions. To address this challenge, we propose a collaborative multi-agent framework for evaluating and synthesizing high-quality, role-driven multiplayer game scripts, enabling fine-grained interaction patterns tailored to character identities (i.e., murderer vs. innocent). Our system generates rich multimodal contexts, including character backstories, visual and textual clues, and multi-hop reasoning chains, through coordinated agent interactions. We design a two-stage agent-monitored training strategy to enhance the reasoning ability of VLMs: (1) chain-of-thought based fine-tuning on curated and synthetic datasets that model uncertainty and deception; (2) GRPO-based reinforcement learning with agent-monitored reward shaping, encouraging the model to develop character-specific reasoning behaviors and effective multimodal multi-hop inference. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method significantly boosts the performance of VLMs in narrative reasoning, hidden fact extraction, and deception-resilient understanding. Our contributions offer a scalable solution for training and evaluating VLMs under uncertain, adversarial, and socially complex conditions, laying the groundwork for future benchmarks in multimodal multi-hop reasoning under imperfect information.

</details>


### [546] [Retrieval Is Not Enough: Why Organizational AI Needs Epistemic Infrastructure](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11759)
*Federico Bottino,Carlo Ferrero,Nicholas Dosio,Pierfrancesco Beneventano*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: OIDA框架通过结构化知识对象和知识引力引擎，为组织AI提供认知保真度，区分不同认知状态并建模组织无知


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前组织AI的知识检索系统缺乏认知结构，无法区分已采纳决策与废弃假设、争议主张与确定事实、已知信息与未解决问题。组织AI的瓶颈不是检索保真度而是认知保真度。

Method: 提出OIDA框架，将组织知识结构化为带类型的知识对象，包含认知类别、重要性分数（带类别特定衰减）和带符号的矛盾边。知识引力引擎确定性维护分数并保证收敛。引入QUESTION机制作为建模无知的原语。

Result: 在控制比较中，OIDA的RAG条件（3,868 tokens）获得EQS 0.530，而全上下文基线（108,687 tokens）获得0.848。QUESTION机制统计显著（Fisher p=0.0325，OR=21.0）。

Conclusion: OIDA通过结构化认知属性和建模组织无知，为组织AI提供了认知保真度。QUESTION机制能有效识别组织未知领域，形式化属性已建立，决定性消融实验已预注册但尚未运行。

Abstract: Organizational knowledge used by AI agents typically lacks epistemic structure: retrieval systems surface semantically relevant content without distinguishing binding decisions from abandoned hypotheses, contested claims from settled ones, or known facts from unresolved questions. We argue that the ceiling on organizational AI is not retrieval fidelity but \emph{epistemic} fidelity--the system's ability to represent commitment strength, contradiction status, and organizational ignorance as computable properties.
  We present OIDA, a framework that structures organizational knowledge as typed Knowledge Objects carrying epistemic class, importance scores with class-specific decay, and signed contradiction edges. The Knowledge Gravity Engine maintains scores deterministically with proved convergence guarantees (sufficient condition: max degree $< 7$; empirically robust to degree 43). OIDA introduces QUESTION-as-modeled-ignorance: a primitive with inverse decay that surfaces what an organization does \emph{not} know with increasing urgency--a mechanism absent from all surveyed systems. We describe the Epistemic Quality Score (EQS), a five-component evaluation methodology with explicit circularity analysis. In a controlled comparison ($n{=}10$ response pairs), OIDA's RAG condition (3,868 tokens) achieves EQS 0.530 vs.\ 0.848 for a full-context baseline (108,687 tokens); the $28.1\times$ token budget difference is the primary confound. The QUESTION mechanism is statistically validated (Fisher $p{=}0.0325$, OR$=21.0$). The formal properties are established; the decisive ablation at equal token budget (E4) is pre-registered and not yet run.

</details>


### [547] [GenTac: Generative Modeling and Forecasting of Soccer Tactics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11786)
*Jiayuan Rao,Tianlin Gui,Haoning Wu,Yanfeng Wang,Weidi Xie*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: GenTac是一个基于扩散模型的生成框架，用于建模足球战术，通过历史跟踪数据学习球员运动分布，生成多样化、合理的长时程轨迹，并支持丰富的上下文条件控制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有计算方法通常产生单一确定性轨迹预测或专注于高度结构化的定位球，无法捕捉真实比赛演化的固有方差和分支可能性。足球战术建模面临随机性、多智能体性质的挑战。

Method: 引入GenTac扩散生成框架，将足球战术概念化为连续多球员轨迹和离散语义事件的随机过程。支持丰富的上下文条件控制，包括对手行为、特定球队/联赛风格、战略目标，并将连续空间动态映射到15类战术事件空间。

Result: 在TacBench基准测试中展示四项关键能力：1)高几何精度同时保持团队集体结构一致性；2)准确模拟风格差异，区分特定球队和联赛；3)支持可控反事实模拟，基于攻防指导改变空间控制和预期威胁指标；4)可靠预测未来战术结果。可泛化到篮球、美式足球和冰球等其他动态团队运动。

Conclusion: GenTac为开放比赛足球战术建模提供了有效的生成框架，能够捕捉比赛的内在随机性和多样性，支持战术分析和反事实推理，并展示出跨运动泛化能力。

Abstract: Modeling open-play soccer tactics is a formidable challenge due to the stochastic, multi-agent nature of the game. Existing computational approaches typically produce single, deterministic trajectory forecasts or focus on highly structured set-pieces, fundamentally failing to capture the inherent variance and branching possibilities of real-world match evolution. Here, we introduce GenTac, a diffusion-based generative framework that conceptualizes soccer tactics as a stochastic process over continuous multi-player trajectories and discrete semantic events. By learning the underlying distribution of player movements from historical tracking data, GenTac samples diverse, plausible, long-horizon future trajectories. The framework supports rich contextual conditioning, including opponent behavior, specific team or league playing styles, and strategic objectives, while grounding continuous spatial dynamics into a 15-class tactical event space. Extensive evaluations on our proposed benchmark, TacBench, demonstrate four key capabilities: (1) GenTac achieves high geometric accuracy while strictly preserving the collective structural consistency of the team; (2) it accurately simulates stylistic nuances, distinguishing between specific teams (e.g., Auckland FC) and leagues (e.g., A-League versus German leagues); (3) it enables controllable counterfactual simulations, demonstrably altering spatial control and expected threat metrics based on offensive or defensive guidance; and (4) it reliably anticipates future tactical outcomes directly from generated rollouts. Finally, we demonstrate that GenTac can be successfully trained to generalize to other dynamic team sports, including basketball, American football, and ice hockey.

</details>


<div id='math.OC'></div>

# math.OC [[Back]](#toc)

### [548] [ProxiCBO: A Provably Convergent Consensus-Based Method for Composite Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09789)
*Haoyu Zhang,Yanting Ma,Ruangrawee Kitichotku,Joshua Rapp,Petros Boufounos*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 提出ProxiCBO方法，将共识优化与近端梯度结合，解决非凸复合优化问题，在信号处理任务中表现优于现有方法


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 信号处理中广泛存在非凸复合优化问题，现有方法在处理复杂优化景观和利用复合结构方面存在不足

Method: 结合共识优化(CBO)与近端梯度技术，提出ProxiCBO方法，建立连续时间有限粒子动力学全局收敛保证，开发交替更新方案

Result: 在信号恢复和参数估计等信号处理任务中，ProxiCBO在精度和粒子效率方面优于现有近端梯度方法和CBO方法

Conclusion: ProxiCBO为处理非凸复合优化问题提供了一种有效方法，特别适用于信号处理应用，具有理论保证和实际优势

Abstract: This paper introduces an interacting-particle optimization method tailored to possibly non-convex composite optimization problems, which arise widely in signal processing. The proposed method, \emph{ProxiCBO}, integrates consensus-based optimization (CBO) with proximal gradient techniques to handle challenging optimization landscapes and exploit the composite structure of the objective function. We establish global convergence guarantees for the continuous-time finite-particle dynamics and develop an alternating update scheme for efficient practical implementation. Simulation results for signal processing tasks, including signal recovery from one-bit quantized measurements and parameter estimation from single-photon lidar data, demonstrate that ProxiCBO outperforms existing proximal gradient methods and CBO methods in terms of both accuracy and particle-efficiency.

</details>


### [549] [Some properties of sets, functions, and multi-objective optimization problems using p-convexity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09882)
*Cristian Vera*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 该论文研究n维欧几里得空间中集合和函数的p-凸性概念，建立了该广义凸性框架下的代数与拓扑结果，并分析了在分量函数p-凸性假设下的多目标优化问题，特别关注弱有效最小值。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究p-凸性这一广义凸性概念，旨在扩展传统凸性理论，为多目标优化问题提供更一般的理论框架和分析工具。

Method: 在n维欧几里得空间中定义集合和函数的p-凸性，建立相关的代数与拓扑性质，然后在分量函数满足p-凸性的假设下分析多目标优化问题。

Result: 建立了p-凸性框架下的新颖代数与拓扑结果，推导了多目标优化问题中弱有效最小值对应解集的多种特征和性质。

Conclusion: p-凸性为多目标优化提供了有效的广义凸性框架，所建立的理论结果能够更好地描述和分析弱有效最小值解集的性质。

Abstract: In this paper, we investigate the concept of p-convexity for sets and functions in n-dimensional Euclidean space. We establish novel algebraic and topological results within this generalized convexity framework. Furthermore, we analyze multi-objective optimization problems, with a particular emphasis on weakly efficient minima, under the assumption of $p$-convexity of the component functions. Several characterizations and properties of the corresponding solution sets are derived.

</details>


### [550] [Convex Synthesis of First-Order Methods for Time-Varying Smooth Strongly Convex Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09926)
*Bryan Van Scoy,Gianluca Bianchin*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 提出一个鲁棒控制综合框架，用于设计时变光滑强凸问题的一阶方法，通过嵌入底层变化模型来提升动态环境中的决策性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 时变优化在动态环境决策中至关重要，但静态问题设计的算法在动态场景中即使渐近也会产生次优决策，需要专门针对时变问题设计更优的算法。

Method: 结合静态设置中的凸鲁棒控制综合和内部模型原理，通过直接将底层变化模型嵌入到设计的算法中，开发鲁棒控制综合框架来系统设计一阶方法。

Result: 开发了一个系统性的框架，能够为时变光滑强凸问题设计一阶优化方法，通过嵌入变化模型来提升算法在动态环境中的性能。

Conclusion: 提出的鲁棒控制综合框架为时变优化问题提供了系统化的算法设计方法，通过结合控制理论和优化理论，能够有效处理动态环境中的决策问题。

Abstract: Time-varying optimization is fundamental to decision-making in dynamic environments, where objectives evolve over time due to exogenous signals or data streams. However, algorithms designed for static problems yield suboptimal decisions in dynamic scenarios, even asymptotically. In this paper, we develop a robust control synthesis framework to systematically design first-order methods for smooth strongly convex problems that vary in time. Our approach leverages both convex robust control synthesis in the static setting and the internal model principle by directly embedding a model of the underlying variability into the designed algorithm.

</details>


### [551] [A simulation-optimization approach for fractional, profitability-oriented inventory control under service-level type constraints](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10012)
*Tianxiao Sun,Noah Schwarzkopf*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 该研究提出了一种结合随机模拟与利润导向优化的数据驱动决策框架，用于在不确定性下优化库存管理，平衡成本效率与服务可靠性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代物流中库存管理面临核心挑战：如何在不可预测的市场条件下平衡成本效率与可靠服务。传统模型往往忽视库存投资与整体财务绩效之间的直接联系。

Method: 开发了一个数据驱动决策框架，结合随机模拟和利润导向优化。模拟阶段生成多种运营场景下的性能估计，提供支出、收入和服务可靠性的现实数据。这些结果输入到分数优化过程中，寻找在保持所需可用性水平的同时产生最高财务回报的策略。算法通过模拟结果与优化结果之间的反馈迭代优化参数值。

Result: 使用代表性业务设置的计算实验证实，该方法同时提高了服务一致性和财务收益。框架展示了将运营响应能力与可持续盈利能力对齐的实用数据驱动路径。

Conclusion: 该框架为企业寻求在不确定性下优化库存管理提供了实用的数据驱动方法，能够同时提升服务可靠性和财务绩效，实现运营响应能力与可持续盈利能力的平衡。

Abstract: Managing stock efficiently remains a core issue in modern logistics, where companies must reconcile cost efficiency with dependable service despite unpredictable market conditions. Conventional models often overlook the direct connection between investment in inventory and overall financial performance. This study introduces a data-driven decision framework that combines stochastic simulations with a profit-oriented optimization routine to enhance decision-making under uncertainty. The simulation stage generates performance estimates across multiple operating scenarios, providing realistic data on expenditures, revenues, and service reliability. These outcomes inform a fractional optimization process that searches for policies yielding the highest financial returns while maintaining required availability levels. The algorithm iteratively refines parameter values through feedback between simulated outcomes and optimization results, ensuring adaptability to dynamic enterprise systems. Computational experiments using representative business settings confirm that this approach improves both service consistency and financial yield. Overall, the framework demonstrates a practical, data-driven path for firms seeking to align operational responsiveness with sustainable profitability.

</details>


### [552] [A Bifidelity Proximal Quasi-Newton Method for Dense Rigid Body Suspension Collision Resolution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10089)
*Nicholas Rummel,Tyler Jensen,Stephen Becker,Eduardo Corona*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 提出Mono-PQN和Bi-PQN方法，高效求解稠密刚性体悬浮液模拟中的线性互补问题，显著减少计算时间


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 稠密刚性体悬浮液的直接数值模拟计算成本高昂，特别是求解线性互补问题(LCP)时，每次矩阵向量积都需要求解昂贵的偏微分方程

Method: 开发了单保真度近端拟牛顿法(Mono-PQN)和双保真度变体(Bi-PQN)，通过定制化算法高效求解LCP问题

Result: Mono-PQN和Bi-PQN分别实现约1.5倍和超过2倍的加速，Bi-PQN表现出与问题规模无关的鲁棒收敛性，216个粒子模拟从8天缩短到5天

Conclusion: 提出的PQN方法能高效求解稠密悬浮液模拟中的LCP问题，显著降低计算成本，为大规模模拟提供可行方案

Abstract: Direct numerical simulation of dense rigid body suspensions poses significant computational challenges. A popular approach to resolve collisions necessitates solving a linear complementary problem (LCP) per time step. Each matrix vector product (MVP) inside the LCP requires solving an expensive partial differential equation. In this work, we show the LCP can be solved efficiently, often in only three to four MVPs. Specifically, we develop a custom monofidelity proximal quasi-Newton (Mono-PQN) method and a bi-fidelity variant (Bi-PQN). Our approach is validated through an application to representative systems of dense Stokesian Janus particles. Notably, in contact resolution our Mono-PQN and Bi-PQN achieve $\approx 1.5 \times$ and $> 2 \times$ speed up respectively against a competitive baseline, with the latter method displaying robust, problem-size-independent convergence. For our largest simulation involving $216$ particles, our Bi-PQN cut total simulation runtime to five days, as compared to the eight days required by the prior state-of-the-art method.

</details>


### [553] [Byzantine-Robust Distributed SGD: A Unified Analysis and Tight Error Bounds](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10179)
*Boyuan Ruan,Xiaoyu Wang,Ya-Feng Liu*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文为拜占庭鲁棒分布式SGD提供了统一的收敛分析框架，涵盖数据异构性，分析了带/不带局部动量的变体，建立了收敛率并证明局部动量能降低随机性误差，同时推导了匹配的下界证明上界紧致。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管拜占庭鲁棒分布式优化已有多种聚合规则，但缺乏一个能容纳一般数据异构性的统一收敛分析框架。本文旨在填补这一空白，为拜占庭鲁棒分布式SGD提供全面的收敛理论。

Method: 分析拜占庭鲁棒分布式随机梯度下降(SGD)的变体，包括带局部动量和不带局部动量的版本。在一般数据异构性假设下，对非凸光滑目标和满足Polyak-Lojasiewicz条件的目标建立收敛理论。

Result: 证明了随机性和数据异构性会引入不可避免的误差下限，但局部动量能有效降低随机性引起的误差分量。推导了匹配的下界，表明所得上界是紧致的，刻画了在随机性和数据异构性下拜占庭鲁棒性的基本极限。

Conclusion: 本文为拜占庭鲁棒分布式SGD提供了统一的收敛分析框架，理论分析表明局部动量能改善随机性误差，同时通过匹配下界证明了理论结果的紧致性，实证结果支持了理论发现。

Abstract: Byzantine-robust distributed optimization relies on robust aggregation rules to mitigate the influence of malicious Byzantine workers. Despite the proliferation of such rules, a unified convergence analysis framework that accommodates general data heterogeneity is lacking. In this work, we provide a thorough convergence theory of Byzantine-robust distributed stochastic gradient descent (SGD), analyzing variants both with and without local momentum. We establish the convergence rates for nonconvex smooth objectives and those satisfying the Polyak-Lojasiewicz condition under a general data heterogeneity assumption. Our analysis reveals that while stochasticity and data heterogeneity introduce unavoidable error floors, local momentum provably reduces the error component induced by stochasticity. Furthermore, we derive matching lower bounds to demonstrate that the upper bounds obtained in our analysis are tight and characterize the fundamental limits of Byzantine resilience under stochasticity and data heterogeneity. Empirical results support our theoretical findings.

</details>


### [554] [Policy Iteration for Stationary Discounted Hamilton--Jacobi--Bellman Equations: A Viscosity Approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10191)
*Namkyeong Cho,Yeoneung Kim*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 提出一种带人工粘性的半离散策略迭代方法，解决确定性无限时域折扣最优控制问题中HJB方程的策略迭代在PDE层面的不适定性，证明几何收敛性并获得最优误差估计。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统策略迭代(PI)在PDE层面存在根本性不适定问题：改进步骤需要点值评估∇V，这对于粘性解没有良好定义，导致相关非线性算子无法在稳定的函数意义上解释。

Method: 引入带O(h)阶人工粘性的空间离散格式，建立单调半离散公式。该正则化恢复比较原理，确保离散算子的单调性，并通过离散梯度实现明确定义的点策略改进。

Result: 证明对于固定网格尺寸h>0，半离散PI序列单调且几何收敛到唯一离散解；建立尖锐的消失粘性估计‖V^h - V‖_{L^∞} ≤ C√h；推导定量误差分解，分离策略迭代误差与离散误差。

Conclusion: 提出的正则化方法成功解决了PI在PDE层面的不适定性，揭示了与有限时域情况根本不同的收敛机制，数值实验验证了理论预测的几何收敛和误差衰减-平台特征行为。

Abstract: We study policy iteration (PI) for deterministic infinite-horizon discounted optimal control problems, whose value function is characterized by a stationary Hamilton--Jacobi--Bellman (HJB) equation. At the PDE level, PI is fundamentally ill-posed: the improvement step requires pointwise evaluation of $\nabla V$, which is not well defined for viscosity solutions, and thus the associated nonlinear operator cannot be interpreted in a stable functional sense. We develop a monotone semi-discrete formulation for the stationary discounted setting by introducing a space-discrete scheme with artificial viscosity of order $O(h)$. This regularization restores comparison, ensures monotonicity of the discrete operator, and yields a well-defined pointwise policy improvement via discrete gradients. Our analysis reveals a convergence mechanism fundamentally different from the finite-horizon case. For each fixed mesh size $h>0$, we prove that the semi-discrete PI sequence converges monotonically and geometrically to the unique discrete solution, where the contraction is induced by the resolvent structure of the discounted operator. We further establish the sharp vanishing-viscosity estimate $\|V^h - V\|_{L^\infty} \leq C\sqrt{h}$, and derive a quantitative error decomposition that separates policy iteration error from discretization error, exhibiting a nontrivial coupling between iteration count and mesh size. Numerical experiments in nonlinear one and two-dimensional control problems confirm the theoretical predictions, including geometric convergence and the characteristic decay-then-plateau behavior of the total error.

</details>


### [555] [Hub location problems with asymmetric allocation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10307)
*I. Espejo,M. Landete,M. Leal,A. Marín*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 论文提出非对称枢纽选址问题((r,s)-AHLP)，其中起点和终点可以有不同的分配限制，特别关注(1,p)-AHLP变体，并提出两种整数规划模型，其中新的三指标紧凑模型效果更好。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有枢纽选址模型假设对称分配，即枢纽对进出流量统一处理，但实际应用中常需要非对称处理起点和终点，特别是在人道主义物流和全球供应链等场景中。

Method: 提出两种整数规划模型：四指标经典模型改编和新紧凑三指标模型，后者通过有效不等式和分解技术减少规模并提高效果。

Result: 在标准数据集上的计算研究表明，所提出的解决方法具有高效果和效率，特别是三指标模型表现更优。

Conclusion: 该研究为非对称枢纽选址问题提供了稳健的方法框架，显著扩展了枢纽选址理论在非对称流量场景的适用性，为未来复杂多层次枢纽网络设计研究奠定基础。

Abstract: Hub location problems are central to optimizing logistics, telecommunications, and transportation networks by consolidating flows through strategically placed hubs. While existing models assume symmetric allocation, where hubs handle incoming and outgoing flows uniformly, real-world applications often require asymmetric handling of origins and destinations. This paper introduces the Asymmetric Hub Location Problem ((r,s)-AHLP), a novel framework where origins and destinations may connect to hubs under distinct allocation limits (r and s, respectively). We then focus on the (1,p)-AHLP variant, where origins are single-assigned and destinations are multi-assigned, motivated by applications in humanitarian logistics and global supply chains (e.g., UN relief networks, e-commerce fulfillment).
  We propose two integer programming formulations: A four-index adaptation of classical models and a new compact three-index formulation. The latter reduces the size while improving effectiveness, supported by valid inequalities and decomposition techniques. The computational study, performed on standard datasets commonly used in hub location literature, demonstrates the high effectiveness and efficiency of the proposed solution methodology. Our work presents a robust methodological framework for the (1,p)-AHLP, significantly expanding the applicability of hub location theory to asymmetric flow contexts and providing a foundation for future studies on complex multi-level hub network design.

</details>


### [556] [From Majorization to Scaling: Advancing Convex Relaxations of Maximum Entropy Sampling Problem](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10363)
*Lingqing Shen,Fatma Kılınç-Karzan*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 提出基于majorization的统一框架和double-scaling技术，改进MESP问题的松弛界，证明新方法严格优于现有缩放方法，并在数值实验中表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: MESP是组合优化和NP难问题，现有连续松弛方法（如linx和Γ分解）的推导、相对强度及系统改进潜力尚未被充分理解，需要建立统一的分析框架和改进技术。

Method: 1) 基于majorization的统一框架用于推导和分析松弛方法；2) 提出double-scaling缩放增强技术；3) 建立Γ分解松弛的替代特征化，推导linx与Γ分解松弛间的支配关系。

Result: 理论证明double-scaling严格支配现有缩放界，首次形式化推导linx与Γ分解松弛间的支配关系，数值实验显示double-scaled linx松弛在界质量和计算效率上均优于现有方法。

Conclusion: 提出的majorization框架和double-scaling技术为MESP提供了系统化的松弛分析和改进方法，显著提升了松弛界的质量，为最优实验设计和信息获取等应用提供了更有效的工具。

Abstract: In this paper, we study the maximum entropy sampling problem (MESP) and its variants. MESP seeks to identify a small subset of variables that maximizes the determinant of a covariance submatrix, and is a fundamental model in optimal experimental design and information acquisition. Although MESP is combinatorial and NP-hard, continuous relaxations, most notably linx and $Γ$ factorization, provide tractable approximations, yet their derivation, relative strength, and potential for systematic improvement remain poorly understood. We address this gap by introducing two main ideas: a unified majorization-based framework for deriving and analyzing relaxations, and a novel scaling-based bound-enhancement technique, which we call double-scaling. Our approach is motivated by the observation that the difficulty of MESP arises from two distinct sources: the combinatorial selection structure and the lack of permutation symmetry in the spectral objective. Majorization naturally resolves the latter by symmetrizing the spectral function and yielding its convex envelope. In the log-determinant setting, we establish the main theoretical properties of double-scaling and prove that it strictly dominates previously known scaling bounds. Using our majorization-based alternative characterization of $Γ$ factorization relaxation, we also derive, for the first time, formal dominance relations between linx- and $Γ$ factorization-bounds, as well as between their scaling-strengthened variants. Our numerical results show that our double-scaled linx relaxation consistently and substantially outperforms existing scaling methods and compares quite favorably with other state-of-the-art relaxations in terms of both bound quality and computational efficiency.

</details>


### [557] [Shuffling the Data, Stretching the Step-size: Sharper Bias in constant step-size SGD](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10373)
*Konstantinos Emmanouilidis,Emmanouil-Vasileios Vlatakis-Gkaragkounis,Rene Vidal*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文提出将随机重排与Richardson-Romberg外推法结合，用于有限和极小极大优化问题，在保持均方误差优势的同时，将偏差从二阶减少提升到三阶减少。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 许多机器学习任务可建模为有限和极小极大优化或变分不等式问题。虽然恒定步长的随机梯度方法简单且可扩展，但只能收敛到常数项。实践中采用两种经典技术来缓解此问题：数据随机重排和Richardson-Romberg外推法，但两者各有局限，需要探索它们的协同效应。

Method: 将随机重排与Richardson-Romberg外推法相结合。首先平滑重排引起的离散噪声，利用连续状态马尔可夫链理论建立新的大数定律和中心极限定理；然后使用谱张量技术证明外推法即使在重排引起的偏置梯度估计下也能去偏并锐化渐近行为。

Result: 组合方法不仅保持了增强的均方误差保证，还在偏差方面实现了更大的三次细化改进。实验验证了理论，在实践中持续显示出显著的加速效果。

Conclusion: 随机重排与Richardson-Romberg外推法的组合严格优于单独使用任一方法，为结构化非单调变分不等式问题中的这种协同效应提供了首个理论保证，在实践中能带来实质性加速。

Abstract: From adversarial robustness to multi-agent learning, many machine learning tasks can be cast as finite-sum min-max optimization or, more generally, as variational inequality problems (VIPs). Owing to their simplicity and scalability, stochastic gradient methods with constant step size are widely used, despite the fact that they converge only up to a constant term. Among the many heuristics adopted in practice, two classical techniques have recently attracted attention to mitigate this issue: \emph{Random Reshuffling} of data and \emph{Richardson--Romberg extrapolation} across iterates. Random Reshuffling sharpens the mean-squared error (MSE) of the estimated solution, while Richardson-Romberg extrapolation acts orthogonally, providing a second-order reduction in its bias. In this work, we show that their composition is strictly better than both, not only maintaining the enhanced MSE guarantees but also yielding an even greater cubic refinement in the bias. To the best of our knowledge, our work provides the first theoretical guarantees for such a synergy in structured non-monotone VIPs. Our analysis proceeds in two steps: (i) we smooth the discrete noise induced by reshuffling and leverage tools from continuous-state Markov chain theory to establish a novel law of large numbers and a central limit theorem for its iterates; and (ii) we employ spectral tensor techniques to prove that extrapolation debiases and sharpens the asymptotic behavior even under the biased gradient oracle induced by reshuffling. Finally, extensive experiments validate our theory, consistently demonstrating substantial speedups in practice.

</details>


### [558] [Distributed Optimization with Coupled Constraints over Time-Varying Digraph](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10422)
*Yeong-Ung Kim,Hyo-Sung Ahn*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 提出了一种分布式算法，用于解决具有非光滑局部目标函数和网络范围耦合约束的分布式凸优化问题，适用于时变有向图网络，保护隐私，收敛速度为O(1/k)。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 许多实际应用如经济调度、网络效用最大化和需求响应等都需要解决具有非光滑局部目标函数和网络范围耦合约束的分布式凸优化问题。现有方法在处理时变有向图网络和隐私保护方面存在挑战。

Method: 结合右侧分配分解和原始-对偶方法，设计分布式算法。算法在时变有向图网络上完全分布式运行，无需传输原始变量等敏感信息以保护隐私。

Result: 在局部目标函数强凸（不一定可微）且局部不等式次微分有界的条件下，通过对偶分析证明算法具有O(1/k)的最优性收敛速度。仿真验证了算法的优异性能。

Conclusion: 提出的分布式算法能有效处理具有非光滑目标函数和网络范围耦合约束的优化问题，适用于时变有向图网络，保护隐私，并具有理论保证的收敛速度。

Abstract: In this paper, we develop a distributed algorithm for solving a class of distributed convex optimization problems where the local objective functions can be a general nonsmooth function, and all equalities and inequalities are network-wide coupled. This type of problem arises from many areas, such as economic dispatch, network utility maximization, and demand response. Integrating the decomposition by right hand side allocation and primal-dual methods, the proposed algorithm is able to handle the distributed optimization over networks with time-varying directed graph in fully distributed fashion. This algorithm does not require the communication of sensitive information, such as primal variables, for privacy issues. Further, we show that the proposed algorithm is guaranteed to achieve an $O(1/k)$ rate of convergence in terms of optimality based on duality analysis under the condition that local objective functions are strongly convex but not necessarily differentiable, and the subdifferential of local inequalities is bounded. We simulate the proposed algorithm to demonstrate its remarkable performance.

</details>


### [559] [Discrete-Time Backward Stochastic LQ Control Problem](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10510)
*Hu Ligui,Meng Qingxin,Tang Maoning*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 该论文研究了具有非齐次系统项和成本函数交叉项的离散时间后向随机线性二次最优控制问题，提出了系统等价变换和解耦技术来解决Riccati方程中的结构不对称问题，并给出了最优控制的显式状态反馈表达式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 后向随机系统的终端约束使其与前向随机系统不同，带来了独特的分析和求解挑战。现有研究在处理具有交叉项的成本函数时，Riccati方程存在结构不对称问题，需要新的理论框架来解决。

Method: 在希尔伯特空间框架下，首先澄清问题可解性的充要条件，然后引入后向随机系统最大值原理推导表征最优控制的哈密顿系统。通过对原问题进行等价变换，使用解耦方法获得相应的Riccati方程。

Result: 提出了最优控制的显式状态反馈表达式和价值函数的解析形式，并通过数值例子验证了所提方法的有效性和可行性。解决了Riccati方程中交叉项成本函数带来的结构不对称问题。

Conclusion: 该研究扩展了模型的通用性，提出的系统等价变换和解耦技术为金融投资组合优化和风险管理等动态优化问题提供了新的分析框架。

Abstract: This paper focuses on the discrete-time backward stochastic linear quadratic (BSLQ) optimal control problem with nonhomogeneous system terms and cost function cross terms. The terminal constraint of such systems distinguishes it from forward stochastic systems, posing unique challenges for analysis and solution. Within the Hilbert space framework, we first clarify the necessary and sufficient conditions for problem solvability, then introduce the backward stochastic system maximum principle to derive the Hamiltonian system characterizing the optimal control. After equivalent transformation of the original problem, we use the decoupling method to obtain the corresponding Riccati equation, and present the explicit state feedback expression of the optimal control and the analytical form of the value function. Finally, numerical examples verify the effectiveness and feasibility of the proposed method. The innovation lies in expanding the model generality: addressing the structural asymmetry issue in the Riccati equation with cross-term cost functions, we propose system equivalent transformation and decoupling techniques. Our theoretical results provide a new analytical framework for dynamic optimization problems such as financial portfolio optimization and risk management.

</details>


### [560] [Unified Compression Algorithm for Distributed Nonconvex Optimization: Generalized to 1-Bit, Saturation, and Bounded Noise](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10615)
*Haonan Wang,Minghui Liwang,Yiguang Hong,Karl H. Johansson,Xinlei Yi*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 提出统一压缩算法处理分布式非凸优化，支持局部和全局有界压缩器，包括1-bit压缩器、饱和量化器等，在非凸设置下提供严格收敛分析，在P-L条件下达到线性收敛。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 分布式优化中通信压缩对于减少通信开销至关重要，但现有方法通常针对特定压缩器设计，缺乏统一框架。需要能够同时处理局部有界和全局有界压缩器的通用算法，包括1-bit压缩器、饱和量化器等常见压缩技术。

Method: 提出统一压缩算法框架，支持两类压缩器：局部有界压缩器（如1-bit压缩器、饱和量化器）和全局有界压缩器（具有相对和绝对压缩误差）。算法包含额外有界噪声处理能力，并提供严格收敛分析。

Result: 1) 局部有界类在分布式非凸设置下达到O(1/√T)收敛率，与集中式1-bit压缩算法匹配；2) 增加一轮初始未压缩通信可提升至O(1/T^{2/3})；3) P-L条件下达到线性收敛；4) 全局有界类恢复最先进收敛率。

Conclusion: 该统一压缩算法框架为分布式非凸优化提供了通用的压缩解决方案，支持多种压缩器类型，在保持收敛性能的同时显著减少通信开销，为实际分布式系统部署提供了理论保障。

Abstract: In this paper, we propose a unified compression algorithm for distributed nonconvex opitmization with both the locally- and globally-bounded communication compressors, including 1-bit compressors, saturating quantizers, and the globally-bounded compressors with both relative and absolute compression errors, as well as additional arbitrary bounded noise. We provide a rigorous convergence analysis in nonconvex settings and establish linear convergence under the Polyak-Lojasiewicz (P-L) condition. Notably, we establish an $\mathcal{O}(1/\sqrt{T})$ convergence rate for the locally-bounded class in the distributed nonconvex setting, matching that achieved by the centralized algorithms with 1-bit compressors, where $T$ denotes the total number of iterations. Moreover, one initial uncompressed communication round further yields an order-wise improvement to $\mathcal{O}(1/T^{2/3})$. For the P-L setting and the globally-bounded class, we recover state-of-the-art convergence rates.

</details>


### [561] [A Hierarchical Robust Control Strategy for Stochastic Kuramoto--Sivashinsky--Korteweg--de Vries Equations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10714)
*Abdellatif Elgrou,Omar Oukdach,Abdelaziz Rhandi*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 研究一维前向线性随机KS-KdV方程的鲁棒Stackelberg零能控性，采用分层Stackelberg博弈框架，包含两个领导者、一个跟随者和最坏情况扰动。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究随机KS-KdV方程在存在扰动情况下的鲁棒控制问题，解决随机设置带来的分析困难，实现系统状态及其空间导数的跟踪控制。

Method: 采用分层Stackelberg博弈框架，结合对偶技术和新的Carleman估计方法，将鲁棒控制问题转化为强耦合前向-后向随机KS-KdV系统的零能控性问题。

Result: 证明了鲁棒控制问题存在鞍点，并通过Carleman估计和对偶技术解决了强耦合前向-后向随机KS-KdV系统的零能控性问题。

Conclusion: 成功建立了随机KS-KdV方程的鲁棒Stackelberg零能控性理论，为随机高阶偏微分方程的鲁棒控制提供了新的分析方法。

Abstract: We investigate the robust Stackelberg null controllability of a one-dimensional forward linear stochastic Kuramoto--Sivashinsky--Korteweg--de Vries (KS--KdV) equation. The control framework is formulated as a hierarchical Stackelberg game involving two leaders, one follower, and worst-case disturbances acting in both the drift and diffusion terms. The first leader acts to drive the system to rest, while the second leader is introduced to overcome analytical difficulties arising from the stochastic setting. The follower, by reducing the effect of the disturbances, addresses a tracking-type control problem aimed at keeping the system state and its first and second spatial derivatives close to prescribed target trajectories. First, the robust control problem is characterized by the existence of a saddle point. Then, the analysis is reduced to the null controllability of a strongly coupled forward--backward stochastic KS--KdV system. The problem is addressed by combining a duality technique with new Carleman estimates for forward and backward stochastic fourth-order parabolic equations.

</details>


### [562] [Last Iterate Convergence of AdaGrad-Norm for Convex Non-Smooth Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10728)
*Margarita Preobrazhenskaia,Makar Sidorov,Igor Preobrazhenskii,Eduard Gorbunov*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文证明了AdaGrad方法最后迭代点的收敛率为O(1/N^{1/4})，这是最优且严格的，比其平均迭代的经典O(1/N^{1/2})速率更差。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管AdaGrad作为自适应次梯度方法支撑着广泛算法类别，但现有收敛分析主要关注平均（或最佳）迭代点，缺乏对最后迭代点收敛性的理论保证。

Method: 引入指数参数捕捉累积平方次梯度的增长，结合Zamani和Glineur(2025)的最后迭代不等式，将问题转化为特定级数的边界分析。

Result: 在最优步长调参下，最后迭代点的收敛率为O(1/N^{1/4})，并通过匹配的下界构造证明该速率是紧的，且严格差于平均迭代的O(1/N^{1/2})速率。

Conclusion: AdaGrad最后迭代点的收敛速率是O(1/N^{1/4})，这一理论结果填补了自适应优化方法收敛分析的重要空白，揭示了最后迭代与平均迭代之间的性能差异。

Abstract: We study the convergence of the last iterate (i.e., the $(N+1)$-th iterate) of the AdaGrad method. Although AdaGrad -- an adaptive subgradient method -- underpins a wide class of algorithms, most existing convergence analyses focus on averaged (or best) iterates. We derive worst-case upper bounds on the suboptimality of the final point and show that, with an optimally tuned stepsize parameter, the last iterate converges at the rate $O(1/N^{1/4})$. We complement this guarantee with matching lower-bound constructions, proving that this rate is tight and that AdaGrad's last-iterate rate is strictly worse than the classical $O(1/N^{1/2})$ rate for its averaged iterate. Technically, our analysis introduces an exponent parameter that captures the growth of the cumulative squared subgradients; combined with the last-iterate inequality of Zamani and Glineur (2025), this reduces the problem to bounding a particular series.

</details>


### [563] [Stabilizability of first-order dynamics in second-order systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10757)
*Matthew D. Kvalheim*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 研究二阶系统能否通过反馈控制使其行为类似于预设的一阶动力系统，得到正反两方面结果：全驱动系统可实现全局指数稳定，而欠驱动系统在欧拉特征非零流形上无法局部渐近稳定。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索二阶控制系统能否通过反馈设计来精确模拟预设的一阶动力系统行为，这在机器人学、力学系统控制等领域有重要应用价值。

Method: 采用几何控制理论方法，将向量场视为切丛的截面，研究二阶系统（包括大多数拉格朗日系统）能否通过反馈控制使预设向量场渐近稳定。

Result: 正结果：全驱动系统中，任何光滑向量场对应的截面都能实现全局指数稳定和正常双曲性；负结果：在欧拉特征非零流形上的欠驱动系统中，"几乎所有"光滑向量场无法局部渐近稳定。

Conclusion: 二阶系统能否模拟一阶动力系统取决于驱动程度和流形拓扑特性：全驱动系统可实现精确模拟，而欠驱动系统在特定拓扑条件下存在根本性限制。

Abstract: We study whether second-order systems can be made to behave like prescribed first-order dynamical systems through feedback control. More precisely, we study whether prescribed vector fields on compact smooth manifolds, viewed geometrically as sections of the tangent bundle, can be asymptotically stabilized in a strong sense by second-order control systems on the base manifold. Our class of second-order systems includes most Lagrangian systems, and we obtain both positive and negative results. The positive result asserts that, for fully actuated systems, the section corresponding to any smooth vector field can be made globally exponentially stable, normally hyperbolic, and more. In particular, not only does each closed-loop solution asymptotically have the prescribed velocities, but it also converges to a trajectory of the first-order dynamics generated by the prescribed vector field at an exponential rate. Thus, the closed-loop second-order system asymptotically reproduces the prescribed first-order dynamics. In contrast, the negative result asserts that, for underactuated systems on manifolds with nonzero Euler characteristic, sections corresponding to "almost all" smooth vector fields cannot even be locally asymptotically stabilized. This includes, in particular, all vector fields with only isolated zeros. An example shows that the Euler characteristic assumption is necessary for the negative result.

</details>


### [564] [Convergence and Stability of a Catching-Up Algorithm for Differential Inclusions with Maximal Monotone Operators](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10774)
*Tan H. Cao,Hassan Saoud*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文研究了一类由具有连续扰动的极大单调算子驱动的微分包含问题的追赶算法，建立了解的存在性、能量界、唯一性和稳定性，分析了变步长离散化方案的收敛性，并给出了数值验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究由极大单调算子驱动的微分包含问题的数值解法，这类问题在力学、优化和控制等领域有广泛应用。需要开发能够处理连续扰动、变步长和近似投影的鲁棒数值算法。

Method: 采用追赶算法，将单调算子分解为其单值部分的闭凸包和闭凸集法锥之和。建立时间离散化方案，使用变步长和近似投影，通过离散速度分解和离散能量不等式进行分析。

Result: 证明了连续问题解的存在性、全局能量界、唯一性和稳定性。离散方案在有限时间区间上收敛到连续解，得到迭代的一致有界性、定量稳定性估计和显式误差界。预测步在L2意义下渐近可行。

Conclusion: 所提出的追赶算法能够有效处理具有连续扰动的单调算子微分包含问题，离散方案具有理论保证的收敛性和稳定性，适用于包括约束干摩擦系统在内的多种应用场景。

Abstract: We study a catching-up algorithm for a class of differential inclusions driven by maximal monotone operators with continuous perturbations. Using a decomposition of the monotone operator into the closed convex hull of its single-valued part and the normal cone to a closed convex set, we establish existence of solutions and derive global energy bounds under a mild tangent dissipativity assumption. Under an additional local Lipschitz assumption on the perturbation, we also obtain uniqueness and stability with respect to the initial data. We then analyze a time-discretized catching-up scheme with variable step sizes and approximate projections. On every finite horizon, we prove convergence of the discrete trajectories to solutions of the continuous problem. A discrete velocity decomposition together with a discrete energy inequality yields uniform boundedness of the iterates, quantitative stability estimates, and explicit error bounds. We also establish asymptotic feasibility of the predictor step in an $L^2$ sense, as well as a Cesàro-type averaged feasibility property, showing that the constraint violations generated by the free step vanish as the discretization is refined. Finally, we illustrate the theory on explicit examples, including a fully explicit one--dimensional test case and a multidimensional constrained dry-friction system.

</details>


### [565] [Pseudoconvex Problems in Operational Decision Systems: Algorithms for Joint Learning and Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10778)
*Zijun Li,Aswin Kannan*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 提出一个同时学习与优化的框架，用于解决具有伪凸结构的多目标实时决策问题，通过迭代更新内外层变量，在现实假设下开发收敛算法，并在真实数据集上验证计算性能与学习精度间的权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究主要关注凸性、基于收益的目标，但实际决策系统（如能源系统）需要多目标优化，同时考虑可再生能源渗透率和发电成本等指标。此外，许多实际问题具有伪凸结构（如能源管理中的分数目标和零售中的logit收益模型），需要同时优化这些目标和训练机器学习模型。

Method: 提出一个同时学习与优化的框架，将问题分为外层（优化伪凸目标）和内层（使用历史数据训练机器学习模型）。开发迭代算法同时更新内外层变量，在现实的数学假设下保证收敛性。

Result: 在真实数据集上评估计算性能，发现学习不精确性与计算时间之间存在明确权衡：当评估最终解质量时，需要在学习精度和计算效率之间做出取舍。

Conclusion: 该研究扩展了实时决策系统的优化框架，从单目标凸问题到多目标伪凸问题，提出了有效的同步学习优化方法，并揭示了学习精度与计算效率之间的重要权衡关系，为实际应用提供了理论指导和实用算法。

Abstract: We consider joint optimization and learning problems arising in real-time decision systems. While most existing work focuses primarily on convex, revenue-based objectives, we extend this line of research to multi-objective formulations. In energy systems, for instance, we incorporate metrics such as renewable penetration and generation costs. Our key focus, however, is on a class of problems with a pseudoconvex structure - a natural relaxation of convexity. Representative examples include fractional objectives in energy management and logit-based revenue models in retail. The outer-level problem optimizes these pseudoconvex objectives, while the inner-level problem involves training a machine learning model using historical data. Our contributions are twofold. First, we propose a simultaneous learning-and-optimization framework that iteratively updates both inner- and outer-level variables. Second, we develop convergent algorithms for these problem classes under realistic mathematical assumptions. Using real-world datasets, we evaluate the computational performance of our methods and highlight an important observation: there exist clear trade-offs between inexact learning and computational time when assessing final solution quality.

</details>


### [566] [A study of column generation embedded in scalarization methods for the bi-objective cutting stock problem](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10850)
*Jennifer C. Borges,Helenice de O. Florentino,Socorro Rangel*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文研究多目标切割问题，提出基于动态列生成的标量化方法，在最小化总物体数量和锯切周期之间进行权衡分析


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 虽然多目标组合优化和切割问题已有广泛研究，但多目标切割问题受到的关注有限。本研究旨在填补这一空白，为工业界提供实用的多目标切割解决方案

Method: 采用动态列生成嵌入标量化方法的策略，实现了三种从文献中改编的方法来分析总物体数量最小化和总锯切周期最小化之间的权衡关系

Result: 计算结果表明，动态列生成能更好地逼近帕累托前沿；三种标量化方法没有明显优劣，可以视为互补；将三种方法生成的解集合并能得到更好的帕累托前沿近似

Conclusion: 本研究为处理多目标切割问题提供了见解和计算工具，有助于工业界获得实用的解决方案

Abstract: Research on multi-objective combinatorial optimization and on the Cutting Stock Problem (CSP) has been widely developed over the years. In contrast, the multi-objective Cutting Stock Problem has received limited attention and has been explored in only a small number of studies. In this paper a bi-objective study of the one-dimensional and the two-dimensional CSP is presented. It distinguishes itself from other research in the literature in two key aspects, among others. The first regards the model used to represent the problem and the second is the solution strategy based on dynamic column generation embedded into scalarization methods. Three methods adapted from the literature to analyse the trade-off between the minimization of the total number of objects and the total number of saw cycles are implemented. The computational results show that the use of dynamic column generation provides a better approximation of the Pareto front. As for the scalarization methods, none stood out. In fact, they can be viewed as complementary. The cardinality and hypervolume of an approximation of the Pareto front built from the union of the points generated by the three methods is always greater than the ones generated by each one. Dealing with the multi-objective nature of CSP, this study provides insights and computational tools to help industry obtain pragmatic solutions.

</details>


### [567] [Deep Learning for Sequential Decision Making under Uncertainty: Foundations, Frameworks, and Frontiers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11507)
*I. Esra Buyuktahtakin*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文从运筹学/管理科学视角探讨深度学习在不确定性下序贯决策中的应用，强调深度学习与优化的互补关系而非替代，并展示其在多个领域的应用前景。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人工智能正从预测向复杂、不确定、动态环境中的决策支持转变，这与运筹学/管理科学在不确定性下序贯决策的长期研究自然交汇。深度学习的最新进展为数据驱动建模和大规模决策系统开辟了新可能。

Method: 采用OR/MS中心视角，将深度学习视为优化的补充而非替代。深度学习提供适应性和可扩展近似，而OR/MS提供表示约束、追索权和不确定性所需的结构严谨性。教程回顾关键决策基础，将其与现代AI主要神经网络架构连接，讨论集成学习与优化的主要方法。

Result: 展示了深度学习与OR/MS集成在供应链、医疗保健与流行病应对、农业、能源和自主运营等领域的显著影响，推动了从预测性AI向决策能力AI的广泛转型。

Conclusion: 深度学习与优化的结合代表了AI发展的关键方向，OR/MS在塑造下一代集成学习-优化系统中发挥重要作用，共同推动从预测性AI向决策能力AI的转型。

Abstract: Artificial intelligence (AI) is moving increasingly beyond prediction to support decisions in complex, uncertain, and dynamic environments. This shift creates a natural intersection with operations research and management sciences (OR/MS), which have long offered conceptual and methodological foundations for sequential decision-making under uncertainty. At the same time, recent advances in deep learning, including feedforward neural networks, LSTMs, transformers, and deep reinforcement learning, have expanded the scope of data-driven modeling and opened new possibilities for large-scale decision systems. This tutorial presents an OR/MS-centered perspective on deep learning for sequential decision-making under uncertainty. Its central premise is that deep learning is valuable not as a replacement for optimization, but as a complement to it. Deep learning brings adaptability and scalable approximation, whereas OR/MS provides the structural rigor needed to represent constraints, recourse, and uncertainty. The tutorial reviews key decision-making foundations, connects them to the major neural architectures in modern AI, and discusses leading approaches to integrating learning and optimization. It also highlights emerging impact in domains such as supply chains, healthcare and epidemic response, agriculture, energy, and autonomous operations. More broadly, it frames these developments as part of a wider transition from predictive AI toward decision-capable AI and highlights the role of OR/MS in shaping the next generation of integrated learning--optimization systems.

</details>


### [568] [Sample Average Approximation for Distributionally Robust Optimization with $φ$-divergences](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10855)
*Yan Li*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 该论文研究了在φ-散度球内评估随机变量最坏情况期望的样本复杂度，发现当φ具有超线性增长时，样本复杂度与名义分布P无关；否则，样本复杂度依赖于P且可能任意大。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统上，估计有界随机变量期望的样本复杂度与基础概率测度无关。本文研究在φ-散度球内评估最坏情况期望时，这一性质是否仍然成立。

Method: 通过分析φ-散度函数的增长特性，研究最坏情况期望估计的样本复杂度。使用样本平均近似方法，并建立理论下界。

Result: 当φ具有超线性增长时，可获得与P无关的样本复杂度O(M_{φ,τ}(ε)/ε²)；当φ不具有超线性增长时，任何估计方法的样本复杂度都依赖于P且可能任意大。

Conclusion: φ-散度函数的增长特性决定了最坏情况期望估计的样本复杂度是否独立于名义分布P，这为鲁棒优化中的分布鲁棒性分析提供了理论依据。

Abstract: It is well known that estimating the expectation of any given bounded random variable with values in $[-B, B]$ has a sample complexity of $\mathcal{O}(B^2/ε^2)$ that is independent of the underlying probability measure. We show that this property can no longer hold when evaluating the worst-case expectation of the random variable, when the probability measures defining the expectation belong to the $φ$-divergence ball centered at some nominal measure $P$. Specifically, the sample complexity and its dependence on the nominal measure can be completely characterized by the growth of the divergence function. When the divergence function $φ$ exhibits superlinear growth, then a $P$-independent sample complexity of $\mathcal{O}(M_{φ, τ}(ε) / ε^2)$ can be obtained by sample average approximation. Here $M_{φ, τ}(\cdot) $ is a function that only depends on the growth of $φ$ and the radius $τ$ of the divergence ball. On the other hand, when superlinear growth does not hold for $φ$, we show that for any estimation method, evaluating the worst-case expectation has a $P$-dependent sample complexity lower bound that can be made arbitrarily large by changing $P$.

</details>


### [569] [Stochastic Modified Equations for Stochastic Gradient Descent in Infinite-Dimensional Hilbert Spaces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10860)
*Sandra Cerrai,Qin Li,Anjali Nair,Jaeyoung Yoon*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 该论文研究了无限维希尔伯特空间中随机梯度下降(SGD)的连续时间极限，证明了在步长较小时，离散SGD动力学可由圆柱布朗运动驱动的随机微分方程(SDE)近似。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 科学计算中的逆问题通常需要在无限维希尔伯特空间中进行优化，SGD是常用求解器。然而，无限维空间中SGD的连续时间极限分析尚未充分建立，需要将欧几里得空间的扩散近似结果扩展到无限维设置。

Method: 采用扩散近似方法，将离散SGD动力学近似为圆柱布朗运动驱动的SDE。通过建立协方差算子的适当结构条件来处理圆柱噪声的适定性问题，并引入希尔伯特空间上的光滑泛函类，在弱意义下比较SGD与极限SDE的差异。

Result: 证明了当通过适当的光滑泛函评估时，SGD与极限SDE之间的差异是步长的二阶量。数值实验证实了预测的收敛行为，成功将扩散近似结果从欧几里得空间扩展到无限维希尔伯特空间。

Conclusion: 该工作成功建立了无限维希尔伯特空间中SGD的连续时间极限理论框架，解决了圆柱噪声的适定性和弱收敛分析两个关键难点，为无限维优化问题的理论分析提供了新工具。

Abstract: Inverse problems in scientific computing often require optimization over infinite-dimensional Hilbert spaces. A commonly used solver in such settings is stochastic gradient descent (SGD), where gradients are approximated using randomly sampled sub-objective functions. In this work we study the continuous-time limit of SGD in the small step-size regime. We show that the discrete dynamics can be approximated by a stochastic differential equation (SDE) driven by cylindrical Brownian motion. The analysis extends diffusion-approximation results previously established in Euclidean spaces to the infinite-dimensional setting.
  Two analytical difficulties arise in this extension. First, the cylindrical nature of the noise requires establishing well-posedness of the resulting stochastic evolution equation through appropriate structural conditions on the covariance operator. Second, since the randomness in SGD originates from discrete sampling while the limiting equation is driven by Gaussian noise, the comparison between the two dynamics must be carried out in a weak sense. We therefore introduce a suitable class of smooth functionals on the Hilbert space and prove that the discrepancy between SGD and the limiting SDE, when evaluated through these functionals, is of second order in the step size. Numerical experiments confirm the predicted convergence behavior.

</details>


### [570] [A Spectral-based ISS small-gain theorem for boundary control systems with infinite couplings](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11031)
*Yassine El Gantouh,Jun Zheng,Guchuan Zhu,Dingshi Li*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 该论文研究了具有无限多边界耦合的边界控制系统的输入-状态稳定性，针对Boltzmann型方程在无限网络上的应用，提出了谱小增益条件来保证指数ISS。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究具有无限多边界耦合的边界控制系统的输入-状态稳定性问题，特别是针对Boltzmann型方程在无限网络上的应用，这类系统包含延迟、散射和扰动，需要建立稳定性分析框架。

Method: 使用半群摄动理论和Banach格上正线性算子理论，推导出保证指数ISS的谱小增益条件；针对无限网络上具有延迟和散射的线性Boltzmann型方程，分析传输算子矩阵的谱小增益条件。

Result: 证明了传输算子矩阵的谱小增益条件能保证网络扰动传播的指数ISS；为特定类别的动态过程推导了显式的ISS估计；通过考虑两类重要的时滞传输条件展示了理论的实际应用性。

Conclusion: 该研究为具有无限多边界耦合的边界控制系统建立了ISS分析框架，特别是针对无限网络上的Boltzmann型方程，提出的谱小增益条件为这类复杂系统的稳定性分析提供了有效工具。

Abstract: We study the input-to-state stability (ISS) of boundary control systems allowing for infinitely many boundary couplings. Using semigroup perturbation theory and the theory of positive linear operators on Banach lattices, we derive a spectral small-gain condition ensuring exponential ISS. We further investigate linear Boltzmann-type equations on an infinite network of intersecting circles, incorporating delays, scattering, and disturbances acting at the junction. For this class of systems, we prove that a spectral small-gain condition on the transmission operator matrix guarantees exponential ISS with respect to disturbances propagating through the network. Moreover, we derive explicit ISS estimates for {certain} classes of dynamical processes. Finally, we demonstrate the practical applicability of our results by considering two important classes of time-delayed transmission conditions.

</details>


### [571] [Nesterov Acceleration with Operator Decomposition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11105)
*Jaewook Lee,Ernest K. Ryu,Chulhee Yun*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: NOD将Nesterov加速梯度下降扩展到强单调Lipschitz算子优化，通过算子分解为循环单调和单调分量，获得更优的迭代复杂度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 将Nesterov加速梯度下降（NAG）从光滑强凸优化扩展到更广泛的强单调Lipschitz算子设置，以处理更一般的优化问题。

Method: 提出Nesterov加速算子分解（NOD）方法：将算子分解为循环单调和单调分量（使用Asplund分解获得最紧表示），算法利用分解后的oracle进行计算。

Result: NOD及其分析包含经典Nesterov加速理论，获得寻找ε-精确解的迭代复杂度为Θ(√(L_φ/μ + L_S²/μ²) log(1/ε))，其中μ是强单调参数，L_φ是循环单调分量的Lipschitz常数，L_S是单调余项的Lipschitz常数。

Conclusion: NOD成功将Nesterov加速扩展到强单调Lipschitz算子优化，通过算子分解方法获得了理论保证，为更广泛的优化问题提供了高效的加速算法。

Abstract: We propose Nesterov acceleration with Operator Decomposition (NOD), which extends Nesterov's accelerated gradient descent (NAG) from smooth strongly convex optimization to the broader setting of strongly monotone, Lipschitz operators. The key insight is to decompose the operator into cyclically monotone and monotone components, with the Asplund decomposition providing the tightest such representation, and to have the algorithm utilize the decomposed oracles. NOD and its analysis subsume the classical theory of Nesterov acceleration and yield an iteration complexity for finding an $ε$-accurate solution of \[ Θ\left(\sqrt{\frac{L_φ}μ + \frac{L_{\mathbb{S}}^2}{μ^2}} \,\log \frac{1}ε\right), \] where $μ$ is the strong monotonicity parameter, $L_φ$ is the Lipschitz constant of the cyclically monotone component, and $L_{\mathbb{S}}$ is the Lipschitz constant of the (possibly acyclic) monotone remainder.

</details>


### [572] [Polyconvexity with Moments and Sums of Squares](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11124)
*Giovanni Fantuzzi,Didier Henrion,Martin Kru{ž}ík,Ajay Murali,Stephan Weis*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 提出基于SOS技术的多项式矩阵函数多凸性验证方法，以及基于矩-SOS层次结构的多凸包络数值计算方法


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多凸性是确保非线性弹性和变分问题中极小值存在的重要条件，但判断函数是否多凸或计算多凸包络通常很困难

Method: 使用平方和(SOS)技术提供可处理的凸优化充分条件来验证多凸性，并基于多项式优化的矩-SOS层次结构提出数值方法计算多凸包络

Result: 为多项式矩阵函数提供了有效的多凸性验证工具和多凸包络计算方法

Conclusion: 该工作为处理非线性弹性和向量变分问题中的多凸性提供了实用的计算工具

Abstract: A function of a matrix is polyconvex when it can be expressed as a convex function of the matrix minors. Polyconvexity is a regularity condition ensuring existence of minimizers in nonlinear elasticity and, more broadly, in vectorial problems of the calculus of variations, when minimizing integral gradient functionals. The polyconvex envelope of a function is the largest polyconvex lower bound. Yet deciding whether a given energy is polyconvex, or computing the polyconvex envelope, are generally difficult problems. This paper focuses on polynomial matrix functions. We propose (i) tractable convex-optimization based sufficient conditions to certify polyconvexity via sum-of-squares (SOS) technology, and (ii) a principled numerical method to compute the polyconvex envelope pointwise, based on the moment-SOS hierarchy from polynomial optimization.

</details>


### [573] [Oscillating solutions to the mean-field Langevin descent-ascent flow](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11134)
*Jean-Christophe Mourrat,Loucas Pillaud-Vivien*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文提供了一个反例，证明在特定条件下，$\mathbb{R}^2$上的平均场Langevin下降-上升流不收敛，而是保持接近极限环的循环行为。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 针对平均场Langevin下降-上升流收敛性的现有陈述，作者旨在通过构造反例来证明在某些条件下该流不收敛，从而完善对这一动力学行为的理解。

Method: 作者考虑$\mathbb{R}^2$上的双井势能函数，其中每个坐标都具有双井形状，且确定性动力学存在极限环。通过分析坐标间强耦合和小熵正则化条件，证明平均场动力学保持接近循环行为。

Result: 当两个坐标间的耦合足够强且熵正则化足够小时，平均场动力学不会收敛，而是保持在极限环附近的循环行为，从而构成了对收敛性陈述的反例。

Conclusion: 平均场Langevin下降-上升流在特定条件下不收敛，这一反例揭示了该动力学可能存在的复杂行为，对相关理论分析具有重要意义。

Abstract: We present a counterexample to the statement of convergence of the mean-field Langevin descent-ascent flow on $\mathbb{R}^2$. We consider payoff functions that are shaped as a double well in each coordinate, and for which the deterministic dynamics admits a limit cycle. When the coupling between the two coordinates is sufficiently strong and the entropic regularization sufficiently small, we show that the mean-field dynamics remains close to this cyclic behavior, and in particular, does not converge.

</details>


### [574] [Proximal Nonlinear Conjugate Gradient Methods for Composite Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11150)
*Shodai Hamana,Yasushi Narushima*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 提出了一种近端非线性共轭梯度法，将非线性共轭梯度法扩展到复合目标函数（光滑非凸函数与非光滑凸函数之和），并进一步扩展到非光滑函数为弱凸的情况。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 非线性共轭梯度法在标准无约束优化问题中非常有效，尤其适用于大规模问题。然而，对于复合目标函数（光滑项与非光滑项之和）的优化问题，现有方法需要扩展。本文旨在将非线性共轭梯度法的优势扩展到这类复合优化问题中。

Method: 提出近端非线性共轭梯度法：1) 使用基于近端映射的前向-后向残差代替梯度；2) 基于三项Hestenes-Stiefel公式确定搜索方向；3) 适用于光滑非凸函数与非光滑凸函数之和，以及非光滑函数为弱凸的情况。

Result: 1) 在标准假设下建立了全局收敛性（适用于凸和弱凸非光滑函数）；2) 当光滑项强凸时，刻画了收敛速率；3) 数值实验表明该方法稳定，在凸和非凸设置下均优于现有方法。

Conclusion: 成功将非线性共轭梯度法扩展到复合优化问题，提出了一种有效的近端非线性共轭梯度法，具有理论保证和优越的数值性能。

Abstract: The nonlinear conjugate gradient methods are known to be an effective approach for standard unconstrained optimization problems especially for large-scale problems. This paper proposes a proximal nonlinear conjugate gradient method, which extends the nonlinear conjugate gradient methods to composite objective functions, namely, the sum of a smooth nonconvex function and a nonsmooth convex function, and its extension to the case where the nonsmooth function is weakly convex. The proposed method uses the forward-backward residual which is defined by using the proximal mapping instead of the gradient and determines the search direction based on the three-term Hestenes-Stiefel (HS) formula. We establish global convergence under standard assumptions, both convex and weakly convex nonsmooth fuctions. In addition, we characterize the convergence rate when the smooth term is strongly convex. Finally, numerical experiments show that the proposed method is stable and achieves better performance than existing methods in both convex and nonconvex settings.

</details>


### [575] [Closed-loop analysis of linear stochastic MPC with risk-averse constraints](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11183)
*Jonas Schießl,Ruchuan Ou,Michael H. Baumann,Timm Faulwasser,Lars Grüne*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 将随机MPC从机会约束扩展到风险规避约束（如CVaR），确保递归可行性、闭环约束满足和（近）最优性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机会约束只限制违反概率，不考虑罕见但严重约束违反的幅度，需要更严格的风险规避约束来应对无界扰动

Method: 将间接反馈方法从线性随机MPC的机会约束扩展到条件风险价值（CVaR）等风险规避约束，建立递归可行性分析框架

Result: 证明了风险规避MPC方案的递归可行性和闭环约束满足性，基于随机耗散性概念和终端条件确保了平均闭环性能的（近）最优性

Conclusion: 成功将随机MPC扩展到风险规避约束，为处理无界扰动下的严重约束违反提供了理论保证和性能保证

Abstract: Chance constraints are widely used in stochastic model predictive control (MPC) to enforce probabilistic state and input constraints in the presence of unbounded disturbances. However, they only restrict violation probabilities and do not account for the magnitude of rare but severe constraint violations. In this paper, we extend the indirect feedback approach for linear stochastic MPC from chance constraints to risk-averse constraints like the conditional value-at-risk. For the resulting risk-averse MPC scheme, we establish recursive feasibility and closed-loop constraint satisfaction. Furthermore, based on a stochastic dissipativity notion and suitable conditions on the terminal ingredients we show that (near)-optimality of the averaged closed-loop performance can be ensured.

</details>


### [576] [Robust Neural Policy Distillation of Long-Horizon FCS-MPC for Flying-Capacitor Three-Level Boost Converters](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11192)
*Jinjian Sheng,Kazumune Hashimoto,Shuang Zhao,Mahdieh S. Sadabadi*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 使用神经网络模仿专家FCS-MPC控制器，降低计算负担并实现跨拓扑迁移


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统FCS-MPC在飞跨电容三电平升压变换器中能改善瞬态调节和电容平衡，但在高开关频率下计算成本过高

Method: 训练前馈神经网络模仿基于波束搜索的N步FCS-MPC专家控制器，使用随机化参数生成专家轨迹，并采用基于分歧的DAgger变体对策略分歧状态重新标记

Result: 学习到的策略在仿真中能在标称条件、工作点变化和多个物理参数扰动下保持稳定的电压调节和电容平衡，计算负担显著降低，且能迁移到NPC型三电平降压变换器

Conclusion: 神经网络模仿方法能有效降低FCS-MPC的计算复杂度，同时保持控制性能，并展示了跨拓扑迁移的潜力

Abstract: Long-horizon finite-control-set model predictive control (FCS-MPC) can improve transient regulation and flying-capacitor balancing in flying-capacitor three-level boost converters (FC-TLBCs). However, searching over switching sequences becomes computationally expensive at high switching frequencies. We train a feedforward neural network to imitate an $N$-step FCS-MPC expert computed with beam search. To improve robustness, expert trajectories are generated under randomized input voltage, load resistance, and component parameters, and a disagreement-based DAgger variant is used to relabel on-policy states where the student and expert disagree. In simulation, the learned policy maintains stable voltage regulation and capacitor balancing under nominal conditions, operating-point changes, and perturbations of several physical parameters. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach by reducing the computational burden. We also demonstrate transfer to an NPC-type three-level buck converter, where initializing from the FC-TLBC network improves sample efficiency compared with training from scratch.

</details>


### [577] [Gradient extremals, talwegs, valleys, and directional alignment for generic gradient descent](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11213)
*Pascal Bégout,Jérôme Bolte,Thomas Mariotti,Francisco Silva*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 梯度极值线是梯度为Hessian矩阵特征向量的轨迹，连接山谷和谷底等概念，梯度流轨迹会与梯度极值线切线方向对齐，并呈现体积集中现象。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究梯度极值线的几何框架，连接山谷和谷底等概念，分析梯度流轨迹与这些几何结构的对齐关系，理解非线性优化中的几何结构。

Method: 从变分角度分析梯度极值线，研究梯度流及其离散对应物的轨迹方向对齐性质，在非共振假设下分析对齐速率，证明体积集中现象。

Result: 梯度流轨迹与梯度极值线切线方向对齐，对齐速率由第一谱隙或Hessian最小特征值控制，非线性性和步长会复杂地扭曲这些速率，初始条件集的像会集中在山谷内并渐近收敛到谷底。

Conclusion: 梯度极值线在梯度流几何结构中起核心组织作用，解释了轨迹对齐和体积集中现象，为理解非线性优化中的几何行为提供了理论框架。

Abstract: Gradient extremals are loci along which the gradient is an eigenvector of the Hessian. These objects provide a natural geometric framework connecting several notions, notably valleys and talwegs, which we analyze from a variational viewpoint in the generic case. We then show that trajectories of the gradient flow and of its discrete counterpart exhibit directional alignment with the tangent spaces to gradient extremals, and generically to the talweg. Under non-resonance assumptions, and in contrast with the quadratic case, alignment rates are governed either by the first spectral gap or by the smallest eigenvalue of the Hessian at the limit point. Nonlinearities and the step length may both distort these rates in a complex manner. We further prove a volume concentration phenomenon emphasizing the structuring role of gradient extremals: for large times, the images of sets of initial conditions concentrate inside valleys and asymptotically around talwegs.

</details>


### [578] [Data-driven balanced truncation of K-power bilinear systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11268)
*Xiaolong Wang,Biaolin Li,Xiaoli Wang*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 提出了一种针对K-power双线性系统的数据驱动平衡截断方法，利用传递函数采样数据近似构建降阶模型


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: K-power双线性系统具有特殊的耦合结构和良好实践特性，但传统平衡截断方法需要系统模型信息。本文旨在开发数据驱动的平衡截断方法，仅利用传递函数采样数据即可构建降阶模型

Method: 利用K-power系统Gramian矩阵的良好性质，建立平衡截断主要量与传递函数评估之间的显式关系，通过传递函数采样数据近似组装降阶模型，并提供避免复数运算的先进流程以生成实值降阶模型

Result: 两个数值算例验证了所提方法的可行性和有效性，表明数据驱动平衡截断能够成功应用于K-power系统

Conclusion: 成功开发了K-power系统的数据驱动平衡截断方法，仅需传递函数采样数据即可构建降阶模型，避免了传统方法对系统模型的依赖，为实际工程应用提供了便利

Abstract: As a special type of bilinear systems, K-power bilinear systems possess a special coupled structure along with nice properties in practice. In this paper, we investigate the data-driven counterpart of balanced truncation for K-power systems. As the standard balanced truncation is performed based on the subsystems of K-power systems, the main idea is to approximate the quantities of each reduced subsystem with the evaluations of transfer functions. We exploit the nice properties of Gramians for K-power systems, and establish the explicit relationship between the main quantities of balanced truncation and the evaluation of transfer functions. As a result, reduced models produced via balanced truncation can be assembled approximately by the sample data of transfer functions, leading to a data-driven balancing truncation method for K-power systems. An advanced procedure is also provided to avoid the complex arithmetic completely and produce real-valued reduced models. Two numerical examples confirm the feasibility and effectiveness of the proposed method.

</details>


### [579] [Incentive Design without Hypergradients: A Social-Gradient Method](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11346)
*Georgios Vasileiou,Lantian Zhang,Silun Zhang*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 提出了一种无需超梯度计算的社会梯度流激励设计方法，可在信息不对称下实现社会最优均衡


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统激励设计方法需要计算超梯度（总导数），这通常需要知道均衡对激励的敏感性信息，但在信息不对称情况下这些信息通常无法获得

Method: 提出社会梯度流激励法则，证明社会成本梯度总是规划者目标的下陷方向；在理想情况下（可观测均衡响应）收敛到唯一社会最优激励；在不可观测情况下作为两时间尺度交互的慢时间尺度极限

Result: 社会梯度流总能收敛到社会最优激励；当均衡不可直接观测时，联合策略-激励动态收敛到社会最优；数值实验验证了理论结果

Conclusion: 社会梯度流提供了一种无需超梯度计算的激励设计方法，在信息不对称情况下有效，为激励设计问题提供了新的解决方案

Abstract: Incentive design problems consider a system planner who steers self-interested agents toward a socially optimal Nash equilibrium by issuing incentives in the presence of information asymmetry, that is, uncertainty about the agents' cost functions. A common approach formulates the problem as a Mathematical Program with Equilibrium Constraints (MPEC) and optimizes incentives using hypergradients-the total derivatives of the planner's objective with respect to incentives. However, computing or approximating the hypergradients typically requires full or partial knowledge of equilibrium sensitivities to incentives, which is generally unavailable under information asymmetry. In this paper, we propose a hypergradient-free incentive law, called the social-gradient flow, for incentive design when the planner's social cost depends on the agents' joint actions. We prove that the social cost gradient is always a descent direction for the planner's objective, irrespective of the agent cost landscape. In the idealized setting where equilibrium responses are observable, the social-gradient flow converges to the unique socially optimal incentive. When equilibria are not directly observable, the social-gradient flow emerges as the slow-timescale limit of a two-timescale interaction, in which agents' strategies evolve on a faster timescale. It is established that the joint strategy-incentive dynamics converge to the social optimum for any agent learning rule that asymptotically tracks the equilibrium. Theoretical results are also validated via numerical experiments.

</details>


### [580] [Characterization of law-invariant BSDEs and dynamic risk measures in continuous time](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11382)
*Zakaria Bensaid,Roxana Dumitrescu,Anis Matoussi,Wissal Sabbagh*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文提供了二次增长定律不变BSDEs的新特征，解决了Xu-Xu-Zhou (2022)中关于g-期望定律不变性必要条件的开放问题，并扩展到一般（可能非确定性）生成元。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决Xu-Xu-Zhou (2022)中提出的关于g-期望定律不变性必要条件的开放问题，将分析扩展到一般（可能非确定性）生成元，并引入和比较新的动态定律不变性概念。

Method: 提供二次增长定律不变BSDEs的新特征化方法，在连续时间中引入新的动态定律不变性概念并进行比较。

Result: 成功解决了开放问题，将分析扩展到一般生成元，并将结果应用于一大类强时间一致性动态风险度量，超越了文献中离散时间特征化的限制。

Conclusion: 本文为定律不变BSDEs提供了完整的特征化框架，解决了重要的开放问题，并将结果应用于动态风险度量理论，扩展了现有文献的研究范围。

Abstract: We provide a new characterization of law-invariant BSDEs with quadratic growth. This answers the open question raised in Xu-Xu-Zhou (2022) [44] on necessary conditions for law-invariance of g-expectations and extends the analysis to general (possibly non-deterministic) generators. In continuous time, we also introduce and compare new dynamic notions of law-invariance. As a byproduct, we apply our results to a large class of strongly time-consistent dynamic risk measures. In particular, our results go beyond the discrete-time characterization of cash-additive and normalized dynamic convex risk measures studied in the literature, notably in Kupper-Schachermayer (2009) [33].

</details>


### [581] [Q-quadratic convergence of the centralized circumcentered-reflection method under a relative interior condition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11450)
*Yunier Bello-Cruz*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 论文分析了集中式circumcentered-reflection方法（cCRM）在aff(X)=aff(Y)条件下的收敛性，证明了在相对边界满足C¹条件时的超线性收敛和C²条件时的Q-二次收敛。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有cCRM方法要求X∩Y有内点且边界为C¹超曲面，但在aff(X)=aff(Y)⊊ℝⁿ时（如等式约束可行性和谱矩阵问题）这两个条件都不满足，需要研究该情况下的收敛性。

Method: 扩展cCRM方法到aff(X)=aff(Y)的情况，分析相对边界条件（C¹和C²）下的收敛行为，推导显式渐近常数，该常数与边界曲率和局部误差界常数相关。

Result: 当aff(X)=aff(Y)、相对内部ri(X)∩ri(Y)非空、且相对边界满足适当维度的C¹条件时，cCRM超线性收敛；当相对边界为C²时，Q-二次收敛，并给出了显式渐近常数。

Conclusion: 论文成功将cCRM的收敛性分析扩展到aff(X)=aff(Y)的情况，解决了等式约束可行性和谱矩阵问题等应用场景，同时指出aff(X)≠aff(Y)的情况仍为开放问题。

Abstract: The centralized circumcentered-reflection method (\cCRM) of~\cite{Behling:2024} converges superlinearly to a solution of $\operatorname{find}\;z\in X\cap Y$ when $\inte(X\cap Y)\neq\emptyset$ and the boundaries of $X$ and $Y$ are $\mathcal{C}^1$ hypersurfaces in $\re^n$. Both conditions fail when $\aff(X)=\aff(Y)\subsetneq\re^n$, as in equality-constrained feasibility and spectral matrix problems. We prove that \cCRM\ converges superlinearly when $\aff(X)=\aff(Y)$, $\operatorname{ri}(X)\cap\operatorname{ri}(Y)\neq\emptyset$, and the relative boundaries are $\mathcal{C}^1$ of appropriate relative dimension; and Q-quadratically when the relative boundaries are $\mathcal{C}^2$, with explicit asymptotic constant expressed in terms of the boundary curvatures at the limit point and the local error-bound constant. The case $\aff(X)\neq\aff(Y)$ is identified as open.

</details>


### [582] [Decision-Aware Predictions for Right-Hand Side Parameters in Linear Programs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11533)
*Jackson Forner,Miju Ahn,Harsha Gangammanavar*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 研究集成学习与优化问题，通过预测模型估计线性规划的右侧参数，确保预测的可行域包含真实最优解


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
