Motivation: 传统预测模型仅关注参数估计精度，但线性规划中预测参数会改变可行域，可能导致最优解不可行。需要开发既能保证预测精度又能确保可行域包含真实最优解的方法

Method: 提出新的训练公式，在最小化决策误差的同时考虑可行性，利用历史原始解和对偶解信息。分析预测可行域包含真实解的条件，以及真实解在预测问题中的最优性。使用现有线性规划和非凸规划求解方法

Result: 在合成线性规划和网络优化问题上进行数值实验，结果表明相比标准回归模型，所提方法能有效实现所需的可行性保证

Conclusion: 提出的集成学习与优化框架能有效平衡预测精度和可行性约束，为实际应用中的决策支持系统提供了更可靠的方法

Abstract: This paper studies an integrated learning and optimization problem in which a prediction model estimates the right-hand-side parameters of a linear program (LP) using a contextual vector. Considering that such a prediction alters the feasible region of the LP, we aim to estimate the constraint set to contain the optimal solution of the underlying LP, given by the true right-hand side parameters. We propose formulations for training a prediction model by minimizing the decision error while accounting for feasibility, measured by a collection of historical primal and dual solutions. Our analysis identifies conditions under which a resulting predicted feasible region contains the true solution, and whether the latter solution achieves optimality for the predicted problem. To solve the alternative training problems, we employ existing LP and nonconvex programming solution methods. We conduct numerical experiments on a synthetic LP and a network optimization problem. Our results indicate that the proposed methods effectively implement the desired feasibility, compared to standard regression models.

</details>


### [583] [Risk-Constrained Kelly for Mutually Exclusive Outcomes: CRRA Support Invariance and Logarithmic One-Dimensional Calibration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11577)
*Christopher D. Long*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 研究风险约束下的凯利优化问题，在有限互斥结果市场中，使用状态价格和回撤替代约束。证明在标准超额轮盘机制下，风险约束不会改变最优投资组合的活跃状态集，只改变财富分布。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究在风险约束条件下如何优化凯利准则投资策略，特别是在金融市场中考虑状态价格和回撤风险约束时的最优投资组合选择问题。

Method: 使用有限互斥结果模型，引入状态价格和回撤替代约束，分析常数相对风险厌恶效用函数。在标准超额轮盘机制下，证明约束优化器与无约束优化器具有相同的活跃状态集。

Result: 证明在标准超额轮盘机制下，风险约束不会改变最优投资组合的活跃状态集，只改变财富分布。对对数效用函数情况，建立了完整的校准定理和结构化算法。

Conclusion: 风险约束会改变财富分布但不会改变投资组合的活跃状态集，这一结果在标准超额轮盘机制下成立。对对数效用函数情况提供了完整的理论框架和算法。

Abstract: We study the finite mutually exclusive outcome version of risk-constrained Kelly optimization with explicit state prices. The market has outcome probabilities $p_i>0$, state prices $q_i>0$, terminal wealths $W_i=c+x_i/q_i$, and a drawdown-surrogate constraint \[ \sum_{i=1}^n p_i W_i^{-λ}\le 1,\qquad λ>0. \] For constant relative risk aversion utility, we work primarily in the standard overround regime $\sum_i q_i>1$, where every optimizer is necessarily non-full-support. Under the usual unique likelihood-ratio prefix hypothesis for the unconstrained problem, we prove that the constrained optimizer has exactly the same active set. Thus, in the regime where the prefix theorem is meaningful, the risk constraint deforms the funded wealth profile but does not change the active set. The support is therefore invariant across both the CRRA parameter and the drawdown-surrogate parameter.
  We then isolate the logarithmic case $γ=1$. Once the common active prefix is known, the constrained problem reduces to a one-dimensional outer calibration together with independent one-dimensional inner equations on the active states. In this case we prove existence, uniqueness, and monotonicity for the inner solves, derive a complete calibration theorem, and record the resulting structured algorithm. We treat the fair and subfair regimes only as boundary cases: full-support phenomena can occur there, so the overround prefix theory no longer yields a parallel exact description of comparable sharpness. A numerical example illustrates how the risk constraint alters the funded wealth profile while leaving support unchanged.

</details>


### [584] [Computation of Least Trimmed Squares: A Branch-and-Bound framework with Hyperplane Arrangement Enhancements](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11584)
*Xiang Meng,Andrés Gómez,Rahul Mazumder*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 提出新的混合整数优化(MIO)公式解决惩罚最小截断平方(LTS)回归问题，通过超平面排列逻辑和透视重构，在固定特征数时分支定界树具有多项式规模，计算效率大幅提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 惩罚最小截断平方(LTS)回归是鲁棒统计中的关键问题，能有效减少异常值影响，但现有MIO方法由于松弛弱和指数复杂度，在大规模问题上计算效率低下。

Method: 提出新的MIO公式，将超平面排列逻辑嵌入透视重构中，显式强制执行最优解的结构特性；开发定制分支定界算法，使用一阶方法和对偶界高效求解节点松弛。

Result: 在固定特征数时，分支定界树规模为样本数的多项式；在5000样本、20特征的合成数据上，新方法1分钟内达到1%间隙，而现有方法1小时内无法完成。

Conclusion: 新方法显著提升了惩罚LTS回归的计算效率，使得在低维设置下能够处理更大样本规模的精确鲁棒回归问题。

Abstract: We study computational aspects of a key problem in robust statistics -- the penalized least trimmed squares (LTS) regression problem, a robust estimator that mitigates the influence of outliers in data by capping residuals with large magnitudes. Although statistically attractive, penalized LTS is NP-hard, and existing mixed-integer optimization (MIO) formulations scale poorly due to weak relaxations and exponential worst-case complexity in the number of observations. We propose a new MIO formulation that embeds hyperplane arrangement logic into a perspective reformulation, explicitly enforcing structural properties of optimal solutions. We show that, if the number of features is fixed, the resulting branch-and-bound tree is of polynomial size in the sample size. Moreover, we develop a tailored branch-and-bound algorithm that uses first-order methods with dual bounds to solve node relaxations efficiently. Computational experiments on synthetic and real datasets demonstrate substantial improvements over existing MIO approaches: on synthetic instances with 5000 samples and 20 features, our tailored solver reaches a 1% gap in 1 minute while competing approaches fail to do so within one hour. These gains enable exact robust regression at significantly larger sample sizes in low-dimensional settings.

</details>


### [585] [A Distributed Bilevel Framework for the Macroscopic Optimization of Multi-Agent Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11712)
*Riccardo Brumali,Guido Carnevale,Sonia Martínez,Giuseppe Notarstefano*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 提出一种分布式双层优化算法，通过微观行动优化大规模多智能体系统的宏观涌现行为


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 如何通过分布式方式协调大规模多智能体系统，使其微观行动能够优化整体的宏观涌现行为，这是一个具有挑战性的问题

Method: 将问题建模为双层优化：上层通过性能准则形式化期望的宏观目标行为，下层利用压缩的聚合表示估计宏观状态来塑造行为。宏观状态由指数族分布参数化，从微观配置构建。算法集成分布式估计机制（每个智能体本地重建宏观状态）和基于超梯度的微观状态更新

Result: 通过时间尺度分离论证证明了算法收敛到双层问题的稳定点集，数值模拟验证了方法的有效性

Conclusion: 该分布式算法能够有效协调大规模多智能体系统，通过微观行动优化宏观涌现行为，为复杂系统控制提供了新方法

Abstract: In this paper, we propose a novel distributed algorithm to optimize the emergent macroscopic behavior of large-scale multi-agent systems via microscopic actions. We cast this task as a bilevel optimization problem, where the upper level formalizes the desired macroscopic target behavior through a suitable performance criterion, which is shaped in the lower level by leveraging a compressed aggregate representation estimating the macroscopic state. More precisely, the macroscopic state is parametrized by an exponential-family of distributions and constructed from the multi-agent microscopic configuration. The proposed algorithm integrates a distributed estimation mechanism, through which each agent reconstructs the macroscopic state locally, with a hypergradient-based update of the microscopic states aimed at improving the collective macroscopic behavior. We prove convergence to the set of stationary points of the bilevel problem via timescale separation arguments. Numerical simulations validate the effectiveness of the proposed method.

</details>


### [586] [Informativity for Data-driven Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11726)
*Joel Stevens,Jeremy Coulson*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 研究数据驱动预测问题，为线性时不变系统提供在较弱数据条件下实现唯一输出预测的理论框架和算法


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前数据驱动预测方法需要强条件（如持续激励），我们希望找到更弱的条件仍能实现预测

Method: 从数据信息性角度分析，形式化定义唯一预测的信息性概念，提供充分条件并设计算法计算唯一输出轨迹

Result: 建立了唯一预测的信息性理论框架，展示了即使无法唯一识别系统也能实现唯一输出预测的可能性

Conclusion: 提出了在较弱数据条件下实现唯一输出预测的理论和方法，扩展了数据驱动预测的应用范围

Abstract: In this work we examine the problem of data-driven prediction. That is, given a LTI system with unknown dynamics, we wish to use data collected from the system to predict the system's output response to a given sequence of known inputs. Current methods for predicting require strong conditions on the data such as persistency of excitation. We examine this problem with the goal of finding weaker conditions that still enable prediction. We approach the problem from the data informativity perspective and formally define the notion of informativity for unique prediction. We provide sufficient conditions for informativity for unique prediction and design algorithms to compute the unique output trajectory of the unknown system given known inputs. We demonstrate the results with a numerical example showing that unique output prediction is possible without being able to uniquely identify the unknown data-generating system.

</details>


### [587] [Fairness-aware Strategic Design of Station-based Electric Car-Sharing Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11732)
*Jue Zhou,Zoha Sherkat-Masoumi,Merve Bodur*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文提出一个考虑公平性的电动共享汽车系统设计框架，将服务公平性作为核心设计原则，通过双目标优化平衡收益与公平，为可持续城市交通提供决策支持。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有电动共享汽车系统集成模型主要关注经济效益，忽视了服务公平性这一关键维度。电动共享汽车系统对可持续城市交通至关重要，但其战略设计受到充电需求等运营约束的复杂影响。系统成功需要整合长期投资决策（站点位置、充电容量、车队规模）与日常运营现实（车辆路线、电池管理），而现有模型未能充分考虑服务公平性。

Method: 采用两种公平性范式：服务率差异和最大最小公平，通过实际群体服务率而非静态空间可达性来衡量。在多日代表性需求设置下，开发基于轨迹的双目标优化模型，联合优化收益和服务公平性。解决方案框架包括：分支定价算法求解单目标变体，嵌入精确双目标过程生成帕累托前沿，辅以潜水启发式方法为大规模实例获取高质量前沿近似。

Result: 通过大量计算实验（包括基于维也纳真实数据的案例研究），揭示了收益、公平性和系统设计之间的基本权衡关系。证明所提框架可作为有用的决策支持工具，设计既经济可行又社会包容的站点式电动共享汽车系统。

Conclusion: 该研究填补了电动共享汽车系统设计中公平性考虑的空白，将公平性作为核心设计原则，为可持续城市交通系统提供了同时考虑经济效益和社会包容性的综合决策框架，具有重要的管理启示和实践价值。

Abstract: Electric car-sharing systems are pivotal for sustainable urban mobility, but their strategic design is complicated by operational constraints, particularly those arising from the charging needs of electric vehicles. The success of these systems hinges on integrating long-term investment decisions (such as station locations, charger capacities, and fleet size) with daily operational realities, including vehicle routing to serve user trip requests and battery management. While existing integrated models address this strategic-operational link, they have prioritized economic efficiency, overlooking the critical dimension of service equity. This paper addresses this gap by making fairness a central design principle, operationalized through two distinct paradigms, namely, service-rate disparity and max-min fairness, measured explicitly via realized group service rates rather than static spatial accessibility. To capture demand heterogeneity, we adopt a multi-day representative-demand setting, and develop a bi-objective trajectory-based formulation that jointly optimizes revenue and service equity. We develop a solution framework in which a branch-and-price algorithm solves the single-objective variants of the models, embedded within an exact bi-objective procedure to generate the Pareto frontier and complemented by a diving-heuristic-based approach for obtaining high-quality frontier approximations for larger instances. Through extensive computational experiments, including a Vienna-based real-data case study, we provide key managerial insights into the fundamental trade-offs between revenue, equity, and system design, demonstrating that the proposed framework can serve as a useful decision-support tool for designing station-based electric car-sharing systems that are both economically viable and socially inclusive.

</details>


### [588] [SHANG++: Robust Stochastic Acceleration under Multiplicative Noise](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.09355)
*Yaxin Yu,Long Chen,Minfu Feng*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 提出了SHANG和SHANG++两种加速随机梯度下降方法，通过离散化Hessian驱动的Nesterov加速梯度流，在乘性噪声条件下实现了更好的稳定性和收敛性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统Nesterov加速在乘性噪声条件下对噪声敏感，当梯度噪声超过信号时可能发散，需要开发更鲁棒的加速方法。

Method: 通过离散化Hessian驱动的Nesterov加速梯度流，开发了SHANG（Gauss-Seidel型离散化）和SHANG++（添加阻尼校正的改进版本）。

Result: 在凸和强凸目标函数下建立了乘性噪声条件下的收敛保证，实验显示SHANG++在凸问题和深度学习应用中表现一致良好，在ResNet-34噪声实验中单组超参数配置达到接近无噪声设置的精度。

Conclusion: SHANG++在鲁棒性和效率上优于现有加速方法，具有最小的参数敏感性，为噪声环境下的加速优化提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Under the multiplicative noise scaling (MNS) condition, original Nesterov acceleration is provably sensitive to noise and may diverge when gradient noise overwhelms the signal. In this paper, we develop two accelerated stochastic gradient descent methods by discretizing the Hessian-driven Nesterov accelerated gradient flow. We first derive SHANG, a direct Gauss-Seidel-type discretization that already improves stability under MNS. We then introduce SHANG++, which adds a damping correction and achieves faster convergence with stronger noise robustness. We establish convergence guarantees for both convex and strongly convex objectives under MNS, together with explicit parameter choices. In our experiments, SHANG++ performs consistently well across convex problems and applications in deep learning. In a dedicated noise experiment on ResNet-34, a single hyperparameter configuration attains accuracy within 1% of the noise-free setting. Across all experiments, SHANG++ outperforms existing accelerated methods in robustness and efficiency, with minimal parameter sensitivity.

</details>
